In 2021, with some old friends from my days at Electronic Arts, we founded Play by Play Studios and we created the company to combine our collective passion for two things - gaming and sports."

name: Go Ape Ship!
description: Go Ape Ship! is a frantic co-op multiplayer game for one to eight players. Work with your crew of daring Astrochimps to master an expanding collection of tasks, respond to emergencies, unlock new rooms and upgrades for your spaceship, and safely reach the stars. Survive together. Or not at all.
developer_description: An indie game studio based in Washington state.
publisher_description: An indie game studio based in Washington state.

name: Orcs Must Die! By the Blade
description:
The orcs are back—louder, dumber, and smellier than ever. And this time… they’re in your face. Literally!

Orcs Must Die: By The Blade brings the legendary trap-slaughter franchise into fully immersive VR. Become a War Mage and defend Stormwreck Island in an all-new story as rotten rifts unleash corrupted orcs. Swing swords, trigger trinkets, punch orcs in the snout, and set ingenious trap chains that rocket screaming orcs across the room, pop off limbs, and spray gooey carnage everywhere.

Explore epic fortresses, channel powerful magic, and experience the most up-close (and up-nose) orc-smashing action ever. Fight solo or team up in 2-player co-op to build traps, heal rifts, and doom the greenskin hordes with style.

Mix brutal melee with comedic chaos. Build deadly defenses. Become a legend.

Stormwreck Island won’t save itself… and the orcs aren’t going to punch themselves… Well, some might—but you should help!

name: Etrange Overlord
description: Join Étrange on this musical odyssey as she seeks to conquer hell in the pursuit of living her best afterlife.
developer_description: Broccoli Co., Ltd. is a Japanese media company that publishes manga, anime, video games and trading card games. It operates a chain of retailers in Japan called Gamers which carries similar products and accessories. Broccoli is best known for their Di Gi Charat, Galaxy Angel and Aquarian Age franchises.

name: Saint Slayer: Spear of Sacrilege
description: Saint Slayer is an NES-style 2D action game, featuring loads of stages, enemies, and gore set against the backdrop of late-17th century Europe. Play as the ex-soldier Rudiger and wield the Spear of Sacrilege as you save the Holy Roman Empire from the corrupt Catholic priest Father Pacer.

name: Gorillas-Lab
description: Gorillas-Lab is a VR sandbox game developed by Untitled Studios. There are many different things you can do such as making your own creations, exploring the lore, fight your friends in a C4 battle. You can do whatever you want in this game!

name: Vampire Crawlers: The Turbo Wildcard from Vampire Survivors
description: Deal world-ending combos and blitz through infested dungeons! Vampire Crawlers: The Turbo Wildcard from Vampire Survivors is a casual, turnbased deckbuilder with roguelite elements. Master the Turboturn with your own hand of cards!
developer_description:
A solo-dev stroke of luck somehow turned into a 15-person game dev adventure.
We make allegedly fun games. For fun.
publisher_description:
A solo-dev stroke of luck somehow turned into a 15-person game dev adventure.
We make allegedly fun games. For fun.

name: Tales of Berseria Remastered: Deluxe Edition
description:
The Deluxe Edition includes:
• Tales of Berseria Remastered
• Battle BGM Pack
• Digital Artbook & Soundtrack
• Super Growth Support Herb Set
publisher_description: Bandai Namco Entertainment is a Japanese multinational video game publisher headquartered in Minato-ku, Tokyo. The company owns several multi-million video game franchises, including PAC-MAN, Tekken, Soulcalibur, Tales, Ace Combat, Taiko no Tatsujin, The Idolmaster, and Dark Souls.

name: Carmageddon: Rogue Shift
description: Carmageddon smashes back with brutal roguelite vehicular‑combat mayhem. Adapt, upgrade, and unleash destruction on post‑apocalyptic zombie hordes. The legacy lives on, reinvented and unforgiving.
developer_description: 34BigThings is a small independent studio based in Turin, Italy. We make games because we love games. We try to make only the games we would play and love ourselves, nothing else. “Ready when it’s ready” it’s not a destructive way to handle a business, if you truly care about what you do. We are a bunch of superweird people aggregated in this place doing things we like. Nothing more than that.

name: Ride 6
description: Live the thrill of asphalt and dirt with RIDE 6: affirm your biker identity by joining RIDE Fest, race with 250+ bikes from different categories and prove you're the best by challenging real motorcycling legends.
developer_description: Our story begins in Milan, when a small group of true enthusiasts started Graffiti, an entity that in 1996 officially changed its name to Milestone. To them we owe one of the milestones in the world of racing videogames, still in the hearts of many nostalgic: Screamer. This title establishes the company as a leading brand in the field of driving games on PC.
publisher_description: Our story begins in Milan, when a small group of true enthusiasts started Graffiti, an entity that in 1996 officially changed its name to Milestone. To them we owe one of the milestones in the world of racing videogames, still in the hearts of many nostalgic: Screamer. This title establishes the company as a leading brand in the field of driving games on PC.

name: Starship Troopers: Ultimate Bug War!
description: Lock and load into the Starship Troopers universe and join the Mobile Infantry in the most realistic depiction of war ever made ! Experience an original story in this action-packed, first-person retro shooter. Would you like to know more?
developer_description: Auroch Digital is part of the Sumo PLC Group. They are a game development studio based in Bristol, UK and founded in 2010. The studio specialises in strategy, simulation and digital tabletop game.
publisher_description:
Dotemu was founded by Xavier Liard and Romain Tisserand in 2007. The company's offices are located in Paris, close to the Folies Bergère.

In April 2010, Dotemu launched a new digital distribution service that would sell games without digital rights management, akin to Good Old Games. In March 2017, Dotemu announced that their online store would be closed down on 1 June that year.[4] The company cited tough market competition and their focus shifting towards game development rather than game distribution.

In September 2015, Liard and Tisserand sold their company to an unnamed private investor.[7] Later that month, they founded a new video game publisher, Playdigious (who would later publish Dotemu’s games on mobile platforms). Subsequently, in October 2014, Cyrille Imbert was appointed as Dotemu's chief executive officer. In March 2018, Dotemu announced the creation of The Arcade Crew, a publishing label that would support small development teams.

In August 2021, the company was acquired by Focus Home Interactive (now Focus Entertainment) for approximately €38.5 million (US$46 million).

name: Windrose
description: Embark on a PvE survival adventure in the Age of Piracy. Fight on land and sea, solo or with friends. Build, craft and explore vast open world filled with dark secrets. Master soulslite combat and take on challenging bosses, command your ship and plunder unspoken treasures!
publisher_description: PocketPair is a video game developer based in Higashigotanda, Shinagawa, Tokyo, Japan.

name: Highguard
description: From the creators of Apex Legends and Titanfall, comes Highguard: a PvP raid shooter where players will ride, fight, and raid as Wardens, arcane gunslingers sent to fight for control of a mythical continent.
developer_description: Wildlight Entertainment is a new, fully-funded entertainment studio comprised of talented creators from some of the biggest IPs in gaming, including Apex Legends, Call of Duty, and Titanfall.
publisher_description: Wildlight Entertainment is a new, fully-funded entertainment studio comprised of talented creators from some of the biggest IPs in gaming, including Apex Legends, Call of Duty, and Titanfall.

name: Catana: Red Flowers
description:
Step into the paws of a nimble ninja cat!

By day, run your chaotic Restaurant, cook dishes, serve quirky guests, and stir up playful mischief.

By night, dash through enemies, deflect bullets, gather resources to grow your Restaurant, and showcase your skills with precision, speed, and style.

name: Star Wars: Galactic Racer
description: STAR WARS: Galactic Racer is a runs-based, high-stakes reinvention of racing born in the lawless Outer Rim. With the Empire gone and the galaxy rebuilding, The Galactic League is created: an underground, unsanctioned circuit where syndicates bankroll chaos and champions are forged.
developer_description: Fuse Games is an independent UK-based game developer led by key figures from the Burnout and Need for Speed franchises. They craft genre-leading interactive entertainment that fuses uncompromising attention on game feel with blockbuster spectacle and innovative gameplay advances.
publisher_description: Greetings from The Bunker, and welcome to Secret Mode! We publish video games. We believe that games are for everyone, and that creativity has no limits. We believe quality and fun are everything. Our goal is to delight and inspire you, and that’s why we are Secret Mode.

name: Orbitals
description: Team up as Maki and Omura, two inseparable explorers with a whole lot more determination than experience. You’ll brave the perils of space in search of help for their crumbling station home, now trapped within a supernatural cosmic storm.
developer_description: Independent game studio based in Tokyo
publisher_description: Kepler Interactive is a global publisher and game developer built on a unique co‑ownership model. Kepler gives studios a stake in the business and a leadership role in strategic decision-making, at the same time as preserving their creative independence, enabling them to make fun and commercially successful games appealing to a wide audience.

name: Stardust: Wish of Witch
description: STARDUST: Wish of Witch is a single-player SRPG beautifully crafted in pixel art. Follow the secret of the wish-granting star and join the adventure of the girl “Star” and the mage “Yu”.
developer_description: Kniv Studio is an indie game studio that puts creativity at its core, creating fun games across genres. We combine presentation, story, and gameplay to deliver memorable play experiences.
publisher_description: Kniv Studio is an indie game studio that puts creativity at its core, creating fun games across genres. We combine presentation, story, and gameplay to deliver memorable play experiences.

name: Life is Strange: Reunion
description: Life is Strange: Reunion is the thrilling finale to the Max and Chloe saga, a chapter that brings their book to a close. This is a full circle moment for both developers and fans—one that builds on everything that has come before. And even as the game delivers a reunion long-thought impossible, it also caps off our time at Caledon University in a literal blaze of glory.
developer_description: Deck Nine is an independent game developer dedicated to forging stories and gameplay into transformative entertainment experiences.
publisher_description:
Square Enix develops, publishes, distributes and licenses Square Enix, Eidos and Taito branded entertainment content in Europe and other PAL territories as part of the Square Enix group of companies. Square Enix also has a global network of leading development studios such as Crystal Dynamics and Eidos Montréal.

The Square Enix group of companies boasts a valuable portfolio of intellectual property including: Final Fantasy, which has sold over 130 million units worldwide; Dragon Quest, which has sold over 71 million units worldwide; Tomb Raider, which has sold over 58 million units worldwide; and the legendary Space Invaders.

name: Neopets: Mega Mini Games Collection - The Neopian Arcade Odyssey
description:
Neopets: The Mega Mini Games Collection is a lovingly remastered collection of 26 fan-favourite mini-games from the golden age of Neopets! From collecting Doughnutfruits in Hasee Bounce, launching Kass in Kass Basher, or chasing Neggs in Meerca Chase, the magic of Neopets is back!

And introducing an all-new adventure: Starlight Symphony, starring Nyx in a dazzling musical quest through the stars!

name: Bult: Hunting Simulator
description: BULT: Hunting Simulator is a hunting simulation game focused on waterfowl hunting. The game features a realistic shooting model based on ballistic calculations, dynamic bird behavior driven by an AI ecosystem, and tools such as decoys, calls, and a hunting boat. Players explore natural wetland environments influenced by weather, time of day, and seasonal activity
developer_description: Independent Yakut studio founded in 2015. Since 2022, it has been focused on game design
publisher_description: Yakutsk‑based video game publisher putting local talent on the global stage

name: Myth of Valderit
description:
Myth of Valderit is a psychological horror experience set in the cursed village of Valderit, inspired by the abandoned Catalan village of La Mussara. You wake up as Nil, separated from your friends Julia and Enric, and soon uncover the dark secrets lurking within the village…

This single-player, first-person experience combines exploration, survival, and puzzle-solving. Nil must endure and remain alive, evading the fanatical devotees of an unimaginable entity.
developer_description:
Founded in 2025 in Barcelona, Loom Studios was created by four young artists who met at CEV School. Facing the uncertainty of the game's industry, they chose to pursue their passion from a different angle, building their own studio from the ground up.

With a clear vision if there isn’t work for you, you make it.

name: Kiln
description: An online, multiplayer, pottery party brawler from Double Fine Productions. Grab your friends to assemble a team of colorful spirits, then sculpt ceramic battle armor on a pottery wheel. The size and shape of your pots determine their play-style and abilities—work together to douse the enemy's kiln!
developer_description: Double Fine Productions is an award-winning game development studio founded in 2000 by games industry veteran Tim Schafer. Located in San Francisco’s South of Market district, Double Fine is committed to making high-quality games with an emphasis on originality, story, characters, and fun.
publisher_description: Our 23 game development studios, now including the studios under Bethesda Softworks, focus on delivering great games for everyone, wherever they play – on console, PC, or mobile devices. We’re responsible for developing and publishing some of the biggest franchises in history: Age of Empires, Forza, Gears of War, Halo, Minecraft, Fallout, Microsoft Solitaire, Microsoft Flight Simulator, DOOM, The Elder Scrolls, and many more. We believe that play is the thing that unites everyone, because when everyone plays, we all win.

name: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight Deluxe Edition
description:
Includes:
• Full Base Game
• Legacy Collection:
- Over 30 launch-day items included across 3 Themed Packs: Arkham Trilogy Pack, Batman Beyond Pack, Party Music Pack
- Each Themed Pack includes 7 suits (1 for each playable character), 1 Batmobile, and a set of 5 Batcave customization props
- 3-day Advanced Access

• Mayhem Collection*:
- Includes new Story Mission and Mayhem Mode featuring The Joker and Harley Quinn, along with a villain-themed Sinister Pack
- Break out of Arkham Asylum as playable characters The Joker and Harley Quinn in an all-new Story Mission
- Cause chaos on the streets of Gotham City in the all-new Mayhem Mode
- Sinister Pack includes 7 suits (1 for each of the original playable characters), 1 Batmobile, and 1 Batcave prop set

name: Paranormasight: The Mermaid's Curse
description:
A brand new PARANORMASIGHT tale begins in Ise-Shima, Japan—a region rich in mermaid legends.

Join a cast of fascinating characters investigating the mysteries of the Mermaids of Ise. Unravel their different perspectives on the case and guide the story to its thrilling conclusion.
developer_description:
Xeen Inc. (株式会社ジーン) is a Japanese video game development company.

Xeen typically offers developmental support for larger studios, providing audio or art assets for bigger projects.
publisher_description:
Square Enix develops, publishes, distributes and licenses Square Enix, Eidos and Taito branded entertainment content in Europe and other PAL territories as part of the Square Enix group of companies. Square Enix also has a global network of leading development studios such as Crystal Dynamics and Eidos Montréal.

The Square Enix group of companies boasts a valuable portfolio of intellectual property including: Final Fantasy, which has sold over 130 million units worldwide; Dragon Quest, which has sold over 71 million units worldwide; Tomb Raider, which has sold over 58 million units worldwide; and the legendary Space Invaders.

name: Thomas & Friends: Wonders of Sodor
description: Join Thomas and his friends on a special journey across Sodor! Hop into the cabs of North Western Railway’s classic steam team to enjoy nostalgic stories and all-new narratives right from the drivers’ seats. Explore the Wonders of Sodor – fun and magic await!
developer_description: Dovetail Games is a UK developer and publisher of simulation entertainment software.
publisher_description: Dovetail Games is a UK developer and publisher of simulation entertainment software.

name: Kyoto Xanadu: The Blooming Phantom
description: Set in an alternate reality where Kyoto is the capital of Japan, Kyoto Xanadu players take on monsters and mysteries coming from the great labyrinth known as Xanadu. As a student, players will challenge the labyrinth and grow through their battles within Xanadu while also deepening bonds with various people during your daily life. Uncover the truth hidden both in the labyrinth and Kyoto itself.
developer_description: Nihon Falcom Corporation (日本ファルコム株式会社) is a Japanese video game company. The company was founded in March 1981 by Masayuki Kato. Falcom has played a definite role in the growth and development of the Japanese personal computer software industry. The company released one of the first Japanese role-playing video games in 1983 and followed with real-time action and adventure games as well as games with fully developed soundtracks. They were pioneers of the Japanese role-playing game industry, and remain one of the oldest role-playing game developers still in existence today.
publisher_description: Nihon Falcom Corporation (日本ファルコム株式会社) is a Japanese video game company. The company was founded in March 1981 by Masayuki Kato. Falcom has played a definite role in the growth and development of the Japanese personal computer software industry. The company released one of the first Japanese role-playing video games in 1983 and followed with real-time action and adventure games as well as games with fully developed soundtracks. They were pioneers of the Japanese role-playing game industry, and remain one of the oldest role-playing game developers still in existence today.

name: Legacy of Kain: Ascendance
description: Enter the dark world of Nosgoth – Ascendance is a fast paced, 2D action platformer built around fluid combat, vertical movement, vampiric powers, and skill-driven play.
publisher_description: Crystal is Craftsmanship, Transparency, and Impact at its core. Our passion is for great gaming; our mission is to tell a story through art, animation and innovation. This is the studio at which you will make the games of your career, and it's a studio dedicated not only to quality, but to making groundbreaking games that turn into lifetime memories. Backed by a twenty year history of developing franchises like Tomb Raider and Legacy of Kain, Crystal Dynamics is a place for excellence.

name: God of War Sons of Sparta
description:
Every legend has a beginning – before he was a God, before he was a father, Kratos was a young Spartan!
Experience an untold chapter in Kratos’ journey set during the harsh years of Spartan training alongside his brother Deimos. Through endless trials, their minds, bodies, and hearts have been molded to become Spartan soldiers for whom duty and honor mean everything.
After a fellow cadet goes missing, Kratos and Deimos vow to find him and embark on an adventure that will put their training and Spartan spirit to the test.
developer_description:
We are an independent video game development studio with a global team. At our core, we are passionate game developers and artists who seek to create meaningful experiences through our games and services.

We are all gamers, collectors and enthusiasts first. In a world of cloud storage, download codes and virtual licenses, we are excited and proud to create exclusive artisan collectibles that complement the effort that goes into indie and homebrew development.

We love creating games. From retro cartridges to PC & current generation consoles, we want to make games that are accessible and enjoyable for every gamer.
publisher_description: Sony Interactive Entertainment is the fusion of Sony Computer Entertainment and Sony Network Entertainment. The company publishes and develop first-party titles for all PlayStation platforms as well as handling design and development of PlayStation hardware.

name: Echoes of Aincrad
description:
Step into the legendary floating castle of Aincrad, a realm of breathtaking beauty and unforgiving danger. What seemed to be a dream adventure has now become a fight for survival. Among thousands of trapped souls, your journey is yours alone; will you rise, endure, and forge bonds that define your destiny? Or will you perish while facing enemies stronger, faster, and more ruthless than you imagined?

This is not just a game. It’s a battle for survival.

Take up your weapon. Shape your legend. Conquer Aincrad. RISK YOUR REALITY!

name: Bluey's Happy Snaps
description:
Explore Bluey’s world like never before in Bluey's Happy Snaps!

Join Bluey and her family in a new photo-powered adventure game. Discover familiar locations, play with loads of toys, and use Bluey's camera to capture and keep all your favorite moments.
developer_description: At Gameloft Brisbane, we believe success comes from a strong studio culture and the right balance, between creating world-class games and enjoying the incredible lifestyle of Queensland, Australia..
publisher_description: Gameloft SE is a French video game publisher based in Paris, founded in December 1999 by Ubisoft co-founder Michel Guillemot. The company operates 18 development studios worldwide, and publishes games with a special focus on the mobile games market. Formerly a public company traded at the Paris Bourse, Gameloft was acquired by media conglomerate Vivendi in 2016.

name: Grand Theft Auto VI
description: Grand Theft Auto VI heads to the state of Leonida, home to the neon-soaked streets of Vice City and beyond in the biggest, most immersive evolution of the Grand Theft Auto series yet.
developer_description: Rockstar Games is an American video game publisher based in New York City. The company was established in December 1998 as a subsidiary of Take-Two Interactive, using the assets Take-Two had previously acquired from BMG Interactive. Founding members of the company were Terry Donovan, Gary Foreman, Dan and Sam Houser, and Jamie King, who worked for Take-Two at the time, and of which the Houser brothers were previously executives at BMG Interactive. Sam Houser heads the studio as president.
publisher_description: Rockstar Games is an American video game publisher based in New York City. The company was established in December 1998 as a subsidiary of Take-Two Interactive, using the assets Take-Two had previously acquired from BMG Interactive. Founding members of the company were Terry Donovan, Gary Foreman, Dan and Sam Houser, and Jamie King, who worked for Take-Two at the time, and of which the Houser brothers were previously executives at BMG Interactive. Sam Houser heads the studio as president.

name: Beyond Sandbox
description:
Beyond Sandbox is an ambitious open-world creation platform developed by Atlas XR, designed to blur the line between player and creator. Set in a dynamic, ever-evolving universe, the game empowers users to build, script, and share their own interactive experiences using an intuitive yet powerful toolkit.

Unlike traditional sandbox titles, Beyond Sandbox emphasizes limitless creativity through advanced physics systems, AI-driven interactions, and seamless multiplayer integration. Players can craft anything from small experimental worlds to fully realized games, all within a persistent online ecosystem where creations can be explored and remixed by others.

With a focus on community-driven innovation, the platform evolves alongside its players, offering regular updates, new assets, and expanded systems to push creative boundaries even further. Beyond Sandbox isn’t just a game—it’s a foundation for the next generation of interactive experiences.

name: Crazy Chain: Elpis no Kusari
description:
To quit being a saint, she falls in love.
"No. I’ll accomplish both love and the salvation of the nation."

Long ago, a war begun by two European nations.
A conflict waged through ever-advancing mysticism and technology continues even now—nearly a thousand years have passed.
developer_description: Otome Game branch of Idea Factory. Focuses on making games for a female audience.

name: MotoGP 26
description: Live the real MotoGP experience with all the thrills of the Official 2026 Season, renewed physics built around a new rider-based handling system, a more complete Career mode, dynamic Riders Ratings and much more.

name: FishPond
description:
FishPond is a pond-building sim where biology actually compounds.

Stock species into a living food web. Manage oxygen, predation, and diversity to keep things alive—then start pushing the system. Breed lineages across 12 inheritable traits. Unlock genetic tools. Automate harvesting. Expand your world.

Every fish has AI-driven behavior, a real genome, and a place in the food chain. Every population shift changes the music in real time. Every upgrade makes the whole thing run a little more like a machine—until you realize the machine is alive.
developer_description: Solo Devepor
publisher_description: Solo Devepor

name: Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road
description: The latest entry in the character collection and football simulation RPG series, "Inazuma Eleven!" With an original story featuring new main characters, over 4,500 players from across the series' history to collect and train, as well as exciting online tournaments, you can play the game your way!
developer_description:
LEVEL-5 Inc is a video game studio founded in October 1998 partly by Sony to develop games for the PS2, their first game was "Dark Cloud".
The president of the company is Akihiro Hino.

They are known for creating popular video game series like Professor Layton, Yo-kai Watch, Inazuma Eleven and Ni No Kuni.
publisher_description:
LEVEL-5 Inc is a video game studio founded in October 1998 partly by Sony to develop games for the PS2, their first game was "Dark Cloud".
The president of the company is Akihiro Hino.

They are known for creating popular video game series like Professor Layton, Yo-kai Watch, Inazuma Eleven and Ni No Kuni.

name: Captain Blood
description:
Captain Blood is a pirate-themed action game set on the Spanish Main in the 17th century, where you step into the boots of a fearsome pirate on a quest for gold and glory. Expect wild adventures with cannon firing, pistol shooting, swashbuckling sword fights, and plenty of pirate shenanigans. This action-packed hack'n'slash features fierce hand-to-hand combat, hordes of enemies, and a classic fighting system with flashy combos and epic finishers.

The game underwent several iterations throughout the 2000s and was last showcased in 2010 before vanishing for years. Now, we are excited to bring it back, combining its original glory with a series of modern improvements for today's gamers.
developer_description: SeaWolf Studio was a game development team that spun off from the Sea Dog studio in 2004. It was a part of the Akella company, but then sold to 1C Company in 2007. It is presumably independent by the release time of their game, Captain Blood.
publisher_description: SNEG is a small boutique publisher focused on reviving old gaming gems.

name: Skate.
description: Refreshed with a forever vision in mind. Reimagined with the skate. community - you - guiding us through development. We’re listening to you. Join us on this journey and help shape the future of skate.
developer_description:
Full Circle is a studio based in Vancouver, with team members around the globe, embracing a geo‑diverse team and culture. 
 
We're all about having fun and making great games that people want to play with their friends. 
 
We're working on the next evolution of Skate™, and set to deliver an experience that will embrace and build upon everything our community found special about the previous games.
publisher_description: Electronic Arts is a leading global interactive entertainment software company. EA delivers games, content and online services for Internet-connected consoles, personal computers, mobile phones and tablets.

name: Once Upon a Puppet
description: Once Upon a Puppet is a side-scrolling puzzle platformer developed by Flatter Than Earth.
publisher_description:
publishes and develops high-quality online and offline games, with a strong focus on engaging narratives and compelling characters.

Based in beautiful Hamburg, Daedalic is one of Germany’s most acclaimed and decorated publishers and developers, garnering numerous awards for adventure game milestones Edna & Harvey: The Breakout, Deponia and The Dark Eye: Chains of Satinav. In its internal studio, Daedalic is currently developing a host of new and innovative games that include the upcoming english versions of The Night of the Rabbit,1954: Alcatraz and Goodbye Deponia, as well as several unannounced titles for PC, mobile devices, social networks and the browser.

As an active publisher of third-party content, Daedalic has released outstanding and unique games like Machinarium, Tales of Monkey Islandand Torchlight II, with a growing portfolio of excellent titles scheduled for 2013 and beyond.
Daedalic is also active as a consulting agency in a number of fields, including business development, marketing and PR, as well as the production of serious games.

name: Lab Rat
description: This satirical adventure stars a metrics-obsessed AI who will monitor, profile, and entertain you as you progress through over a hundred genre-bending puzzles.

name: WSOP
description:
Show off your Texas Hold'em Poker skills!

The Official World Series of Poker App.
developer_description:
Since 2010, Playtika has been a pioneer in the games industry. 
 
We were among the first to offer free-to-play social games on social networks and, shortly after, on mobile platforms. We were also one of the originators of live game operations, offering users personalized, daily game experiences with new events and exciting new features 365 days a year. 
 
Our games have stood the test of time, leading with top-grossing titles for over five straight years.

name: Occupy Mars: The Game
description: Survive and colonize Mars in a highly technical, open-world sandbox game. Build and upgrade your base, discover new regions, conduct mining operations, retrieve water, generate oxygen, grow crops, and fix broken parts.
developer_description: Founded in 2012, Pyramid Games is a game development studio passionate about Science and Science-Fiction. Our upcoming games focus around topic of exploring the unknown and gathering knowledge for mankind. Our studio will take gamers to Mars and back, teach them how to become NASA engineers or show the interesting work of paleontologist. Currently, we're employing about 50 specialists in our studio in Lublin, Poland
publisher_description: The company was founded by Krzysztof Kostowski, who has been working in the gaming industry since 1991. In October 2016, it was listed at Warsaw Stock Exchange and joined an index the 80 largest companies of Poland. Over 10 companies from the company are now on Warsaw Stock Exchange.

name: Routine
description: Routine is a First Person Sci-Fi Horror title set on an abandoned Lunar base designed around an 80’s vision of the future. Curious exploration turns into a need for survival when a lunar base goes completely quiet. Searching for answers puts you face to face with an enemy who is certain the main threat is you. Discoveries lead to deeper unknowns and the only way to go is forward.
developer_description: Lunar Software is an independent games company based in the UK that currently consists of 4 people, Aaron Foster, Jemma Hughes and Pete Dissler. We are currently working on our first title called Routine that is a first person horror exploration game set on the Moon! Routine will be a commercial release aimed towards the PC and MAC through Steam!
publisher_description: We don’t care about genres or mechanics. We care about experiences and emotions. And we want to help developers make magic.

name: Asylum
description: An epic supernatural horror adventure and the spiritual successor to cult classic Scratches set in a massive, decaying mental institute. Inspired by H. P. Lovecraft, Hammer Films and twisted Euro Horror from the 80s.
developer_description: Senscape is an independent video game developer based in Argentina, founded in 2010 by Agustín Cordes, the creator of the cult classic horror adventure Scratches.They are best known for the massive psychological horror title Asylum, set in a sprawling, decaying mental institute, and the poignant, free-to-play narrative adventure Serena. Senscape is dedicated to revitalizing the point-and-click genre with immersive narratives, detailed environments, and a focus on psychological dread.
publisher_description: Senscape is an independent video game developer based in Argentina, founded in 2010 by Agustín Cordes, the creator of the cult classic horror adventure Scratches.They are best known for the massive psychological horror title Asylum, set in a sprawling, decaying mental institute, and the poignant, free-to-play narrative adventure Serena. Senscape is dedicated to revitalizing the point-and-click genre with immersive narratives, detailed environments, and a focus on psychological dread.

name: Need for Speed
description: need for speed bundle

name: Connection
description: A kidnapped woman will be freed on one condition: She must convince her kidnapper that his life is worth living.

name: Grow
description: In the self-proclaimed ‘Pumpkin Capital of the World’, no-nonsense curmudgeonly farmer Dinah Little takes in her estranged niece Charlie, who decides to enter the local pumpkin growing competition where she and the other growers face fierce competition, sabotage, and a genetically engineered rival.

name: Shark Whisperer
description: A marine conservationist and social media activist swims up close with sharks in a documentary following a high-risk campaign to change public perception and push for their protection. Along the way, the film balances awe-inspiring underwater encounters with the personal drive behind the advocacy.

name: Ice Cream Man
description: An idyllic summer town descends into madness when an ice cream man serves kids sweet delights with horrifying results.

name: Adult Swim's The Elephant
description: Told in three parts and brought to life by multiple animation creators, this Adult Swim special follows a deeply human journey of self-discovery. Each segment shifts in style, building a connected experience that explores identity from different angles.

name: Die'ced: Reloaded
description: Benny escapes an asylum on Halloween, masked as a scarecrow and hungry for blood. In 1980s Seattle, the hunt is on - and no one is safe.

name: Legend of the Forest
description: A group of friends set out on an adventure deep into the wilderness, determined to investigate the legend of Bigfoot.

name: The Jurassic Games: Extinction
description: In this thrilling sequel to The Jurassic Games, 10 death row inmates enter a deadly VR show to battle dinosaurs for a second chance at life. But when the system malfunctions, the carnage turns real. With a new host and higher stakes, survival is no longer just a game.

name: Masaka Kids, A Rhythm Within
description: The story behind the Uganda-based YouTube dance sensations who have endured devastating personal loss from famine and war, and use the power of dance and song to overcome hardship.

name: Tales from Black Manor
description: Enter the chilling world of Tales from Black Manor, a story that begins in the 1300s and continues through time to the end of the world, following one family’s ties to death. The story unfolds across generations, following the Black family as they possess a secret book of death and seek its secrets, engaging in cruel wars and seeking immortality.

name: A Paw Patrol Christmas
description: A holiday delivery is in jeopardy when Santa comes down with a cold and can’t bring presents. With a greedy plan threatening to spoil the season, a team of heroic pups races to protect the gifts and keep the celebration on track for everyone.

name: The Wife Who Knew Too Much
description: A seemingly perfect small-town family life starts to crack after a teen is killed in a hit-and-run following a school pep rally. As suspicion spreads through the community, a determined wife searches for answers while balancing loyalty to her family and the pressure to protect the school’s reputation.

name: Unexpected Christmas
description: Fresh off a recent breakup, Marissa Scott's return home takes an unexpected twist when her ex-boyfriend Richard arrives at the family gathering arm in arm with her estranged stepsister Kerry.

name: Under Fire
description: Story unfolds in the scorching heat of the Mexico border, where rival drug dealers Griff and Abbott arrive at a remote drop point for a routine drug deal. But when the exchange goes down, both reveal undercover badges — Griff is FBI, Abbott is DEA — and neither knew they were working the same case.

name: Wizard of Oz: Dead Walk
description: A young woman accidentally brings two familiar figures from a fantasy world into reality, where they become violent threats. As confusion and fear spread, she has to face a nightmare version of a once-whimsical story turned into a grim horror setup.

name: Risqué
description: Fired from a strip club, a vengeful dancer masterminds a high-stakes heist with fellow strippers to take down the corrupt boss and the men who underestimate them.

name: Stolen: Heist of the Century
description: In 2003 Antwerp, a crew pulls off a daring robbery at the supposedly impenetrable Diamond Center. Through interviews, case materials, and competing accounts, the story digs into who may have planned the heist, how it was executed, and what investigators believe happened afterward.

name: Wingman
description: As the first man to attempt to paraglide across the Colorado Rockies braves dangerous weather, camps in extreme weather, and hiking for miles in search of suitable launch points, he documents every minute of the perilous journey.

name: October 7: Bearing Witness to the Massacre
description: A feature documentary film on the history of Gaza and the horrific events of October 7, 2023 that shook the world.

name: The First Snow of Fraggle Rock
description: When the holidays are filled with unexpected adventures and challenges, the Fraggles learn to appreciate each day for being unique and special, like a snowflake.

name: Kissing Is the Easy Part
description: Two high-achieving teens strike a secret arrangement tied to college plans, expecting it to stay strictly practical. As tutoring and pressure from ambitious parents build, their growing connection turns messy and heartfelt, forcing them to question what they want and what they’re willing to risk.

name: Unknown Number: The High School Catfish
description: A teenage couple is bombarded with vulgar, taunting texts from an unknown number, turning everyday life into a tense guessing game. As the messages spread and pressure mounts, the documentary follows the search for answers and the fallout for everyone caught in the harassment.

name: Lego Disney Princess: Villains Unite
description: After Ariel, Moana, Tiana, Rapunzel, and Snow White thwarted Gaston's plan to take over all of their kingdoms, he calls upon Ursula, Jafar, and the Evil Queen to help take the Princesses down once and for all. The Princesses learn about Gaston's scheme and recruit a few friends of their own with the help of Magic Mirror: Aurora, Belle, and Cinderella! Together, the Princesses team up for an ultimate showdown of good versus evil.

name: Air Bud Returns
description: 12-year-old Jacob is an aspiring basketball player coping with the recent loss of his father. After he and his mother move to his dad’s childhood home in Fernfield, Jacob discovers a VHS tape of his old man playing basketball on the same court as a hoops-shooting golden retriever. Soon, Jacob begins his own adventure with a neglected golden retriever that he names Buddy.

name: The Jester 2
description: On Halloween night, a teenage magician is hunted by a supernatural killer whose deadly tricks turn every encounter into a gruesome game. To survive, she has to think faster than a foe who mixes bloodshed with dark magic.

name: Winter of Empires
description: A tense decision could determine whether peace holds or a galactic war ignites. Leaders must weigh the fate of a frozen world and its people, where every choice carries enormous consequences for the wider universe.

name: Roommates
description: A college freshman invites a cool, confident classmate to share a room, and their fast-growing bond is tested by everyday pressures. What starts as an exciting new friendship slowly turns into a tense standoff fueled by small slights and simmering resentment.

name: Castration Movie Anthology iii. Year of the Hyaena
description: Izzy seeks out everything in her power to stop her partner from transitioning. Meanwhile, Michaela tries her best to be a good person.

name: All the Devils Are Here
description: After a heist goes wrong, four criminals hide out in a remote safehouse and wait for instructions. With time dragging on and nerves fraying, suspicion spreads through the group, and the danger starts to feel less like an outside threat and more like something brewing within.

name: Lookout
description: A young woman takes a fire lookout job in a remote wilderness tower to escape a chaotic past. But as unsettling disturbances creep into her isolated routine, she’s forced to investigate what’s happening around her and confront the secrets hiding in the woods before the situation spirals.

name: Girl in the Cellar
description: A mother imprisons her daughter in their basement to prevent bad choices, unaware she's recreating her own traumatic past. As neighbors notice the girl's absence, suspicion falls on the conflicted mother.

name: Descendants/ZOMBIES Worlds Collide - Concert Special
description: A concert special that brings the high-energy songs from two beloved franchises to the screen. After a sold-out North American arena tour, fans can sing and dance along at home and relive the excitement of a big live show experience.

name: Past Life
description: After taking part in a past life regression event, an unemployed reporter wakes up with disturbing memories that do not feel like his own. As violent visions begin to intrude on his daily life, he is pulled into a tense search for answers about where they came from and what they mean.

name: Sangre del Toro
description: A filmmaker revisits childhood memories, cultural myths, and the monsters that shaped a lifelong imagination. Moving through a personal, dreamlike journey, the story traces how these influences helped spark the distinctive worlds and themes seen across their movies.

name: Ozzy: No Escape from Now
description: After his world suddenly slows down, a legendary rock musician confronts identity, aging, and serious health challenges while leaning on family and the music that defined him. As he weighs whether he can ever return to the stage, the film follows an intimate, emotional stretch of daily struggles, resilience, and the drive to keep creating.

name: The Family McMullen
description: Decades after an earlier chapter in their lives, a close-knit family finds love and commitment getting complicated again. As an older parent, grown kids, and extended relatives juggle breakups, new connections, and long-standing expectations, everyday romance and family dynamics collide in a warm, low-key comedy about second chances.

name: Still Hope
description: A teen from a close-knit community is lured into danger by someone she thinks she can trust and is taken far from everything familiar. After enduring years of exploitation, she finds her way back to safety, then faces the difficult work of rebuilding her life and healing from trauma.

name: The Muppet Show
description: A beloved variety show returns to its original theater for a music-and-comedy night where a celebrity guest joins the troupe for sketches, songs, and backstage mayhem. Expect fast jokes, playful chaos, and a warm throwback vibe as the performers try to keep the show on track.

name: LEGO Frozen: Operation Puffins
description: After the events of Frozen, Anna and Elsa want to start fresh in Arendelle, and make the castle feel a bit more comfortable. While they struggle to break free of the bounds of tradition, the Duke of Weselton has other plans for their beloved home alongside a flock of menacing puffins.

name: Aileen: Queen of the Serial Killers
description: This true-crime documentary revisits the life and crimes of a rare female serial killer, tracing a path from a traumatic childhood to intense interviews and revelations from death row. Using archival material and commentary, it examines how her story was told, debated, and remembered over time.

name: My Father, the BTK Killer
description: A woman recounts what it was like to grow up with a parent who seemed ordinary at home while secretly committing horrific crimes. Through her perspective, the film explores the shock of discovery, the long aftermath for loved ones, and how a community can be blindsided by evil hiding in plain sight.

name: Lost Horizon
description: A former soldier, now working for hire, fights to rescue the innocent in a land torn by war. Facing ruthless enemies and betrayal, he struggles for survival, justice, and redemption.

name: Finding Hozho
description: An older man takes in his estranged father during his final days, forcing him to face long-buried childhood pain. As memories resurface, he searches for a path toward healing and forgiveness, shaped by traditional Navajo teachings.

name: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Last Straw
description: A laidback middle-schooler keeps stumbling into messy, funny disasters while trying to live up to his father's high expectations. When the pressure turns into an ultimatum, he has to prove he can take responsibility, leading to a family-focused adventure with plenty of chaos and heart.

name: The Last Whale Singer
description: After a dangerous creature breaks free from a melting iceberg, a self-doubting teenage whale sets out with friends into the ocean’s darkest depths. Together they search for a mystical song that could protect the seas, while facing fear, uncertainty, and the growing threat to their world.

name: The Roughneck
description: An oil worker and his dog set out for a wedding, but a brutal attack at a rest stop derails the trip. Teaming up with his estranged father, he heads back into a tight-knit rural community where revenge and buried truths collide.

name: Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour | The Final Show
description: Filmed at the tour’s final stop in Vancouver, this concert movie captures a full-scale stadium performance that spans multiple musical eras, including the complete Tortured Poets Department segment. It’s a long, high-energy show built around big moments, crowd connection, and a sweeping setlist designed for fans and curious newcomers alike.

name: R.L. Stine's Pumpkinhead
description: After a family moves to a small town ahead of Halloween, strange events begin when one child vanishes and the adults act like he never existed. The remaining sibling teams up with new friends to investigate a local curse and a creepy presence before the missing child is lost for good.

name: Denzel Washington: Falling Forward
description: This documentary traces a celebrated performer’s rise from modest beginnings to major success across television, theater, and blockbuster films. It highlights the setbacks, risks, and determination that shaped a long career spanning Broadway revivals and Hollywood hits.

name: The Rats: A Witcher Tale
description: A gang of six misfit outlaws plans a daring heist, but pulling it off means doing the one thing they’ve avoided: trusting each other. To boost their odds, they team up with a washed-up monster hunter whose help comes with its own risks and complications.

name: Frankenstein: The Anatomy Lesson
description: This short behind-the-scenes documentary follows the cast and crew as they bring a new version of a classic story to life, guided by a visionary director. It highlights the ambition, dedication, and hands-on work involved in building detailed sets, designs, and effects while capturing the team’s creative process.

name: The Observance
description: After five years in a coma caused by a devastating crash, a woman wakes up to find her home life transformed. A secretive religious group has tightened its hold over her family and property, and she must navigate fear, control, and hidden truths as the group fights to keep its secrets buried.

name: Breakdown: 1975
description: This documentary looks at how American movies around 1975 reflected a country in social and political turmoil. Using film clips, cultural events, and interviews, it connects the era’s shifting national mood to the stories audiences watched on screen, arguing that entertainment can both mirror and shape history.

name: Murder in Monaco
description: In Monaco in 1999, a wealthy banker is found dead in his penthouse, and questions swirl around how it happened. This documentary revisits the case through interviews and reported details, exploring competing theories, shifting accounts, and the high-stakes world surrounding the investigation.

name: Kumail Nanjiani: Night Thoughts
description: A comedian returns to Chicago for a new stand-up special that mixes personal stories with sharp observations. The set dives into anxiety, therapy, awkward pre-legalization drug-buying, and the surprisingly high-stakes world of cat medication, balancing laughs with a heartfelt tone.

name: Sandiwara
description: In a bustling Malaysian night market, five different people share their own stories as their paths brush past one another. Through everyday moments, the film offers a window into sides of Malaysian culture that are rarely shown on screen.

name: Stranger Things: Fireplace
description: A cozy holiday fireplace special brings crackling flames, glowing lights, and a playful hint of spooky mystery. It blends a warm seasonal mood with an eerie, upside-down twist for a simple watch you can leave on in the background.

name: The Anacondas
description: A group of explorers in Mexico discovers the ruins of an ancient snake-worshiping civilization. Their excitement turns into a fight for survival when they awaken a massive anaconda that has been dormant for centuries, forcing the team to work together to escape alive.

name: All Saints Day
description: A worried sibling pulls together an estranged brother and a long-missing sister to help save their oldest brother from spiraling out of control. The attempt turns into a chaotic reunion and a messy intervention that pushes the family toward hard truths, forgiveness, and a fresh start.

name: Predator: Wastelands
description: When an alien hunter arrives on Earth, it takes down a gang of warlords and unexpectedly becomes a folk hero to the oppressed locals. Now, with their support, the alien sets its sights on the warlords' ruthless leader.

name: He Wasn't Man Enough
description: A successful writer is blindsided when she discovers her boyfriend is engaged to someone from her college past. As old wounds resurface, the two women reconnect and, with help from a close friend, turn betrayal into a chance to rebuild trust, find support, and move forward together.

name: Kidnapped: Elizabeth Smart
description: A teenager is taken from her family home in Utah, and the story is told through firsthand testimony and previously unseen material. As the search intensifies, the film traces the fear, confusion, and public scrutiny around the case while examining how manipulation, missed chances, and community pressures shaped what happened.

name: Trap 48
description: After a loved one dies from counterfeit drugs, a grieving man becomes consumed by revenge against the person responsible. As he tries to rebuild his life through school and a more honest future, he is pulled between anger and the chance to become someone better.

name: Ted Bunny
description: A documentary crew follows a lead tied to a notorious killer’s legacy, only to find themselves pulled into a grim, rabbit-themed nightmare. As the investigation spirals, the group faces escalating violence and a chaotic hunt for survival amid a strange mix of shock, dark humor, and slasher mayhem.

name: The Making of Jay Kelly
description: This behind-the-scenes documentary takes you from an immersive opening to an emotional closing line, following the making of a film with its director and cast. It blends on-set footage with moments from the movie to show how key scenes were created and brought to life.

name: Oscar Shaw
description: A retired detective, still shaken by a personal loss, is pulled back into a violent case that forces him to operate outside the system. As he hunts for answers and revenge, he struggles to balance redemption with the cost of taking justice into his own hands.

name: Dave Chappelle: The Unstoppable...
description: In this stand-up special, a veteran comic tackles a world that feels off balance with blunt commentary, personal reflections, and provocative jokes. It plays more like an unfiltered talk about culture and current events than a rapid-fire laugh fest.

name: Cheetahs Up Close with Bertie Gregory
description: In the Serengeti during the wildebeest migration, a wildlife filmmaker follows cheetahs up close, from a mother raising tiny cubs to a young male group learning to hunt together. Along the way, the film highlights the speed, teamwork, and everyday pressures these animals face in a demanding season.

name: Kill Tony: Once Upon a Time in Texas
description: A live comedy showcase in Austin puts up-and-coming performers on the spot with just a minute at the mic. A host and a rotating panel of famous guests react in real time, mixing quick sets, critiques, and unpredictable crowd energy in a no-mercy test of nerves and punchlines.

name: One Last Adventure: The Making of Stranger Things 5
description: This documentary takes you behind the scenes of a major final chapter, following the long, demanding process of bringing a beloved series to the finish line. Through on-set access, interviews, and creative discussions, it highlights the teamwork, pressure, and emotional goodbyes that come with wrapping a cultural phenomenon.

name: Twenty One Pilots: More Than We Ever Imagined
description: This concert film drops you into a massive Mexico City stadium show, capturing the rush of a sold-out crowd and a high-energy set. Between songs, it slips backstage for candid moments that show the pressure, preparation, and personality behind a career-defining night.

name: Miracle: The Boys of '80
description: A group of young American hockey players relives the 1980 Winter Olympics run that turned them into a symbol of hope during the Cold War. Using rare archival footage and present-day reflections, the film revisits the pressure, the teamwork, and the national mood surrounding a historic upset and a gold-medal dream.

name: Nikola Tesla's 19hz
description: A visionary inventor spends his final years chasing a hidden goal: finding a way to connect with something beyond ordinary human reach. Framed around a little-known obsession behind a famous legacy, the story blends historical intrigue with a mysterious, otherworldly pull.

name: The Investigation of Lucy Letby
description: This true-crime documentary revisits a high-profile case involving a hospital nurse convicted of multiple infant deaths, tracing how suspicions grew and how authorities built their case. Along the way, it raises questions about evidence, accountability, and the challenges of presenting sensitive testimony while protecting those affected.

name: A Gorilla Story: Told by David Attenborough
description: A naturalist recounts a first encounter with a baby gorilla and follows its journey into adulthood as it rises within its group. The story also checks in on how its descendants are faring today, offering a personal look at gorilla life across generations.

name: Mary J. Blige Presents Be Happy
description: A devoted stay-at-home mom struggles with empty-nest loneliness and a widening emotional gap in her marriage. A sudden trip to New Orleans to help her pregnant daughter sparks old dreams, new connections, and a renewed sense of self as she weighs what she truly wants next.

name: Unauthorized Love
description: After losing her boyfriend in a car accident. Shelly hesitant about dating again, until she's introduced to the charming Les Harris, who has alternative motives.

name: Ice Beast
description: When a young girl goes out to search for her missing grandfather, the cold is not the only thing she has to survive. As night falls and the snow closes in, she begins to realize she is not alone and whatever is out there has been waiting.

name: Rocky's Cat-astrophe
description: After a mishap leaves a stray kitten without a home, a helpful pup offers a place to stay for the night. The unexpected guest quickly turns the evening chaotic, leading to a warm lesson about asking for help when things get overwhelming.

name: Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere
description: With rare access and few filters, a veteran documentarian steps into the online “manosphere,” spending time with controversial influencers who sell a hyper-masculine lifestyle. As they explain their views on dating, gender, and success, the film explores how attention, outrage, and performance can turn provocation into profit.

name: World of Westeros Ambient Video
description: A cozy ambient video from the Game of Thrones world.

name: Untold: Jail Blazers
description: A championship-caliber pro basketball team becomes a national story for all the wrong reasons as off-court trouble and legal issues pile up. This documentary traces how mounting pressure, controversy, and headlines fuel a rapid unraveling.

name: Sniper: No Nation
description: A pair of elite operatives head into Venezuela on a high-stakes rescue mission after their friends are taken hostage. As the situation escalates, they must rely on precision, teamwork, and quick decisions to bring everyone home safely.

name: Refuge
description: Four estranged friends reunite for a quiet fishing trip, hoping to mend old wounds. When a child goes missing and a frantic father points the finger, the getaway spirals into suspicion, fear, and a dangerous fight to survive.

name: Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition
description: With unprecedented access to the official archives and intimate recollections from the band, both current and past,  Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition invites fans to experience one of the most iconic journeys in music history.  Spanning five decades, this electrifying documentary charts the band’s rise from the pubs of East London to the world’s biggest stadiums. Featuring exclusive interviews with band members and contributors such as Javier Bardem, Lars Ulrich and Chuck D, as well as all-new animated sequences of the band's legendary mascot, Eddie, the film offers a rare and intimate look at Iron Maiden’s uncompromising vision and unwavering connection with their truly global army of fans.

name: Orangutan
description: This nature documentary takes you into the rainforest canopy of Southeast Asia to observe a lively orangutan community up close. Along the way, it follows a curious young orangutan as it approaches a major step toward independence in a jungle full of wildlife.

name: Love Is Blind: The Reunion
description: After the weddings, this reunion special brings the group back together to share where their relationships stand and confront lingering questions. Emotions run high as they revisit major moments and compare stories in a tell-all setting.

name: Snow White
description: After a beloved ruler vanishes, a jealous queen tightens her grip on a once-bright kingdom. A young princess escapes into the dark woods, where she finds unlikely allies and must stay one step ahead of a relentless hunt while hoping to reclaim what was lost.

name: Jerry West: The Logo
description: A legendary basketball figure helps build winning teams and becomes an enduring symbol of the sport, while privately struggling with relentless pressure and personal pain. Through rare interviews with loved ones and basketball voices, this documentary explores the complicated person behind the public image.

name: Finding Harry: The Craft Behind the Magic
description: This behind-the-scenes special follows the creative teams shaping a beloved fantasy book series for television, from casting to sets, costumes, and creature work. Through interviews and production footage, it highlights how key roles were chosen and how artists and technicians are rebuilding a detailed magical world for a new generation.

name: Trevor Noah: Joy in the Trenches
description: A comedian takes everyday chaos and online drama and turns it into a sharp, playful stand-up set. With quick observations and personal reflections, the show finds humor in messy moments and unexpected lessons.

name: Space/Time
description: After a deadly experiment shuts down a high-stakes project, a disgraced group of scientists turns to the criminal underworld to rebuild a forbidden engine that can bend space. As the risks grow, their work could become humanity’s last hope or trigger a global disaster.

name: The Amazing Digital Circus: The Last Act
description: With Caine gone and the circus dark, the cast are left with only the mistakes and traumas of their pasts to keep them company. As the prospect of eternity closes in around them, they discover the truth about the Digital Circus and its history.  Will they come to terms with what they uncover, or will they make… the other choice? Also, presumably at some point someone says something funny, because this ending can’t be THAT depressing, can it? A theatrical screening of episode 8 and the all new, hour-long episode 9.

name: My Husband's Other Wife
description: After losing her husband, a widow begins uncovering disturbing secrets about the life he kept hidden from her. As the truth slips further out of reach, she is pulled into a tense mystery filled with deception and danger.

name: iHeartRadio Jingle Ball 2025
description: This holiday music special brings together major artists and celebrity guests for a festive celebration filled with live performances and seasonal cheer. It is built as a feel-good event centered on pop music and holiday spirit.

name: Avatar: Fire and Ash
description: After a brutal war and a painful family loss, a Na’vi family struggles to heal while a fierce new tribe rises on Pandora. With tensions escalating between clans and outside forces, they’re pulled into a high-stakes fight that tests their bonds, beliefs, and endurance as the future of their world hangs in the balance.

name: Red Sonja
description: After a devastating tragedy, a young woman rebuilds her life through grit and combat training, rising into a feared sword-wielding legend. Set in a pulpy fantasy world, the story follows her transformation from survivor to formidable warrior as she faces escalating threats and hard choices.

name: Afterburn
description: After a massive solar flare devastates the Eastern Hemisphere, a harsh new world emerges where radiation has warped what’s left of life. A team of treasure hunters scours the ruins for priceless artifacts, but every job turns into a fight for survival against rival crews, mutants, and pirates.

name: The Brink of War
description: At the most dangerous point of the Cold War, political enemies Ronald Reagan and Mikhail Gorbachev meet in Iceland over one long, tense weekend to decide if there will be peace or war. They sit across from each other, choosing to unclench their fists and instead extend their hands — a triumph of overcoming fear, differences, egos, and consequences.

name: Ballerina
description: Set during the events of John Wick: Chapter 3 – Parabellum, a young woman is taken in by the Ruska Roma and trained in their assassin traditions. As her skills sharpen, she’s pulled deeper into a dangerous underworld where loyalty, rules, and survival collide with a personal drive for payback.

name: How to Make a Killing
description: A blue-collar outsider learns he sits far down the line for a massive family fortune and becomes determined to change those odds. This dark comedy thriller follows a risky climb through a world of privilege, greed, and increasingly messy consequences.

name: Hamilton
description: A filmed version of the hit Broadway musical follows a driven young immigrant as he rises through the American Revolution and the early days of a new nation. Told through nonstop songs blending hip-hop and classic show tunes, it mixes politics, ambition, rivalry, and personal choices into a fast-moving history lesson.

name: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
description: A veteran covert team races to stop a powerful artificial intelligence that has spread through global intelligence networks. With governments closing in and old secrets resurfacing, they chase a slim chance to shut it down before the balance of the world changes for good.

name: Final Destination Bloodlines
description: A college student is haunted by a brutal recurring nightmare and returns home searching for someone who might help stop a deadly pattern. As fear spreads through the household, the family is forced to confront the idea that fate may be closing in—and that escaping it could take more than luck and caution.

name: TRON: Ares
description: A powerful digital program crosses from a virtual world into reality on a dangerous mission, forcing humanity into its first direct encounter with artificial intelligence beings. The story mixes high-tech action with questions about what happens when a controlled digital force meets the unpredictability of the human world.

name: Den of Thieves 2: Pantera
description: A relentless American cop heads to Europe to track a skilled thief who’s gotten tangled up with dangerous diamond crews and a feared mafia group. As a plan forms to hit the world’s largest diamond exchange, shifting alliances and mounting pressure turn the job into a high-stakes game of trust and survival.

name: The Long Walk
description: In a near-future America, a group of teenage boys enter an annual walking contest where slowing down means immediate death. As the miles grind on, exhaustion and fear set in, and the walkers lean on rivalry, fragile friendships, and sheer willpower to keep moving.

name: Trap House
description: An undercover drug agent and a partner hunt a bold crew of thieves hitting a dangerous cartel. The chase turns personal when they discover the robbers are rebellious teens close to home, using insider tactics and stolen intel to stay one step ahead.

name: The Fantastic 4: First Steps
description: In a colorful, retro-futuristic world inspired by the 1960s, a famous team of heroes tries to protect Earth from a planet-devouring cosmic threat and its mysterious messenger. As the danger grows, they must juggle world-saving responsibilities with the pressures of family, trust, and tough choices.

name: Super Troopers 3
description: When Farva’s wildly over-the-top Indian engagement to Thorny’s sister spirals into chaos, the Super Troopers must navigate Thorny’s schemes to break up the relationship, while trying to crack a pernicious new drug ring  — all to save the day and maybe the wedding itself.

name: Return to Silent Hill
description: A grieving man is pulled back to a once-familiar town after receiving a mysterious letter from someone he thought he’d lost. As he searches through foggy, ruined streets, he encounters unsettling creatures and fractured memories that blur reality, testing his resolve and sanity.

name: Nightmare Hospital
description: A horror film about a pilot who is the sole survivor of the plane crash in the deep unknown. He must survive in an isolated building where something evil is waiting.

name: Bugonia
description: Two conspiracy-obsessed young men abduct a powerful company CEO, convinced she’s an alien with a plan to destroy Earth. As they try to force answers out of her, the situation turns into a tense, darkly funny standoff that pokes at paranoia, misinformation, and corporate power.

name: Cold Storage
description: A routine overnight shift at a storage facility turns into a fight for survival when a sealed biological threat breaks loose and begins spreading fast. With help from a hardened operative, two workers scramble through chaos, dark humor, and escalating danger to stop a catastrophe before it reaches the outside world.

name: Shadow Force
description: Two elite operatives who once led a secret multinational unit break the rules by starting a family and disappear to protect their child. With a bounty on their heads and their former team closing in, staying hidden becomes impossible and their fight for safety escalates into open conflict.

name: The Smashing Machine
description: In the late 1990s, a rising mixed martial arts fighter chases greatness while trying to hold his life together outside the ring. As success grows, so do the pressures of painkiller dependence and a turbulent relationship, forcing him to confront what he’s willing to sacrifice to keep going.

name: The Red Queen
description: A young software engineer ventures into a vivid journey to study a newly developed A.I. interface.

name: The Unbreakable Boy
description: A family faces unexpected challenges when they learn their young son is autistic and has a fragile-bone condition. As they adjust, they lean on growing faith and his resilient spirit, discovering joy, gratitude, and courage through difficult moments.

name: The Electric State
description: In a retro-tinged dystopian world, an orphaned teen sets out on a road trip with a mysterious robot to search for a long-lost sibling. Along the way, they join forces with a smuggler and a wisecracking companion, facing danger, action, and emotional moments as the journey unfolds.

name: Coyote vs ACME
description: After Acme products fail him one too many times in his dogged pursuit of the Roadrunner, Wile E. Coyote decides to hire a billboard lawyer to sue the Acme Corporation.

name: Heads of State
description: A UK prime minister and a US president let their very public rivalry threaten an important alliance. When a dangerous enemy targets them, they’re forced into an on-the-run, globe-hopping scramble with help from a sharp intelligence agent to stop a conspiracy with worldwide stakes.

name: Queen of Bones
description: Twin siblings seek answers about their mother's death and her connection to the supernatural while living on a remote homestead with their father in 1931 Oregon.

name: Newborn
description: After years in solitary confinement, a man steps back into the outside world hoping to rebuild his life and reconnect with family. But freedom brings new pressures, turning everyday moments into a tense psychological struggle as he tries to find stability again.

name: In the Lost Lands
description: In a harsh, haunted wasteland, a ruler hires a feared sorceress to retrieve a rare magical power. With a tough drifter as her guide, she crosses the Lost Lands and faces relentless pursuers, deadly creatures, and brutal terrain where every bargain comes with a cost.

name: Havoc
description: After a drug heist turns deadly, a worn-down cop is pulled into a city’s violent underworld and tangled corruption. With criminals closing in and pressure mounting from powerful figures, he fights through escalating chaos to track down and protect a missing politician’s son.

name: G20
description: After the G20 Summit is overtaken by terrorists, President Danielle Sutton must bring all her statecraft and military experience to defend her family and her fellow leaders.

name: The Actor
description: Paul Cole finds himself stranded in a mysterious small town with no memory of who he is or how he got here. As bits and pieces of his past slowly emerge, he attempts to find his way home, but time is slippery, appearances can't be trusted, and it's unclear which of his identities is real.

name: Captain America: Brave New World
description: A newly established hero is drawn into an international crisis after a White House meeting goes horribly wrong. As global tensions rise, he must untangle a dangerous conspiracy and stop a hidden force from pushing powerful nations toward chaos.

name: Greenland 2: Migration
description: After finding shelter in a remote bunker when a comet devastates Earth, a family is forced back into the open when safety runs out. With supplies scarce and danger everywhere, they cross a ruined Europe in search of a place to start over, testing their resolve and trust at every step.

name: Marcel et Monsieur Pagnol
description: In 1955, an acclaimed writer and filmmaker is asked to write a weekly column about his childhood, hoping it will reconnect him with his creative roots. As his memory falters and self-doubt grows after recent setbacks, a magical visit from his younger self helps him revisit formative moments and treasured encounters from across his life.

name: Wolf Man
description: A couple hoping to repair their strained relationship heads to a remote rural farmhouse for a break from city life. When an unseen creature attacks in the night, they barricade themselves inside, but fear grows as the danger outside is matched by unsettling changes within their own home.

name: The Running Man
description: A struggling father enters a nationally televised survival game after being promised a chance to save his sick child. Hunted across the real world by professional trackers and a public eager for spectacle, he must keep moving, think fast, and resist a system that profits from watching people break.

name: The Old Guard 2
description: A tight-knit group of immortal fighters returns with renewed purpose when a powerful new enemy threatens their mission to protect humanity. As they chase answers and confront the cost of their endless lives, old loyalties are tested and the stakes rise fast.

name: Wild Horse Nine
description: Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris and Lee are dispatched from Santiago to Easter Island by their bureau chief, MJ. Amongst the Island's iconic statues, and as the longtime partners wrestle with their dark pasts and present conspiracies, Chris's newfound bond with a pair of rebellious students threatens to send everyone’s trip to this remote paradise sideways.

name: Silent Night, Deadly Night
description: After a childhood trauma on Christmas Eve, a drifting man returns each December in a Santa suit to punish those he deems truly “naughty.” With only days left before the holiday, his ritual collides with an unexpected connection that tests his resolve and threatens to pull him off his grim mission.

name: Torch Song
description: An eccentric former pop singer visits her estranged half-brother and turns his life upside down when she finds a muse in his girlfriend.

name: Becoming Led Zeppelin
description: This documentary traces four musicians’ separate paths through Britain’s 1960s music scene, from early influences and small-club gigs to the moment they finally come together. Using interviews and rare archival footage, it follows their rapid rise as they shape a new sound and find an audience.

name: Desert Warrior
description: A mysterious desert rogue becomes a target of a powerful empire after helping a fugitive royal pair escape across harsh sands. As pursuit closes in, shifting alliances and hard choices test his honor, resilience, and willingness to stand up for what’s right.

name: Mayday
description: When a U.S. Navy pilot on a top-secret mission during the Cold War gets trapped behind enemy lines, his only chance at survival is to form an alliance with an eccentric ex-KGB agent.

name: The Home
description: A troubled man takes a job at a retirement home and quickly senses something is off, from unsettling behavior to disturbing dreams. As he digs deeper into the building—especially a forbidden fourth floor—he’s pulled into a mystery that seems tied to the home’s staff, residents, and his own childhood.

name: Mickey 17
description: A down-on-his-luck worker takes a job that treats him as disposable, repeatedly sending him into deadly assignments for the sake of progress. As the mission spirals into chaos, he’s forced to confront what it means to be replaceable in a system that values results over people.

name: The Invite
description: Joe and Angela’s marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

name: The Parenting
description: Two boyfriends plan a weekend getaway to introduce their parents, hoping for a calm bonding trip. Instead, their country rental turns into a chaotic pressure cooker when they realize the house is haunted by a centuries-old poltergeist, forcing everyone to face awkward family dynamics amid escalating supernatural trouble.

name: Play Dirty
description: A seasoned thief gets a chance at a massive score, but the job quickly turns into a high-stakes game against powerful enemies on multiple fronts. With a crew to manage and loyalties in question, the plan becomes a fast-moving scramble of action, humor, and shifting alliances.

name: The Shrouds
description: A grieving widower creates a controversial technology that lets people watch their loved ones’ remains from inside their graves. When several burial sites are vandalized, he’s pulled into a tense search for who’s responsible, forcing him to confront how far obsession and new tech can reshape mourning.

name: Smurfs
description: When a beloved leader is mysteriously taken by two evil wizards, a brave Smurf rallies the village for a rescue mission that spills into the real world. Along the way, they team up with unexpected allies and face magical chaos while searching for answers about who they are and what they’re meant to do.
