name: Thunderbolts*
description: Seven disillusioned outsiders are lured into a deadly setup and forced into an uneasy alliance. To survive the mission and stop a growing threat, they must rely on each other while facing painful memories, guilt, and the parts of themselves they’d rather keep buried.

name: K-Pops!
description: A down-on-his-luck musician heads to Korea hoping to write songs for K-pop stars and revive his career. When he discovers a personal connection to a rising new group, he tries to ride the wave of fame, only to find that family matters more than the spotlight.

name: Hypochondriac
description: A young potter’s life devolves into chaos as he loses function of his body while being haunted by the physical manifestation of his childhood trauma.

name: Wicked: For Good
description: As fear and propaganda spread across Oz, two former friends are pushed to face their past and their choices while a public uprising grows. With their bond under strain, they must find a way to truly understand each other and decide what kind of future they want to fight for.

name: The Gorge
description: Two elite operatives are stationed on opposite sides of a remote, heavily guarded gorge, forced to watch and wait while communicating from afar. As a dangerous presence begins to rise from below, they form a bond and must coordinate across the divide to stay alive and uncover what’s lurking within.

name: Hell of a Summer
description: A 24-year-old returning counselor arrives early for a summer camp weekend and quickly feels out of place among younger co-workers. As tensions and jokes fly, a masked killer begins targeting the staff, forcing the group to stick together and figure out how to survive the night.

name: A Minecraft Movie
description: Four everyday outsiders are whisked through a mysterious portal into a blocky, imagination-powered world where survival depends on learning new rules and thinking creatively. With help from an expert crafter, they set off on a quest through strange lands and creatures, hoping to find a way back home.

name: Fixed
description: After a pet dog learns he’s about to be neutered, he bolts for a final 24-hour blowout with his closest buddies. The result is a chaotic, raunchy, and surprisingly heartfelt misadventure that mixes crude jokes with friendship, self-worth, and a few pointed jabs at human behavior.

name: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
description: When a family crisis pulls a self-exiled gangster back to Birmingham, he’s forced to navigate divided loyalties as a dangerous wartime scheme threatens both his loved ones and the country. With old alliances fraying and new players rising, survival depends on hard choices, uneasy partnerships, and the price of legacy.

name: Borderline
description: A troubled man escapes custody and fixates on a global pop star, convinced they’re destined to be together. When he breaks into her home and takes control, the night spirals into a tense standoff that swings between dark humor and sudden violence.

name: Peter Pan's Neverland Nightmare
description: A young woman sets out to rescue her brother after he’s taken by a terrifying, corrupted version of a childhood legend. Her search pulls her into a grim world of violence and addiction, where familiar fairy-tale elements are twisted into something far more disturbing.

name: The Alto Knights
description: Two powerful organized-crime leaders in mid-century New York compete for control of the city’s streets. Once close allies, mounting jealousy and betrayals push their partnership toward open conflict, drawing in other factions and authorities as the struggle threatens to change the underworld’s balance for good.

name: In the Blink of an Eye
description: Three interconnected storylines unfold across vast stretches of time, echoing one another as they explore hope, connection, and the cycle of life. As the threads begin to align, the film invites you to reflect on what it means to care for others in a universe that keeps moving on.

name: Elio
description: A lonely, space-obsessed kid with a huge imagination is swept into a strange new alien world and suddenly faces responsibilities far bigger than expected. As a growing intergalactic crisis unfolds, they form unlikely friendships, try to find where they belong, and learn what it means to be truly seen.

name: Alexander and the Terrible, Horrible, No Good, Very Bad Road Trip
description: An 11-year-old and their family set off on a dream Spring Break trip to Mexico City, hoping for fun and connection. But after they come across a cursed idol, the vacation turns into a string of chaotic mishaps that tests their patience, teamwork, and outlook.

name: People We Meet on Vacation
description: Two longtime friends with opposite personalities make a tradition of taking one summer trip together each year. As the years and destinations add up, their easy companionship is tested by real life, and they start to wonder whether their bond has been something more all along.

name: The Conjuring: Last Rites
description: Two veteran paranormal investigators take on a final case when a family’s home becomes the center of unsettling, unexplained activity. As the disturbances grow more intense, the investigation tests their resolve, their beliefs, and what they’re willing to risk to help those in danger.

name: Eden
description: A group of outsiders leaves society behind to build a fresh start on a remote, uninhabited island. As they struggle with isolation and scarce resources, clashing goals and personalities turn their idealistic experiment into a tense fight to hold onto their fragile version of paradise.

name: The Naked Gun
description: A deadpan detective takes charge of an accident-prone police unit and races to solve a high-profile murder before the squad is shut down. As the case spirals into a larger threat, the investigation becomes a nonstop string of absurd mishaps, rapid-fire jokes, and over-the-top chaos.

name: Die My Love
description: A couple leaves New York for a remote Montana house they’ve inherited, hoping for a fresh start as they begin a family. But as isolation grows and one partner becomes increasingly absent, the other spirals into loneliness, frustration, and worsening mental strain, testing love, identity, and the pressures of new parenthood.

name: Dust Bunny
description: A young girl insists a monster under her bed has taken her family, so she turns to her mysterious neighbor for help. As danger closes in from multiple sides, the unlikely pair must navigate a strange, whimsical world where childhood fears collide with very real violence.

name: Bambi: The Reckoning
description: After a car crash on a remote road, a mother and her son find themselves stalked through the woods by a mutated deer driven by grief and rage. As the night spirals into a fight for survival, they face relentless attacks and the sense that the forest itself has turned hostile.

name: George A. Romero's Resident Evil
description: A documentary that brings to light the vision that director George A. Romero had for an adaptation of Resident Evil, using newly filmed interviews with those who were there, and unravels the secrets behind why it was never produced.

name: The Man in My Basement
description: A financially struggling homeowner agrees to rent out his basement to a mysterious stranger offering a tempting payout. As strange rules and unsettling behavior escalate, the arrangement turns into a tense psychological standoff that forces hard questions about power, guilt, and what’s buried in the past.

name: iPossessed
description: A group of celebrating friends make a pact with a demon to stay the night or someone loses their soul, only to find out the demons they are fighting might be the ones they carry inside.

name: Darkness of Man
description: After a raid goes wrong, a veteran international agent makes a promise to look after an informant’s child. Years later, that vow pulls him into a brutal turf war as rival gangs close in, forcing him to confront old guilt and push his limits to keep the family safe.

name: Fear Street: Prom Queen
description: At Shadyside High’s 1988 prom, the race for prom queen turns vicious for an underdog hoping to finally be seen. When candidates start getting picked off one by one, the night becomes a tense scramble to survive, uncover what’s happening, and make it to the final vote.

name: Bad Hombres
description: Bad Hombres tells the story of two undocumented immigrants who take a job digging a hole and then learn their employers are criminals.

name: Back in Action
description: After disappearing from a spy agency to build a quiet family life, two former operatives are forced back into the field when their hidden past is exposed. Juggling domestic responsibilities with globe-trotting missions, they try to stay one step ahead while keeping their loved ones safe.

name: War of the Worlds
description: A Homeland Security analyst monitors potential threats through a mass surveillance program, confident he can spot danger before it strikes. When a sudden attack by an unknown entity hits, he’s forced to question what he’s seeing on his screens—and whether the government is keeping the truth from him and the public.

name: The Thursday Murder Club
description: A group of retirees who love digging into old mysteries find their hobby turning serious when a fresh murder disrupts their quiet routine. As they trade clues and theories, their warmth and humor keep things light while they try to stay one step ahead of a very real investigation.

name: Bad Shabbos
description: An interfaith couple plans a Shabbat dinner where both families will meet for the first time, but a sudden fatal accident throws the evening into chaos. What follows is a fast-moving dark comedy of nerves, cultural clashes, and desperate attempts to keep dinner from completely falling apart.

name: The History of Sound
description: In 1917, two young music students at a Boston conservatory connect through a shared love of folk music. Years later, they reunite and travel through rural Maine to collect and preserve traditional songs, as their bond deepens amid the pull of duty, distance, and time.

name: Superman
description: A beloved hero in Metropolis tries to balance a public life as a journalist with the responsibility that comes with extraordinary power. As pressure mounts from a skeptical world and powerful forces working against him, he’s pushed to prove what he stands for while holding onto hope, warmth, and the people who keep him grounded.

name: Waltzing with Brando
description: An idealistic architect is pulled out of his comfortable Los Angeles life when a famous actor recruits him for an ambitious plan: creating an eco-friendly retreat on a tiny, seemingly unlivable island in Tahiti. As the project grows, the pair’s unlikely partnership is tested by big dreams, clashing personalities, and the realities of building paradise from scratch.

name: Psycho Killer
description: After her husband is murdered during a traffic stop, a highway patrol officer launches a personal hunt for the killer across the Midwest. What begins as a revenge-driven manhunt grows darker as she uncovers a brutal pattern of crimes tied to a deeply disturbed murderer.

name: Sneaks
description: Ty, a misguided, one-of-a-kind designer sneaker, doesn’t know life outside the comforts of his velvet-lined shoebox. After his sister is stolen by a shady collector, Ty must venture into New York City to find and rescue her. In his adventure, Ty meets a ragtag group of footwear friends from all walks of life who help him find the courage to step outside of his shoebox and find his sole-mate.

name: Bride Hard
description: A secret agent heads to a lavish destination wedding determined to be there for her best friend without revealing her real job. When mercenaries storm the celebration and take guests hostage, she has to stop them quietly, balancing high-stakes action with keeping the day from falling apart.

name: The Uninvited
description: Rose and Sammy enjoy an idyllic life with love, a Hollywood Hills home, and a curious son. During a party, Sammy assigns unusual significance to it, while Rose juggles preparations amid distractions.  The unexpected arrival of Helen, who claims residence there, oscillates between confusion and lucidity. Strangely, Helen possesses intimate knowledge of the house and its guests. Her revelations spark drama, unearthing hidden truths and compelling Rose to confront her past, future, and the desire for change.

name: In Vitro
description: On an isolated cattle farm, a couple experimenting with biotechnology have their lives upended when they discover a disturbing presence on their property.

name: The Amateur
description: After a devastating loss in a London attack, a brilliant but introverted intelligence analyst feels abandoned when superiors refuse to act. Pushed by grief and frustration, they decide to pursue answers alone, relying on sharp problem-solving, surveillance know-how, and improvised tactics to chase justice outside official channels.

name: Freakier Friday
description: A mom and her grown daughter are juggling the chaos of blending two families, with a new child and a soon-to-be stepchild in the mix. Just as tensions rise, a familiar magical mix-up returns, forcing everyone to walk in someone else’s shoes while they try to keep their lives from unraveling.

name: Midwinter Break
description: A retired couple takes a holiday to Amsterdam hoping for a change of pace, but the trip exposes old wounds, unmet needs, and deep differences in belief and purpose. As buried feelings rise, they are forced to question what still holds them together and what comes next.

name: The Monkey
description: Two estranged brothers are pulled back together when a mysterious wind-up monkey from their childhood resurfaces, and a string of bizarre, gruesome accidents begins again. As old family wounds reopen, they’re forced to face the unsettling toy and the chaos it brings into their lives.

name: Cleaner
description: Radical activists storm an energy company’s gala and take hundreds of hostages inside a high-rise. Suspended outside the building on a cleaning rig, an ex-soldier must improvise a rescue from the windows in, racing against time to protect those trapped inside, including a close family member.

name: Flight Risk
description: A pilot is hired to fly a law officer and a key witness from remote Alaska to a New York trial. Trapped together in a small plane over harsh wilderness, nerves fray as doubts grow and loyalties blur, turning a routine transport into a tense fight to stay in control.

name: Anniversary
description: A family’s anniversary celebration takes a tense turn when their son brings home a new girlfriend with a troubling past connection to his mother. As old resentments resurface and a provocative worldview gains influence beyond the household, the once-stable family is pulled into escalating conflict that tests loyalty, values, and trust.

name: Diablo
description: An ex-con abducts a Colombian gangster’s daughter to honor a promise made to her mother. Hunted by her powerful father, the criminal underworld, and a ruthless killer, he must fight and improvise to survive, protect the girl, and keep his word.

name: Bonjour Tristesse
description: At the height of summer, 18-year-old Cécile is relaxing by the French seaside with her father and falling in love with her new boyfriend. The arrival of her late mother's enigmatic friend turns her world upside down.

name: The Salt Path
description: After losing their home, a married couple set out on a long coastal walk with little more than basic gear and each other. As they face illness, uncertainty, and the day-to-day realities of living rough, the journey becomes a test of resilience, partnership, and hope amid striking seaside landscapes.

name: Barron's Cove
description: After a child is killed, a grieving father with a violent past takes drastic action by kidnapping the classmate he believes is responsible. As police and a well-connected family close in, the situation spirals into a tense manhunt that forces everyone involved to confront grief, guilt, and the consequences of revenge.

name: Marshmallow
description: At a secluded summer camp, a shy 12-year-old struggles to fit in as a campfire legend starts to feel frighteningly real. When danger creeps through the woods, the kids band together, pushing past fear and bullying to search for answers and uncover a darker truth hiding in plain sight.

name: Islands
description: A drifting tennis coach works at a tropical resort, spending his days teaching tourists and his nights partying. When a mysterious visitor arrives with her family, a nagging sense of familiarity turns into a tense connection—until her husband vanishes and suspicion starts closing in around the coach.

name: Materialists
description: A driven New York City matchmaker who treats dating like a set of checkboxes starts questioning what love is really worth. Pulled between a seemingly ideal new partner and an imperfect past relationship, she’s forced to weigh comfort, status, and ambition against vulnerability and genuine connection.

name: Adulthood
description: Two adult siblings return to a tense family home life and uncover a long-buried body in the basement. What starts as a shocking discovery quickly pulls them into a chaotic chain of bad decisions, crime, and escalating danger, mixing dark humor with uneasy family drama.

name: The Phoenician Scheme
description: A wealthy businessman names his only daughter, a nun, as the sole heir to his fortune. As he pushes forward with an ambitious new venture, the pair are pulled into a fast-moving scramble involving powerful rivals, political pressure, and repeated threats on his life.

name: Bring Her Back
description: After their father’s sudden death, two siblings are placed with a foster mother in a remote home, hoping to stay together until they can make a fresh start. As grief and tension build, unsettling rules and strange behavior hint that their new guardian is hiding a dangerous plan.

name: Matchbox
description: When a group of former childhood friends reconnect, their reunion takes a wild turn as they stumble upon a dangerous international plot—and must save the world.

name: Scissors
description: Courtney and her influencer friends are making a horror movie based on an urban legend.  Faced with an early start time the next day, the group decides to spend the night in a creepy, old house. But when someone puts on the costume and begins killing them one by one,  the remaining survivors must unravel the mystery of the killer’s identity and stop them before it is too late.

name: Nonnas
description: After a painful loss, a man pours his savings and hope into a new Italian restaurant, inviting real grandmothers to run the kitchen. As the doors open, the project becomes a warm, sometimes bumpy journey of community, tradition, and healing through shared meals.

name: The Pout-Pout Fish
description: A grumpy fish living in a rundown shipwreck clashes with a hyperactive young sea creature who treats the place like a junkyard, leaving both homes in ruins. Hoping to fix what they broke, they set off on a tough ocean quest to find a mythical wish-granting “Shimmer,” while a rival searcher closes in.

name: Tyler Perry's Duplicity
description: A successful attorney takes on a deeply personal murder case and, with help from a private investigator, digs into a tangled trail of lies, suspicion, and betrayal. What starts as a search for justice becomes a tense mystery shaped by grief, public outrage, and hidden motives.

name: New Fears Eve
description: Unbeknownst to the trio, their corporate obligation will soon become a fight for survival. When The Doctor targets them, the celebration descends into a blood-soaked nightmare. Trapped in Hooper Industries' towering building, Leslie, Brian, Moses, and their unsuspecting colleagues must confront a deranged killer intent on making this night unforgettable-for all the wrong reasons.

name: The Fuzzies
description: A group of childhood friends comes back together at a spooky estate after the death of someone close to them. What begins as a mourning visit turns into a terrifying fight to survive when grotesque puppets and sinister stop-motion creatures emerge from the shadows.

name: Eenie Meanie
description: A former teenage getaway driver is pulled back into the criminal world when an old contact offers a risky job that could save her chronically unreliable ex. As she navigates uneasy alliances, pressure from dangerous people, and her own complicated loyalties, the plan spirals into a tense mix of action, dark humor, and drama.

name: Honey Don't!
description: A sharp small-town private investigator starts looking into a string of strange, sudden deaths that seem to point back to a mysterious church. As the case widens, the search pulls her through uneasy encounters, oddball locals, and a trail of clues that may or may not add up.

name: Pig Hill
description: Carrie has been fascinated by the local legend of the pig people of Pig Hill, revolting creatures who breed and cause havoc in the area. As the tenth woman goes missing, Carrie can't stop thinking that there could be more to these stories.

name: Scream 7
description: A new masked killer turns a quiet town into the center of another deadly spree, forcing a longtime survivor to protect her family while confronting old trauma. The story leans on legacy connections, a parent-child bond, and a familiar race to stop the bloodshed.

name: Laws of Man
description: A pair of U.S. marshals search for a wanted murderer in Nevada at the height of the Cold War and encounter more than they bargained for.

name: The Bride!
description: In 1930s Chicago, a lonely, long-lived creation seeks help from a daring scientist to build a companion. When a murdered young woman is brought back to life, the new “bride” awakens with her own desires, pushing against expectations and setting off a strange, volatile journey through love, identity, and independence.

name: Code 3
description: A burned-out paramedic counts down his final 24 hours on the job while being forced to mentor a ride-along recruit. As call after call piles up, dark humor and raw emotion collide, revealing the pressure, exhaustion, and fragile humanity behind emergency medical work.

name: The Lemurian Candidate
description: Three old college friends reunite for a backpacking weekend on Mount Shasta, hoping to mend their friendship and support each other’s mental health. When psychedelics enter the trip, their hike veers into strange, funny, and frightening territory as reality blurs and a search for something beyond the ordinary takes over.

name: The Wrecking Crew
description: After their father’s mysterious death, two estranged half-brothers are forced back into each other’s lives and team up to dig for answers. What starts as a personal search quickly turns into a dangerous investigation, as long-buried family secrets point to a wider conspiracy that could destroy what’s left of their bond.

name: The Mannequin
description: A stylist assistant investigates her sister's death in a historic LA building, only to face a vengeful ghost of a serial killer who dismembered victims decades ago. She must escape before she's next.

name: Dune: Part Three
description: As Emperor, Paul Atreides grapples with the consequences of his rise to power as political conspiracies and a galaxy-spanning holy war threaten the future he alone can foresee.

name: Crime 101
description: A meticulous Los Angeles thief plans one last, high-stakes robbery along the 101 freeway, hoping to walk away for good. As an insurance professional at a personal crossroads gets pulled into the scheme, a relentless detective spots a pattern and closes in, turning a careful operation into a tense cat-and-mouse race.

name: Mob Cops
description: A retired NYPD detective writes a book about his family's ties to the mob, igniting a firestorm between the corrupt cops working for the city's brutal crime boss and the officers trying to bring them to justice.

name: Fackham Hall
description: A young porter arrives at a grand English estate and gets swept into a budding romance with the family’s youngest daughter. As the household scrambles to recover from a disastrous wedding and rising rivalries, a sudden scandal draws unwanted attention and throws their carefully managed lives into chaos.

name: The Bad Guys 2
description: A crew of reformed former outlaws is trying hard to live as heroes, but their fresh start is threatened when they’re pulled into a globe-trotting heist. With a new all-female criminal team and a string of suspicious crimes pointing their way, they must rely on trust, teamwork, and quick thinking to clear their name.

name: Desert Dawn
description: A newly appointed small-town sheriff and a reluctant deputy investigate the murder of a mysterious woman, only to find themselves pulled into a widening web of lies and corruption. As shady businessmen and cartel ties surface, the case becomes a dangerous test of trust, judgment, and survival.

name: Worldbreaker
description: After a rupture between realities unleashes deadly creatures onto Earth, a parent keeps a child hidden on an island and trains her to survive. As danger closes in and the wider crisis worsens, their isolated refuge no longer feels secure.

name: Guns Up
description: After a job goes wrong, a former cop living a double life as a mob enforcer has just one night to get his family out of the city. With danger closing in and time running out, he’s forced to rely on skills he hoped to leave behind to keep everyone safe.

name: Soul on Fire
description: After a terrible accident leaves a young boy badly scarred, he fights to rebuild his life and believe in his own worth. With steady support from family, community, and an unexpected act of kindness, he learns to face pain with courage and hope.

name: She Rides Shotgun
description: A newly released man is forced on the run when dangerous enemies target him, and he must protect his estranged young daughter with almost no help and nowhere safe to turn. As they scramble to survive, their bond deepens, pushing him toward redemption while she learns hard lessons about trust, courage, and love.

name: The Unholy Trinity
description: In 1870s Montana, a young man heads to a remote frontier town to carry out a promise tied to his father’s final request. Trapped by shifting alliances and local tensions, he’s pulled between the town’s new lawman and a dangerous outsider, as revenge, buried secrets, and survival collide.

name: A Working Man
description: A former black-ops soldier tries to live a quiet life as a construction worker, until someone close to his work family is abducted by human traffickers. His search to bring her home pulls him back into violence and exposes a much bigger network of crime and corruption than he expected.

name: Putin
description: A portrait of a formidable political figure, unraveling the contrasting facets of an iron-fisted tyrant and a man haunted by fear.

name: The Strangers: Chapter 3
description: After a harrowing turning point, a battered survivor finds themself pulled deeper into a masked group’s violent orbit. As the pursuit tightens around a secretive small town, the line between hunted and trapped blurs, building toward an unavoidable, unforgiving showdown.

name: The Witcher: Sirens of the Deep
description: After sailors are attacked by mysterious sea creatures, a lone monster hunter is pulled into a rising conflict between humans and the ocean’s inhabitants. As tensions mount, he must uncover what’s driving the violence and try to prevent an all-out war between land and sea.

name: Björk: Cornucopia
description: A live concert experience blends lush, psychedelic visuals with futuristic screens and vivid nature imagery, built around powerful vocals and an ensemble of musicians and choirs. It’s a theatrical, sensory-heavy show that leans into bold themes and an immersive atmosphere designed for the big screen.

name: Night of the Zoopocalypse
description: When a glowing meteor crashes into a city zoo, a strange virus begins turning animals into zombie-like threats. Two unlikely predators team up with a small group of survivors to navigate the chaos, protect their home, and try to stop the outbreak from spreading beyond the zoo walls.

name: F Marry Kill
description: Pushed onto dating apps for her 30th birthday, a true-crime fan starts juggling three new romances—just as a string of murders dominates her favorite podcast. As clues pile up, her fun new dating life turns into a tense guessing game, and she begins to suspect one of her matches may be dangerously close to the case.

name: Enola Holmes 3
description: Adventure leads detective Enola Holmes to Malta as personal and professional dreams collide on a case more perilous than any she's faced before.

name: Ella McCay
description: An idealistic young politician is suddenly pushed into top leadership and tries to turn big plans into action. As public scrutiny mounts, work pressures collide with a complicated family life, forcing her to balance ambition, relationships, and the messy realities of governing.

name: Rise of the Conqueror
description: In the 14th century, as trade routes collapse and rival factions plunge the region into chaos, a fearless warrior returns from exile with nothing left. Driven by strategy and sheer will, he battles to unite fractured kingdoms and forge a new empire—earning a reputation as both a brilliant leader and a ruthless conqueror.

name: Neighborhood Watch
description: After believing he witnessed a woman being taken, a young man with serious mental health struggles is dismissed by police and left doubting his own senses. With nowhere else to turn, he teams up with his bitter, retired neighbor to investigate, forming an uneasy partnership as they chase answers through a tense, everyday neighborhood.

name: Violent Ends
description: A man raised in a violent crime family tries to build a quiet future away from that world. After a reckless robbery leaves an innocent person caught in the middle, he is forced back into the life he has long wanted to escape.

name: Kinda Pregnant
description: After a long-held plan to start a family falls apart, a woman makes a desperate choice: she wears a fake baby bump and tells a lie to fit in. As the ruse grows, she gets pulled into awkward situations, unexpected friendships, and a romance that forces her to face what she really wants.

name: Evil Dead Burn
description: After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

name: Karate Kid: Legends
description: After a family tragedy, a young martial arts prodigy moves from Beijing to New York with his mother and struggles to fit in. When someone close to him needs help, he enters a karate tournament and discovers that talent isn’t enough, pushing him to train harder and blend different fighting styles for a high-stakes showdown.

name: Fight or Flight
description: A hired fighter boards a plane to track down a target, expecting a straightforward job. When it becomes clear they’re trapped among passengers who want them both dead, the mission shifts into a tense fight to survive and keep the target alive.

name: Stitch Head
description: Stitch Head was the first creature brought to 'almost life' by mad professor Erasmus. In the years since, he’s become nursemaid to the master’s ever-growing menagerie of neglected creatures, tasked with teaching them to suppress their 'inner monster' and hide out in the castle — away from prying eyes and itchy pitchfork fingers, of the village mob in the valley below. But when grubby circus impresario Fulbert Freakfinder arrives offering Stitch Head a starring role in his freak show, our hero is tempted by the promise of love and acceptance.

name: The Cut
description: A retired boxer gets a surprise chance at one last title run, but first must drop a dangerous amount of weight in days. Locked in a Las Vegas room with a ruthless trainer, the pressure mounts as an extreme, illegal cutting plan pushes body and mind to the edge.

name: London Calling
description: After a job goes wrong, a struggling hitman flees the UK and lands under a new crime boss. To earn a way back home, he’s tasked with babysitting the boss’s awkward teenage son and dragging him along on dangerous errands, forcing an unlikely bond to form amid action and dark humor.

name: Simple Minds: Everything Is Possible
description: This documentary follows a Scottish band’s rise from working-class roots in post-industrial Glasgow to global fame, fueled by a defining ’80s anthem and major live performances. Along the way, it traces the friendships, setbacks, and comebacks that shaped their long-running career and ongoing tours.

name: Vampires of the Velvet Lounge
description: In present-day Savannah, a hidden group of vampires tries to survive in a modern world by preying on people they meet online, while a determined hunter closes in. The story mixes nightclub excess, dark humor, and a violent clash with a dangerous foe.

name: Pretty Thing
description: A high-powered executive tries to keep life on track when a younger lover’s fixation turns into a dangerous obsession. As the pressure mounts, they’re forced to protect their career, reputation, and safety before things spiral further.

name: Screamboat
description: A late-night ferry ride in New York City turns into a frantic fight for survival when a mischievous mouse becomes a real, monstrous threat. Trapped on the water with nowhere to run, a mixed group of passengers and crew must endure chaos, dark humor, and escalating danger as the night spirals out of control.

name: Klara and the Sun
description: Klara, an Artificial Friend designed to prevent loneliness, is purchased by a mother and her bright teen daughter, Josie. Josie, who suffers from a mysterious illness, adores her new robot companion. On a quest to save Josie and those who love her from heartbreak, Klara learns the power of human love.

name: Love Hurts
description: A successful realtor is forced back into a dangerous former life when an old associate resurfaces with a threatening message. With a powerful family figure closing in, he’s pushed to confront unfinished business, old loyalties, and the past he tried to bury for good.

name: Five Nights at Freddy's 2
description: A year after a terrifying incident at a family pizza spot, the town turns the rumors into a festival, while the real truth stays buried. When a child sneaks out to reconnect with the familiar animatronics, it sparks a new wave of supernatural danger and a search for where the nightmare truly began.

name: 28 Years Later
description: Decades after a deadly outbreak, Britain is still cut off from the world and a small island community clings to safety. When a child ventures to the mainland, the trip becomes a harsh rite of passage that exposes new dangers, changed survivors, and a desperate search for help in a country that has evolved in unsettling ways.

name: No Address
description: A group of individuals who unexpectedly fall into homelessness. They bond together as an unconventional family, struggling to survive on the streets while warding off a harassing gang, an unforgiving community, and local authorities.

name: Until Dawn
description: A year after a loved one vanishes, a young woman and her friends return to a remote valley to search for answers. Inside an abandoned visitor center, they’re hunted through a brutal night—only to find the terror resets, forcing them to relive the same evening and try again.

name: Pinocchio Unstrung
description: We follow James as his grandfather, Geppetto, introduces him to a seemingly magical doll to become best friends. However, unaware of Pinocchio's naïve nature, as James introduces him to the world it results in the doll going on a crusade to eliminate all things “bad.”

name: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu
description: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.

name: Black Bag
description: A respected intelligence agent is asked to investigate a dangerous leak, only to learn that suspicion has fallen on their spouse. As colleagues trade coded conversations and shifting loyalties, the couple must navigate secrets, trust, and professional duty while trying to uncover who is really playing both sides.

name: Wormtown
description: A year into a plague of flesh-eating, mind-altering worms, a small Ohio town has fallen under a cult-like rule that spreads by persuasion or force. Three uninfected women try to stay alive through scavenging, strict hygiene, and staying out of sight, but the pressure of the new order pushes everyone toward desperate choices.

name: Fear Below
description: A rough-around-the-edges group of divers heads into a river to recover a sunken car, but the job turns into a fight for survival when an unusually aggressive bull shark starts hunting them. The setup stays focused on underwater danger and escalating pressure.

name: Sinners
description: Two twin brothers return to their hometown hoping for a clean start and a new venture, but old tensions and fresh temptations quickly surface. As the night unfolds, their plans collide with a sinister supernatural presence that threatens the whole community.

name: Dead of Winter
description: A grieving widow traveling alone across a frozen, remote stretch of northern Minnesota stumbles into a kidnapping and chooses to intervene. With no phone service and miles of wilderness in every direction, she must rely on grit and quick thinking to keep herself alive and give the captive teen a chance.

name: Mercy
description: In a near-future justice system run by an AI judge, a detective is accused of killing his wife and given just 90 minutes to clear his name. Trapped in a high-pressure hearing, he must sift through surveillance and digital records while the system’s rigid logic closes in on a life-or-death verdict.

name: Birthrite
description: When a pregnant woman is bequeathed a home from an estranged aunt, she and her girlfriend leave the city behind to begin new chapter. But when a karmic debt threatens the life of their unborn child, they soon discover their place in the cursed history of the town.

name: Anaconda
description: A group of longtime friends dealing with midlife doubts heads into the rainforest to remake a beloved movie from their youth on a tiny budget. Their nostalgic passion project quickly turns chaotic when real danger closes in, forcing them to juggle survival, clashing agendas, and a very large predator.

name: Jurassic World Rebirth
description: Five years after the last major dinosaur crisis, a covert team is hired for a secret mission to collect genetic material from three enormous prehistoric creatures. When their operation collides with a stranded civilian family, everyone ends up trapped on a remote island, forced to survive dangerous wildlife and uncover a long-hidden, unsettling secret.

name: Everyone Is Going to Die
description: On his daughter's birthday, a wealthy father's reconciliation attempt is hijacked by two female burglars. A shakedown evolves into a lethal cat-and-mouse as hidden motives emerge, culminating in a life-altering revelation.

name: The Lost Bus
description: As a fast-moving wildfire tears through a dry, windblown town, a struggling bus driver volunteers for a dangerous rescue mission to reach a teacher and stranded students. With roads closing and panic spreading, the group must navigate smoke, chaos, and difficult choices to find a way out.

name: One Battle After Another
description: A former radical lives off the grid with his teenage daughter, trying to stay out of sight while wrestling with paranoia and the fallout of old choices. When a long-dormant enemy resurfaces and she disappears, he’s forced back into a dangerous world of pursuit, alliances, and hard questions about family, loyalty, and what fighting for a cause really costs.

name: Sally
description: This documentary follows a pioneering astronaut whose historic achievement opened doors while intense public scrutiny shaped her life. Alongside the space milestone, it explores a long-hidden relationship and the personal cost of staying private in a hostile era.

name: Warfare
description: A team of Navy SEALs takes up a position in a civilian neighborhood in Ramadi, Iraq, trying to support a larger operation while staying alert in tense, uncertain conditions. When the situation erupts, they’re forced to rely on training, communication, and each other as the mission becomes a relentless fight to endure.

name: The Dreadful
description: Set in medieval England, this gloomy gothic tale follows an isolated woman and her harsh mother-in-law as they scrape by on the edge of society. When someone from the past returns from war, old tensions rise and a strange curse begins to close in around them.

name: Steve
description: Over one intense day at a last-chance reform school, a devoted head teacher tries to keep volatile students safe and focused while a visiting TV crew and officials scrutinize the institution’s future. As tensions rise, the staff’s compassion is tested by chaos, burnout, and the heavy cost of care.

name: The Vortex
description: In 1980 Las Vegas, a Native Paiute cleaning lady enters a slots room at the MGM Grand Casino, setting off a chain of strange and unexplained events. Meanwhile, in-house comic Pete plays shrink to a host of colorful misfits while dodging mobsters and collectors. Struggling with a gambling addiction, he faces a life-altering decision that may determine his fate.

name: Zootopia 2
description: Two rookie cops take on a new mystery when a surprising newcomer throws their animal metropolis into chaos. To solve the case, they go undercover in unfamiliar corners of the city, where pressure from above and rising suspicion put their teamwork—and trust—to the test.

name: Z-O-M-B-I-E-S 4: Dawn of the Vampires
description: A summer road trip takes an unexpected turn when two teens end up counseling at a camp caught between rival supernatural groups. As tensions rise, they try to help both sides find common ground and work together, especially when a bigger danger threatens everyone.

name: The Demon Detective
description: A professional exorcist takes on a new client after encountering a demonic presence that seems tied to a troubled past. As the case deepens, the investigation blurs the line between personal history and supernatural danger.

name: Ballistic
description: A mother working at an ammunition manufacturer is shattered by the loss of her son in war. When she learns a product tied to her own workplace played a role, grief turns into anger and she sets out on a dangerous path seeking answers and revenge.

name: Sharp Corner
description: After moving into a new home, a devoted family man witnesses repeated crashes on the dangerous bend outside his front window. Determined to help before emergency crews arrive, he throws himself into preparing for the next incident, and the fixation begins to strain his job, his relationships, and his sense of purpose.

name: Stans
description: This documentary takes an edgy, personal look at superfandom by exploring how a world-famous rapper’s music and public life have shaped a group of intensely devoted fans. Through interviews and archival moments, it traces the pull of admiration, identity, and obsession, showing how inspiration can blur into something more complicated.

name: Savage House
description: In 18th-century England, a wealthy couple chase the promise of a better life as a widespread pox outbreak and political unrest close in. Their grand home becomes a pressure cooker of duels, decadence, and escalating violence that tests how far they’ll go to protect their future.

name: The Woman in the Yard
description: After losing her husband, a widowed mother tries to hold her family together in an isolated rural home while coping with grief and a painful injury. When a silent woman in black appears in the yard and slowly draws closer, the household’s fear grows and long-buried truths begin to surface.

name: Caught Stealing
description: A burned-out former athlete trying to keep his life together in late-1990s New York gets pulled into a dangerous criminal mess after a seemingly small favor. Suddenly out of their depth, they’re forced to dodge violent threats, suspicious strangers, and the law while scrambling to survive the city’s unforgiving underworld.

name: Madea's Destination Wedding
description: A loud, lovable family heads to the Bahamas for a whirlwind destination wedding, but the trip quickly turns into a messy mix of arguments, misunderstandings, and over-the-top moments. As the celebrations ramp up, old habits and big personalities collide, testing everyone’s patience while they try to keep the wedding on track.

name: Drop
description: A widowed single mother finally agrees to a first date at an upscale restaurant, hoping for a fresh start. As the night unfolds, anonymous messages begin hitting her phone, turning a promising evening into a tense guessing game where every nearby stranger could be involved and she can’t be sure who to trust.

name: Playdate
description: An out-of-work accountant expects a relaxed playdate with another dad and their kids, but the afternoon spirals into chaos when dangerous mercenaries show up. Completely unprepared, he’s forced to scramble through a string of ridiculous, high-energy obstacles just to make it out in one piece.

name: La Dolce Villa
description: When a father rushes to Italy to stop his daughter from buying a rundown Tuscan villa, he gets pulled into village life instead. As the renovation unfolds, he reconnects with family, discovers unexpected romance, and starts rethinking what success and happiness really mean.

name: Alarum
description: Two married spies living off the grid try to enjoy a quiet winter resort retreat, but their cover is blown when an international intelligence network closes in. Suspected of joining a rogue spy team, they’re forced back into survival mode, fighting to secure a critical asset before old enemies catch up.

name: Vicious
description: After a woman receives a mysterious box with a strict rule—she must place inside something she needs, something she hates, and something she loves—her life quickly spirals into escalating threats. With each demand, the box’s influence grows more dangerous, forcing her into painful choices before it destroys everything connected to her.

name: Night Always Comes
description: With eviction looming in a city her family can no longer afford, a woman races through one long night trying to scrape together $25,000. Each lead pulls her deeper into risky choices, testing how far she’ll go when time, money, and options are running out.

name: Merv
description: After a breakup, a couple tries an awkward co-parenting plan for their beloved dog, who seems to lose his spark. A Florida getaway meant to cheer the pup up turns complicated when the other owner shows up unexpectedly, forcing them to navigate old feelings, miscommunication, and the messy work of moving on—or reconnecting.

name: OnlyFangs
description: A wannabe monster hunter gets pulled into an uneasy partnership with a ruthless crew of vampire women. Together they build a new app that turns their targets into paying customers, mixing nightlife seduction, dark humor, and bloody consequences as the hustle grows beyond anyone’s control.

name: Oh. What. Fun.
description: A devoted mom who keeps her chaotic family’s holiday running smoothly is finally pushed too far when a planned outing goes wrong and she’s left behind. Feeling taken for granted, she heads out on a spur-of-the-moment Christmas adventure while her family scrambles to track her down and rethink what they’ve been missing.

name: Bad Man
description: In a small Tennessee town, a local lawman tries to confront a growing meth problem just as a celebrated undercover agent takes over the spotlight. As doubts build and loyalties are tested, the case turns into a murky crime story full of tension and mistrust.

name: The Roses
description: A seemingly perfect couple with thriving careers and a happy family starts to unravel when their professional fortunes flip. As one partner’s success rises and the other’s confidence crumbles, everyday slights turn into a tense rivalry, exposing long-buried resentment and testing what’s left of their relationship.

name: The Life List
description: After her mother’s death, a young woman is asked to finish a bucket list she wrote as a teenager before she can receive what she expected. The challenge pushes her into new experiences, unexpected connections, and hard conversations, helping her rethink love, family, and what she truly wants from life.

name: Primitive War
description: In the middle of the Vietnam War, a recon team is sent into a remote jungle valley to find out what happened to a missing unit. What starts as a search mission quickly becomes a brutal fight to survive as they’re hunted by prehistoric dinosaurs and forced to push through chaos, fear, and relentless attacks.

name: Charlie the Wonderdog
description: A shy 9-year-old and his beloved family dog are thrown into an out-of-this-world adventure when the dog is abducted by aliens and comes back with surprising new abilities. Together, they race to stop a nearby pet with a dangerous plan that could put everyone at risk.

name: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
description: In a ravaged world, a doctor’s unsettling new bond and risky experiments hint at a way to reshape humanity’s future. Elsewhere, a young survivor is trapped inside a violent cult, where a terrifying encounter turns into a relentless ordeal that won’t let go.

name: Swiped
description: A driven young woman fights to break into a male-dominated tech world, helping build a groundbreaking dating app while facing workplace hostility and public pressure. As the stakes rise, she must decide how to protect her voice, her future, and her vision in an industry that doesn’t make it easy.

name: War Machine
description: During a brutal Army Ranger training mission, a combat engineer and the rest of the unit are dropped into a deadly survival fight when they come face to face with a massive alien war machine. What starts as a test quickly becomes a desperate battle to stay alive.

name: Happy Gilmore 2
description: A retired golf hothead is pulled back onto the course when family responsibilities demand quick cash. With old rivalries, new distractions, and plenty of familiar chaos, the comeback becomes a messy mix of heartfelt motivation, nostalgia, and over-the-top comedy.

name: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
description: A kid-friendly road trip turns into a big-city adventure when a beloved dollhouse goes missing in a colorful urban world. To set things right, the journey moves beyond playtime and into the real world, where teamwork, imagination, and growing up all come into focus.

name: The Occupant
description: A woman takes a risky job in a remote mountain wilderness to help her family, but a crash leaves her stranded in brutal conditions. With only a mysterious voice on the radio to guide her, she pushes onward as exhaustion and fear blur the line between what’s real and what isn’t.

name: Way of the Warrior Kid
description: Jake is an injured Navy SEAL who becomes a mentor for his shy, struggling nephew Marc. Using the principles of his military training, Jake teaches Marc how to be a Warrior Kid as he enters high school.

name: Stolen Girl
description: After a young child is taken out of the country by a parent, her mother spends years chasing leads that go nowhere. When she crosses paths with a specialist who recovers internationally abducted children, she agrees to work with him, risking everything for a chance to bring her family back together.

name: One of Them Days
description: Two best friends and roommates wake up to a financial disaster when their rent money vanishes, leaving them hours away from eviction. With time running out, they scramble across the city through a string of chaotic, funny misadventures, testing their patience and pushing them to extremes while trying to protect their home and their bond.

name: Dangerous Animals
description: A free-spirited surfer is kidnapped by a shark-obsessed killer and trapped on his boat out at sea. With danger closing in and no one to trust, she must rely on nerve and quick thinking to find a way out before he turns her into bait.

name: The Death of Robin Hood
description: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.

name: The Carpenter's Son
description: In a remote village in Roman-era Egypt, a carpenter, his wife, and their child become targets of unsettling supernatural forces. As fear and faith collide, the family struggles to survive a growing spiritual conflict that tests their bonds and their sense of destiny.

name: Control Freak
description: A high-profile motivational speaker develops a relentless itch that starts to disrupt her work and home life. As she searches for answers, she’s pulled toward unresolved family history and beliefs tied to her heritage, raising unsettling questions about whether she’s facing a psychological break or something truly supernatural.

name: Stone Cold Fox
description: In an ’80s-set revenge tale, a determined young woman escapes an abusive commune to find her family. When a ruthless queenpin kidnaps her little sister and a crooked cop closes in, she’s forced to go back undercover and infiltrate the very place she fled.

name: Dora and the Search for Sol Dorado
description: A young explorer and her friends set off into the Amazon rainforest to track down a legendary treasure before it falls into the wrong hands. Along the way, they face jungle dangers, puzzles, and rival seekers, leaning on teamwork and optimism to keep the adventure moving.

name: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
description: A high-society scandal and mounting money troubles put a grand estate’s reputation on shaky ground. As old traditions clash with a changing world, both the family and the staff must adapt, making room for new roles and a new generation to carry the household forward.

name: Mutiny
description: After witnessing his billionaire boss' murder and being framed for the crime, Cole Reed boards a cargo ship on a one-man crusade to avenge his boss' death only to discover an international conspiracy.

name: Keeper
description: A couple heads to a secluded cabin for a romantic anniversary getaway, but the trip is cut short when one of them is suddenly called back to the city. Left alone in the woods, the other begins to experience unsettling visions and eerie encounters that hint at something ancient and deeply wrong with the place.

name: The Sheriff
description: A small-town sheriff investigates a fresh murder and finds unsettling links to a personal tragedy that has haunted him for years. As the case deepens, grief, suspicion, and buried history push him toward answers that may reopen old wounds.

name: The Luckiest Man in America
description: In 1984, an out-of-work man lands a spot on a hit TV game show with a method that lets him rack up astonishing winnings. As his streak grows, the people running the show grow suspicious and scramble behind the scenes to figure out what’s really going on.

name: Shelter
description: A man living alone on a remote island rescues an injured young girl during a violent storm. When people connected to his past come looking, he’s forced back into the world he tried to leave behind, taking the girl to the mainland and fighting to keep her safe.

name: Thrash
description: After a Category 5 hurricane tears through a coastal town, rising floodwaters turn streets into deadly channels. As survivors scramble for shelter and supplies, a new threat arrives with the storm surge: hungry sharks hunting in the chaos.

name: BFFs
description: Two best friends keep trying to outdo each other with practical jokes, turning their friendship into a nonstop prank war. As the stunts escalate, the fun starts to blur into real consequences and they’re forced to reckon with how far is too far.

name: The Woman in Cabin 10
description: While on assignment aboard a lavish yacht, a journalist believes she witnesses a passenger fall overboard. When the crew and guests dismiss her account, she digs deeper, putting herself in danger as she tries to prove what happened and uncover the truth.

name: Rosario
description: After a sudden family death, a high-powered professional returns to an old apartment to sort through personal belongings. What begins as a tense night of grief turns into a supernatural ordeal when hidden occult objects and long-buried family secrets begin to surface.

name: Solo Mio
description: After being left at the altar, a heartbroken groom decides to take his planned honeymoon through Italy on his own. As he dives into the country’s food, culture, and stunning sights, unexpected connections and new experiences help him find laughter, perspective, and a chance to move forward.

name: My Fault: London
description: An 18-year-old relocates from America to London with a parent and a new, wealthy partner, trying to fit into an unfamiliar life. Over one intense summer, a risky attraction grows with her new household’s rebellious son, while unresolved troubles from her past begin to resurface.

name: Gunslingers
description: A notorious outlaw resurfaces in a small Kentucky town hoping for a fresh start, but his past quickly catches up when a vengeful posse arrives chasing a bounty. With loyalties tested and old grudges reignited, the streets erupt into relentless gunfights as the town fights to survive the chaos.

name: The Death That Awaits
description: A drifter searching for answers to a mystery from her past takes on a job looking after a sick teen who is undergoing a mysterious transformation her family will do anything to stop.

name: Toy Story 5
description: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.

name: The Perfect Gamble
description: After getting out of prison, two gamblers team up to run an illegal casino, chasing quick money and a fresh start. Their risky plan draws the attention of the mafia, and the pressure spills into their personal lives, pulling a loved one into the crossfire.

name: Hybrid Hazards: Revelation
description: Megan Florentino, a woman whose life is shattered after a scientific experiment gone wrong infects her with gene-splicing DNA, transforming her into a wolf-like Hybrid. Struggling to control her dangerous nature, Megan and her daughter, Lacy, live on the run, never staying in one place long enough to build a stable life. Lacy, burdened by the chaos of their existence, yearns for normalcy and eventually leaves in search of a better future. When Megan learns of a potential cure, she embarks on a desperate quest to reclaim her humanity and repair her fractured relationship with her daughter. But to achieve this, she must face unimaginable challenges, including betrayal, danger, and even conflict with her own kind.

name: Inheritance
description: After a family loss, a young woman discovers her estranged father has a hidden past tied to espionage. Pulled into a fast-moving international conspiracy, she becomes a target and must improvise her way across multiple countries while deciding who, if anyone, she can trust.

name: The Rip
description: After a team of Miami cops finds millions of dollars hidden in a rundown stash house, suspicion spreads fast. As pressure mounts, loyalties crack and every decision raises new doubts about who can be trusted—and what lines they’re willing to cross for a life-changing score.

name: Darbie's Scream House
description: Darbie is quite deadly and especially when you mess with her boyfriend.

name: A Breed Apart
description: When Violet accepts an invitation to a private island with some of the world's most famous social influencers, she expects a weekend of unrivaled viral opportunity. She soon becomes part of her own horrific reality show when the guests are pitted against each other to capture the island's legendary man-eating dogs before they become victims of the monstrous canines.

name: Heart Eyes
description: On Valentine’s Day in Seattle, a masked killer who targets couples turns the city into a panic. When two co-workers working late are mistaken for a couple, they’re forced into an all-night scramble to stay alive while trying to figure out who they can trust.

name: Animal Friends
description: Two fugitive animals embark on an adventure across America to find the ranch that was once their home, healing their friendship while pursued by an equally "odd-couple" DEA agent and Fish and Wildlife ranger with something to prove.

name: My Oxford Year
description: An ambitious American heads to Oxford to chase a long-held dream, only to have her carefully planned future complicated by an unexpected romance. As the year unfolds, she’s pulled between ambition, new friendships, and a relationship with someone who’s keeping a life-changing secret.

name: Jaws @ 50: The Definitive Inside Story
description: This authorized documentary looks back at the movie that changed Hollywood, using rare archival footage and interviews with filmmakers, shark experts, and conservationists. It explores the turbulent production, the cultural impact that helped define the modern summer blockbuster, and the lasting influence on how people think about sharks today.

name: Murder at the Embassy
description: Set in 1934 Cairo, this period mystery follows a private investigator looking into a killing inside the British Embassy after a secret document disappears. With the building sealed and every guest or staff member under suspicion, the case mixes diplomatic danger with a classic whodunit setup.

name: F1
description: A retired racing veteran returns to help a struggling Formula 1 team, taking on the pressure of high-stakes competition while guiding a talented but inexperienced teammate. As the season heats up, the team must balance ambition, risk, and teamwork for a shot at long-awaited success.

name: Minions & Monsters
description: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

name: Man with No Past
description: Waking up in an unfamiliar city, a man with no memory must confront the mysteries of his own identity. However, his desperate search to uncover the past pits him against a powerful enemy, leading to a showdown that ultimately reveals the truth.

name: The Map That Leads to You
description: A young woman sets off on a post-graduation trip across Europe with friends, expecting to return to a carefully planned future. A chance encounter turns into a sweeping romance that pushes her to live more in the moment, even as hidden truths and tough choices challenge what she thought she wanted.

name: Preparation for the Next Life
description: A young immigrant trying to survive in New York’s hidden restaurant world crosses paths with a recently returned veteran struggling to rebuild his life. As their bond deepens, both begin to imagine a future beyond loneliness, hardship, and the paths they thought were already set for them.

name: Pressure
description: In the tense 72 hours before D-Day, and the fate of the free world hanging in the balance, General Dwight D. Eisenhower and Captain James Stagg face an impossible choice—launch the largest and most dangerous seaborne invasion in history or risk losing the war altogether.

name: Apex
description: A woman seeking escape on a solo trip into the Australian wilderness finds herself hunted by someone who turns the remote landscape into a deadly game. To survive, she must rely on grit, instinct, and the harsh terrain around her.

name: T Bird
description: A homeless streetfighter breaks up a child trafficking ring

name: Hostile Takeover
description: A professional hitman tries to keep his life on track by attending a self-help group, but his crime boss starts to suspect disloyalty. Soon, a wave of rival assassins closes in, forcing him to fight his way through mounting pressure, uneasy alliances, and a mix of danger and offbeat humor.

name: The Assessment
description: In a climate-ravaged future, a privileged society tightly controls who gets to become a parent. When a couple applies, a government evaluator moves into their home for a week of intrusive questions and unsettling tests, forcing them to prove their stability, values, and relationship under constant scrutiny.

name: All of You
description: Two longtime friends begin to question whether their bond has always been something more. When a near-future matchmaking test and other relationships complicate their lives, they face difficult choices about commitment, honesty, and what they truly want from love.

name: The Wrong Paris
description: A hopeful contestant signs up for a dating show expecting Paris, France, but ends up in Paris, Texas instead. Ready to leave and salvage her plans, she starts to reconsider when an unexpected connection grows with the show’s rugged bachelor.

name: Paradise Records
description: A struggling record store owner fights to keep his shop open with a quirky, tight-knit staff as everyday setbacks pile up. Along the way, the crew leans on humor, friendship, and music-fueled chaos to get through another unpredictable day behind the counter.

name: Champagne Problems
description: A driven American executive heads to Paris with a tight holiday deadline to secure a deal for a struggling champagne house. As rival bidders circle and festive pressure builds, an unexpected connection with someone close to the business complicates her plans and priorities.

name: Saipan
description: Set during Ireland’s troubled build-up to the 2002 World Cup, this drama follows a fierce clash between a team captain and the national manager at a chaotic training camp. As poor preparation and rising frustration boil over, questions of leadership, pride and professionalism take center stage.

name: Red Riding
description: After a family tragedy, a teenager leaves London for her estranged grandmother’s remote Scottish estate. As she uncovers unsettling secrets tied to missing children and a terrifying wolf, reality begins to feel unstable and survival becomes her main goal.

name: Addition
description: A Melbourne mathematician finds comfort in a compulsive need to count and repeat numbers, using it to bring order to a chaotic, sometimes tragic world. As she tries to keep life feeling “normal” with her family, she also leans on an unusual confidante who helps her face everyday challenges.

name: Regretting You
description: After a sudden family tragedy, a mother and her teenage daughter struggle to reconnect while grief and unanswered questions strain their bond. As new relationships and buried truths complicate their lives, they’re forced to face painful choices, rebuild trust, and figure out what love and family mean now.

name: Frozen: The Hit Broadway Musical
description: A young royal sets out to find love during a long-awaited coronation, but a sudden crisis plunges the kingdom into an endless winter. Joined by an unlikely group of companions, the journey becomes a race to restore warmth and hope while learning what courage, friendship, family, and true love really mean.

name: Sarah's Oil
description: In early 20th-century Oklahoma Indian Territory, a young Black girl believes there’s oil beneath the seemingly worthless land she’s been allotted. When the discovery draws greedy opportunists, she leans on her community and unlikely allies to protect her rights and hold onto what’s hers.

name: One Mile: Chapter Two
description: A former special forces operative is pulled back to a remote island when a violent, secretive group abducts his daughter in revenge. With the community anticipating his moves, he launches a relentless search that turns into a tense fight for survival and control.

name: Prisoner of War
description: During World War II, a captured British pilot is sent to a harsh prison camp where survival means enduring brutal hand-to-hand fights staged by his captors. Drawing on years of martial arts training, he resists intimidation, forms uneasy bonds with fellow prisoners, and looks for a chance to outlast the camp’s cruelty.

name: Echo Valley
description: A grieving mother living in isolation is jolted when her troubled adult child arrives in panic, covered in someone else’s blood. As pressure mounts from dangerous people and hard choices, she’s pulled into a spiraling situation that tests her limits, her judgment, and how far she’ll go to protect family.

name: Remarkably Bright Creatures
description: A lonely elderly widow named Tova forms an unlikely friendship with a curmudgeonly cephalopod octopus named Marcellus, but unbeknownst to her, Marcellus is on a mission to solve a mystery that will heal the widow’s heart and lead her to a life-changing discovery.

name: Splitsville
description: After a sudden request for divorce, a kindhearted spouse turns to close friends for comfort and advice. He’s stunned to learn their relationship thrives on an open arrangement—until he gets pulled into their rules and missteps, sparking a chain of messy misunderstandings, jealousy, and escalating chaos.

name: A Great Awakening
description: In the American colonies’ most uncertain days, an unexpected friendship between a fiery preacher and a practical publisher helps spark a sweeping spiritual movement. As public speeches about faith and liberty spread, the growing unrest turns into a unifying call that aims to steady a nation on the edge.

name: When We Went MAD!
description: This historical documentary celebrates the legacy and lasting influence of a legendary satire magazine through interviews with celebrity fans and the creators behind it. It looks back on the publication’s impact, spotlighting the artists, writers, and editors affectionately known as “The Usual Gang of Idiots.”

name: Untitled Home Invasion Romance
description: During a romantic getaway meant to repair a strained relationship, a desperate actor takes an extreme gamble. He arranges a staged break-in to jolt the weekend into something unforgettable, but the plan quickly tests trust and boundaries.

name: The Life of Chuck
description: As the world seems to be unraveling, strange messages thanking an unknown man appear everywhere, pushing ordinary people to wonder what it all means. The story then moves backward through one life, tracing how love, grief, and everyday choices shape a person, with dance and quiet connections threading the moments together.

name: House on Eden
description: A trio of paranormal investigators heads to a remote abandoned house for what seems like another ghost-hunting stop, but the night quickly turns dangerous. As strange events build and people start vanishing, they realize they may be dealing with something far older and more hostile than expected.

name: 100 Nights of Hero
description: In a remote castle ruled by strict expectations, a young bride faces pressure from her marriage as a charismatic guest upsets the fragile balance in the household. To hold the situation at bay, a devoted maid turns to storytelling, weaving a fantasy-infused battle of desire, power, and survival.

name: The Family Plan 2
description: A former assassin just wants a calm Christmas with the kids, but a family trip to London turns into a hectic getaway when an unexpected enemy puts everyone in danger. As the vacation unravels, the family has to stick together through chases, close calls, and plenty of holiday chaos.

name: The Penguin Lessons
description: In 1976, an English teacher arrives at a prestigious boarding school near Buenos Aires as the country grows increasingly unstable. After rescuing an oil-covered penguin, he’s pulled into an unlikely bond that softens his hardened outlook and nudges him toward compassion amid rising tension around him.

name: Dog Man
description: After an accident on the job, a police officer and his loyal dog are combined into one new hero who’s determined to protect the city. While trying to prove himself at the station, he faces a crafty cat villain whose over-the-top schemes keep slipping out of the law’s grasp, leading to chaotic chases and surprisingly sweet moments.

name: Marked Men: Rule + Shaw
description: A rule-following student and a rebellious tattoo artist cross a line after years of tension, forcing them to confront their differences and complicated baggage. As feelings deepen, they have to decide whether their opposite worlds can meet without tearing them apart.

name: Piglet
description: A birthday camping trip turns into a fight for survival when a brutal pig-masked killer starts hunting a group of friends in the woods. As fear spreads and the body count rises, hidden links to the nightmare push the survivors into a desperate struggle to make it out alive.

name: Reminders of Him
description: After returning home to rebuild her life, a young mother fights to reconnect with the daughter she’s never been allowed to know. When a local bar owner with ties to the child offers unexpected understanding, a fragile bond grows—bringing comfort, complications, and a hard-earned chance at forgiveness.

name: Take A Friend
description: On the last night before college graduation, a student sets out to film every moment as a personal record. As the night spirals into unexpected chaos, he must decide whether to keep the camera rolling or put it down and truly be present.

name: The Gates
description: A road trip takes a terrifying turn when three friends witness a killing inside a gated community. With exits cut off and residents turning on them, they must stick together under pressure as suspicion spreads and a powerful local figure tightens the net.

name: The Carman Family Deaths
description: After a young man is rescued at sea following a family fishing trip, the incident sparks intense suspicion and a wider investigation. As questions mount around two deaths in a wealthy New England family, the story follows the accusations, shifting theories, and the long shadow cast over everyone involved.

name: Lost Joy
description: Jane's getaway with her partner to the woods goes south when a stranger arrives and questions the integrity of their relationship.

name: The Housemaid
description: A woman trying to leave her past behind takes a live-in housekeeping job for a wealthy couple, hoping for a fresh start. Inside the gated home, shifting loyalties and hidden motives turn the “dream job” into a tense, seductive power struggle filled with secrets, scandal, and escalating danger.

name: Macbeth
description: A bold, high-concept staging of Shakespeare’s tragedy, filmed live at London’s Donmar Warehouse. This modern interpretation leans into a chilling atmosphere while exploring ambition, guilt, and the story’s psychological undercurrents with unusual sensitivity and emotional weight.

name: The Chosen: Last Supper
description: Jesus rides into the holy city as king, but finds His Father’s house has been turned from a place of prayer into a corrupt market. As the Jewish High Priest schemes against the would-be Messiah, Jesus strikes first—turning the tables on religious corruption.

name: Off the Grid
description: A brilliant scientist disappears into remote country after a corrupt company tries to turn a breakthrough invention into a weapon. As armed pursuers close in, the hunt becomes a tense survival game where brains, preparation, and the landscape become his best defense.

name: Twisted
description: Two young scammers make easy money by leasing upscale New York apartments they do not own to unsuspecting renters. Their scheme starts to unravel when one property owner turns the situation around, pulling them into a much darker and more dangerous game.

name: Frontier Crucible
description: In 1870s Arizona Territory, a desperately needed wagon full of medical supplies falls victim to an Apache attack. The only man who can guide it through is Merrick Beckford, but in order to get there, he’ll need to enlist the help of a trio of dangerous outlaws hellbent on survival. When they accidentally kill an Apache scout, all bets are off, and survival is the name of the game.

name: The Last Supper
description: In the days leading to betrayal, a gathering of disciples unravels into a web of secrets and hidden motives. As tensions simmer beneath the surface, trust is tested, and loyalty is questioned. The Last Supper becomes a night where nothing is as it seems, and every glance hides a deeper truth.

name: Rule Breakers
description: In a country where girls’ education is treated as defiance, a determined mentor helps a group of students learn new skills and build bold inventions. As their achievements gain international attention, they face mounting pressure at home, forcing them to rely on teamwork, courage, and hard choices to keep moving forward.

name: In Whose Name?
description: Filmed over six years, this documentary offers unusually close access to a world-famous, deeply polarizing artist as he navigates public controversy and private moments. It follows the push and pull between creativity, faith, ambition, and personal struggles, inviting viewers to sit with contradictions rather than easy answers.

name: Protector
description: A former war hero is pulled back into violence when her daughter is kidnapped, forcing her into the criminal underworld. With law enforcement and the military closing in, she races against time, relying on hard-earned skills and sheer determination to bring her child home.

name: Rosemead
description: A seriously ill mother discovers her teenage son’s disturbing violent fixations just as time and options begin to run out. Inspired by true events, this family drama follows her desperate struggle to protect him while weighing the possible danger to others.

name: Tornado
description: After a traveling puppet show is attacked by a ruthless gang, a young performer steals their stolen gold and goes on the run through a harsh rural landscape. With pursuers closing in and loyalties shifting, the chase becomes a test of survival, resolve, and the fight to shape a future on their own terms.

name: Hurry Up Tomorrow
