description: A sleepless musician spirals through a disorienting night when a mysterious stranger draws him into an intense, surreal journey. As the lines blur between performance, obsession, and self-reflection, he’s forced to confront what fame and pressure are doing to his sense of reality.

name: The Pickup
description: Two mismatched armored-truck drivers set out on a routine cash pickup, only to be ambushed and pulled into a high-stakes heist. With a clever criminal calling the shots and pressure mounting fast, the pair must survive a chaotic chase and figure out how to get out of a situation that keeps spiraling.

name: Riff Raff
description: A retired hitman is trying to enjoy a quiet holiday season when unexpected family members show up at his door. Their sudden arrival pulls him back toward a dangerous past, as old criminal connections close in and threaten his hard-won peace.

name: Eddington
description: In May 2020, a small New Mexico town is pushed to the edge when a public standoff between local law enforcement and city leadership ignites growing mistrust. As pandemic fears, political pressure, and social unrest collide, everyday disagreements escalate and neighbors turn on one another, testing the community’s sense of order and common sense.

name: You're Cordially Invited
description: Two wedding parties arrive to find their ceremonies accidentally booked for the same day at the same venue. With space tight and emotions high, the families scramble to protect their big moments, turning compromises into a chaotic competition full of escalating antics and hard-headed determination.

name: Hellfire
description: A lone drifter arrives in a small town where residents live in fear under a ruthless crime boss and his crew. With trouble closing in and the community pushed to the edge, the newcomer decides to step in and fight back, even as questions linger about his past.

name: Novocaine
description: A mild-mannered bank worker who can’t feel pain is forced out of his careful routine when someone he cares about is taken during a robbery. With the police unsure of his role, he throws himself into a frantic, increasingly dangerous chase, relying on grit, luck, and a strange advantage that keeps him moving.

name: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
description: When an international covert mission unravels a deadly conspiracy, Ryan is forced back into the world of espionage to confront a rogue black-ops unit.

name: Predator: Badlands
description: Cast out from his clan, a young alien hunter teams up with a damaged android and heads to a deadly planet where survival is never guaranteed. With hostile wildlife, rival interests, and a near-impossible target ahead, the journey becomes a relentless test of endurance, instincts, and uneasy cooperation.

name: Balls Up
description: Two marketing executives land a daring World Cup sponsorship deal for a full-coverage condom brand. After a drunken celebration abroad ignites an international scandal, they scramble to dodge angry fans, criminals, and ruthless officials while trying to save their jobs and get home safely.

name: Maintenance Required
description: An independent owner of an all-women mechanic shop faces a new corporate competitor moving in across the street. Looking for support, she opens up to an anonymous online confidant, not realizing the person on the other side is tied to the rivalry, and their growing connection puts both her business and her heart on the line.

name: Juliet & Romeo
description: In medieval Verona, two young lovers defy their feuding worlds as a familiar legend is reshaped with a fresh perspective and modern English. This bold retelling swaps classic verse for contemporary pop songs, aiming to bring the romance, rivalry, and high-stakes choices to life with big energy and a new twist on tradition.

name: Broke
description: A rodeo rider facing the decline of his career gets trapped in a brutal blizzard while struggling with a serious head injury. As he fights to endure the storm, he looks back on the choices, pressures, and relationships that made his dreams feel farther away.

name: Sidelined: The QB and Me
description: A determined high school dancer is set on earning a spot at an elite dance program tied to her late mother’s legacy, until an unexpected connection with the school’s star quarterback complicates her plans. As both face family pressure, grief, and big ambitions, they must figure out whether love and dreams can coexist without either one getting pushed aside.

name: Lifeline
description: A late-night suicide hotline operator receives a disturbing call from someone claiming to be him, knowing personal details only he would know. The caller threatens to end his life within the hour, forcing the operator into a tense, emotional race against time. As the clock ticks down, he must confront his deepest fears and uncover the truth before it’s too late to save “himself.”

name: Moana
description: Prompted by a summons from the ocean, Moana departs her home island of Motunui for the first time and travels past its barrier reef. Accompanied by the demigod Maui, she undertakes a voyage aimed at recovering the well-being of her community.

name: Witchboard
description: After a young couple relocates to New Orleans to start a new chapter, they uncover an old spirit board with a dangerous history. Using it awakens dark forces that blur trust and reality, pulling them into a terrifying spiral of possession, deception, and escalating supernatural threats.

name: Wish You Were Here
description: Charlotte finds herself in a rut, searching for a spark that seems just out of reach. After she has a whirlwind night of romance and imagining a future with a man named Adam, he ghosts her. When Charlotte finally discovers that Adam is terminally ill, she helps him spend his last days living life to the fullest.

name: Into the Deep
description: A group of divers heads out to search for sunken treasure, but their trip turns into a fight for survival when they cross paths with violent criminals and modern-day pirates. Trapped in dangerous waters, they’re forced back into the depths while a relentless great white circles, making every dive a high-stakes gamble.

name: The Stranger in My Home
description: A family’s seemingly perfect life is shaken when a stranger claims their teenage daughter was switched at birth. As doubt and suspicion spread, the situation spirals into a tense domestic thriller filled with secrets, emotional fallout, and escalating danger.

name: Ice Road: Vengeance
description: A grieving traveler heads to Nepal to honor a loved one’s memory, but a dangerous journey through high mountain roads turns into a fight for survival. Trapped on a crowded tour bus, they and a local guide must outlast armed attackers while trying to protect fellow passengers and nearby communities.

name: HIM
description: After a serious head injury threatens a rising football star’s future, he accepts an offer to train with a legendary champion at an isolated compound. As the intense regimen ramps up, the mentor’s charm gives way to unsettling mind games, strange rituals, and escalating pressure to sacrifice everything for greatness.

name: Popeye's Revenge
description: A group of young adults heads to a remote lakeside property to renovate it into a summer camp attraction, only to find the place is tied to a grim local legend. As fog rolls in and tensions rise, an unseen threat begins stalking the grounds, turning their weekend project into a fight to make it out alive.

name: Bloat
description: After a near-death drowning accident, a young boy's family is horrified to discover he has become possessed by a legendary demon from the depths of the lake. As the family races against time to save the boy's soul, the evil monster inside the child tears the family apart as it seeks to destroy everyone in its path.

name: Altered
description: In an alternate present where genetically enhanced people hold power, two outcasts push back against a society built on inequality. As corrupt leaders exploit the divide, they risk everything to expose the system and fight for a fairer future in a tense, dystopian world.

name: Last Breath
description: During a routine deep-sea maintenance job in rough conditions, a team of saturation divers faces a sudden emergency that leaves one of their own stranded far below the surface. With time running out and the sea working against them, the crew must coordinate a high-stakes rescue while battling fear, pressure, and the limits of their equipment.

name: Companion
description: A weekend getaway at a secluded lakeside estate turns tense when a group of friends realizes their trip is tangled up in secrets, deception, and unsettling high-tech tools. As trust breaks down and control becomes the real battleground, the situation spirals into a darkly funny, increasingly dangerous fight for autonomy.

name: Hoppers
description: A young nature lover joins a secret experiment that lets people “hop” their minds into lifelike robotic animals. Using this strange new way to move through the wild, she tries to protect a threatened local habitat and uncover what’s really happening among the creatures who live there.

name: Uppercut
description: A hardened former boxing champion agrees to train a determined young fighter, and their mismatched partnership turns into an unlikely alliance. Through tough sparring and hard-earned lessons, the trainee learns that real strength isn’t just about winning fights, but about facing setbacks and pushing forward when life hits hardest.

name: Nobody 2
description: A former killer tries to give his family a throwback getaway at a small-town theme park, hoping for a quiet break. When a run-in with local corruption escalates, the trip turns into a chaotic fight for survival against a crooked lawman, a shady operator, and a powerful crime figure.

name: Wardriver
description: A hacker who targets banks tries to keep his code-based crimes from hurting ordinary people, but being noticed changes everything. As the stolen money draws dangerous attention, he’s pulled into a tense situation with a woman who could be his way out—or his biggest threat.

name: In Your Dreams
description: Two siblings dive into the wildly absurd world of their own dreams, hoping to find the Sandman and wish for a “perfect” family. As they navigate surreal, funny, and sometimes tense dream logic, they’re pushed to face real-life change and what it means to stick together.

name: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
description: A widowed single mum tries to steady family life while leaning on friends and a familiar ex. Back at work and trying dating apps, she’s pulled between a charming younger admirer and a connection closer to home, all while juggling grief, parenting pressures, and the hope of feeling like herself again.

name: M3GAN 2.0
description: When the technology behind a notorious AI doll is stolen and turned into a military weapon, its creator decides the only way to stop the damage is to bring the original back. With new upgrades and a new mission, the revived AI becomes a risky ally in a high-stakes fight over who controls the future of the tech.

name: Do Not Enter
description: A group of young explorers breaks into an abandoned hotel to investigate its mysteries, but their search quickly turns dangerous when they face an unsettling supernatural presence. With another crew also hunting for a rumored hidden treasure, tensions rise as the night becomes a fight to survive and escape.

name: Christmas Karma
description: In contemporary London, miserly British-Indian businessman Eshan Sood is compelled by three ghosts to reflect on his life and to consider the needs of those around him.

name: Trust
description: After a public scandal, a famous actress hides out in a remote rental to escape the spotlight. Her attempt at a quiet reset turns into a fight for control when dangerous intruders arrive looking for an easy payoff, forcing her to rely on quick thinking to survive.

name: KPop Demon Hunters
description: A chart-topping K-pop girl group lives a double life, using secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats. Between high-energy performances and dangerous battles, they’re pushed to face personal doubts, lean on friendship, and keep the show going when the stakes rise.

name: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
description: Two single strangers meet at a wedding and, after an unexpected turn, end up sharing a strange road trip guided by an unusual device. As they pass through surreal doorways into meaningful moments from their pasts, humor and heartache mix, pushing them to rethink who they are now and what they want next.

name: The Sound
description: A group of climbers embarks on a dangerous climb that has been off-limits for years. What initially begins as an audacious expedition transforms into a battle for survival against a force that toys with them.

name: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
description: Eager to prove he’s brave, an overly optimistic sea sponge joins a mysterious ghost pirate on a risky voyage into the deepest parts of the ocean. Along the way, he faces strange creatures and a string of challenges, testing his confidence, loyalty, and what it really means to be a “big guy.”

name: The Twits
description: When a pair of nasty villains try to pull a scheme that would let them control their town, two brave kids join forces with a family of magical animals to stop them. Along the way, they face gross-out tricks, goofy obstacles, and a big push to protect the creatures in danger.

name: Exit Protocol
description: A veteran assassin known for taking out other killers decides he wants to leave the job behind. When the people he once targeted become unexpected allies, the pair must work together to stay ahead of relentless pursuers and find a way out alive.

name: Re-Election
description: A 40-something underdog gets a rare do-over by returning to high school, determined to rewrite old regrets and finally win a class president election. As the campaign heats up, he clashes with modern teen life and learns hard lessons about empathy, growing up, and what leadership really means.

name: Girls Like Girls
description: Coley, 17, from rural Oregon, navigates intimacy after her mother's passing. Meeting Sonya sparks new feelings, but self-doubt hinders their connection. Sonya, unfamiliar with dating girls, is uncertain. They learn to embrace emotions.

name: One Mile: Chapter One
description: After leaving prison, a father hopes a college road trip will help repair his bond with his teenage daughter. Their uneasy reunion turns into a fight for survival when a violent cult targets them in the wilderness.

name: Joe's College Road Trip
description: A loud, unfiltered older relative takes a sheltered, college-bound teen on a cross-country road trip meant to toughen him up and broaden his view of the world. Along the way, the chaotic detours mix raunchy comedy with moments that touch on culture, history, and a generational gap.

name: Backrooms
description: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

name: East of Wall
description: After losing her husband, a tough, independent horse trainer struggles to keep her ranch afloat in the Badlands while carrying heavy grief. As she takes in a group of at-risk teenagers and tries to hold her makeshift family together, an unexpected business opportunity forces her to weigh survival, trust, and what home really means.

name: Like Father Like Son
description: Eli is a young man whose father waits on death row for the crime of murder in the first degree. As Eli’s life begins to fall apart, he discovers similar terrifying triggers in himself and takes extreme measures to ensure that the family’s string of savagery comes to an end.

name: Turbulence
description: A young married couple takes a hot air balloon trip over Italy’s Dolomites to reconnect and reset their strained relationship. When the pilot allows an unexpected extra passenger aboard, the peaceful getaway turns into a tense fight for control and survival high above the mountains.

name: Bight
description: Two couples test the boundaries of an open relationship during an intimate night that quickly turns tense. As old resentments surface and trust erodes, the evening becomes a pressure cooker of jealousy, manipulation, and emotional fallout that leaves everyone questioning what they really want.

name: High Rollers
description: A seasoned thief is forced into a high-stakes casino job after someone close to him is taken as leverage. With rival criminals closing in and law enforcement on his trail, the crew must plan a risky score where every move could cost them everything.

name: Salvable
description: A worn-down boxer struggles to hold onto work, self-respect, and a fractured family life. When an old associate draws him toward risky, illegal fights and shady opportunities, he must decide how far he’ll go to rebuild his future and protect what matters most.

name: City Wide Fever
description: A young film student uncovers a USB archive about a forgotten Italian horror director and starts looking into his disappearance. The deeper she digs, the more her search begins to mirror the kind of violent conspiracies found in the movies she loves.

name: A Merry Little Ex-Mas
description: A recently separated couple tries to pull off one last picture-perfect Christmas with their kids before the divorce is final and the house is sold. The plan quickly goes off the rails when the ex unexpectedly arrives with a younger new partner, turning family traditions into a messy, funny holiday showdown.

name: Valiant One
description: With tensions between North and South Korea, a US helicopter crashes on the North side. The survivors must work together to protect a civilian tech specialist and find their way out without the help of US military support.

name: Henry Danger: The Movie
description: A young hero teams up with a devoted fan and an old friend after a reality-hopping device throws everything into chaos. With alternate worlds opening around them, they race through a fast-moving adventure to find a way back before getting trapped for good.

name: Xeno
description: After an alien crashes in the desert, a lonely teenager forms a powerful bond with the creature and tries to keep it safe. With authorities closing in and trouble at home, the friendship becomes a fight for survival that could affect more than just their small world.

name: Sherlock Holmes Mare of the Night
description: A horrifyingly fresh look at the iconic detective that delves into his worst nightmares that haunt him about one case he could never solve.

name: Melodrive
description: After separating from his wife due to an emotional affair, a homeward bound musician goes on a road trip, but after bumping into his high school sweetheart, his feelings become even more off balance.

name: Sniper: The Last Stand
description: An elite team is sent to a volatile region to stop an arms dealer from unleashing a dangerous new weapon. With time and ammunition running low, the mission turns into a relentless fight for survival, while a seasoned marksman must adapt to leading others and mentoring a rookie under pressure.

name: Killer Whale
description: Two best friends on a getaway end up trapped in a remote lagoon, cut off from help and forced to survive in open water. As a dangerous killer whale stalks the area, their friendship and nerves are tested while they search for a way out.

name: Melania
description: With rare behind-the-scenes access, this film follows a public figure during the 20 days leading up to a presidential inauguration. It tracks preparations, high-level meetings, and family moments as she manages the pressures of a major transition and steps back into the spotlight.

name: Pie To Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
description: After a local performer is found murdered, a small-town baker is pulled into the investigation when her mother’s reputation is threatened by a long-running rivalry. As clues pile up around the theater community, she juggles work, family drama, and a budding romance while trying to clear the air and find the truth.

name: The Land That Time Forgot
description: Present-day survivors of a sunken naval vessel capture a Russian sub, only to find themselves stranded on an island filled with deadly, prehistoric creatures

name: The Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Yarn Maker
description: A former big-city criminologist returns to her Texas hometown to teach at the local university and run a community arts shop. When a wealthy yarn-company heiress is found dead during a special event, a small-town circle of amateur sleuths teams up with local law enforcement to untangle family rivalries and protect the future of a major business.

name: Passenger
description: After a young couple witnesses a gruesome highway accident, they soon realize they did not leave the crash scene alone, as a demonic presence called the Passenger that won't stop until it claims them both turns their van life adventure into a nightmare.

name: The Bad Guys: Little Lies and Alibis
description: A group of former criminals do their best to get to their parole interview on time.

name: The Royal We
description: After her sister runs off with a commoner, a princess who’s been living a normal life is called back to the palace to take her place in an arranged marriage with a prince from a neighboring kingdom. As she adjusts to royal expectations, she tries to bring a more genuine, modern spirit to the match and the duties behind it.

name: Silent Zone
description: In a world overrun by the undead, a resourceful teenager and her protector push forward through constant danger, trying to stay alive without losing their humanity. As threats close in from every side, their bond is tested by hard choices, fragile trust, and the stubborn need to keep hoping.

name: The Reluctant Royal
description: A working-class mechanic from Philadelphia gets an unexpected shock when he learns his estranged father is a duke. Thrown into an unfamiliar world of tradition and expectations, he tries to find his place while navigating family tensions, culture clash, and a growing connection with a sharp, capable advisor.

name: A Very Jonas Christmas Movie
description: Three brothers race from London to New York to make it home for Christmas, but a string of travel mishaps and unexpected detours keeps piling up. Along the way, they’re pushed to reconnect, laugh at themselves, and remember what the holiday is really about.

name: Betray: Thirst
description: Jamal Wiggins is a lawyer at Tate and Wiggins, the law firm he co-founded with his college roommate and friend, Darren Tate. While he enjoys professional success, his personal life is strained by a sexless marriage to Shavonne, his wife of 15 years. He takes on a case representing Jada Campbell, whose husband was involved in a life-altering accident. Jada, a victim of verbal and emotional abuse from her husband, develops feelings for Jamal. He, in turn, succumbs to temptation and crosses a professional boundary, soon realizing his world may be on the verge of collapse.

name: STRAW
description: A hardworking single mother has a devastatingly bad day that keeps getting worse, pushing her past her limits. As pressure mounts and misunderstandings spiral, she’s forced into a desperate choice that draws intense attention and raises tough questions about survival and how quickly people are judged.

name: Sidelined 2: Intercepted
description: A young football standout and an ambitious dancer try to hold onto their relationship while facing setbacks, distance, and big decisions about their futures. As pressure builds, both are pushed to rethink what they want and who they are becoming.

name: Being Eddie
description: A comedy icon looks back on a remarkable rise from teenage stand-up to global stardom, mixing laughs with candid reflection. Along the way, the film revisits early breakthroughs, family influences, and the pressures of fame, offering a personal snapshot of success, setbacks, and what matters most now.

name: Diabolic
description: A woman desperate for a miracle cure is drawn into a secluded faith community, only to find herself haunted by a cursed witch’s spirit. As fear and pressure close in, she must fight to keep control of her own life before the evil presence can take hold.

name: Relationship Goals
description: A driven TV producer in New York sets her sights on a historic promotion to run a top morning show, only to find her ex competing for the same job. As work pressures rise and old feelings resurface, she tries to stay focused while rethinking what she wants from love and ambition.

name: Run
description: When Melissa leaves her fiancé Andre at the altar, her best friends convince her to go to a Cabin in the woods on a much needed “Girls Trip” to get her mind off things. But things take a huge turn when their friend Jenny is found mutilated in the middle of the woods. When the news announces an all out Alien attack on the Nation, the girls will now have to try their best to survive.

name: High Ground
description: A quiet border town is thrown into chaos when a mysterious prisoner is brought into the local jail. As outside forces close in, the sheriff and the community must hold their ground, testing loyalties, courage, and how far they’ll go to protect one another.

name: Goodbye June
description: Over the holidays, four adult siblings are pulled back together when their mother’s health suddenly worsens. As they gather at the hospital, old tensions flare, loyalties shift, and the family tries to support one another while facing an uncertain goodbye.

name: Preschool
description: Two dads become obsessed with getting their children into a highly sought-after preschool, turning a simple application into a ridiculous rivalry. As the competition escalates into increasingly over-the-top stunts, the families are forced to confront what they’re really prioritizing.

name: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
description: This documentary examines Japan’s struggle during a nuclear disaster that unfolded in the wake of a devastating earthquake and tsunami. It looks at the scale of the crisis, the human response, and the wider questions raised about preparedness, responsibility, and the risks of powerful technology.

name: Mega Blood Moon: The Freelancer
description: After arriving early to an empty workplace on his last day of work, a Freelancer discovers that he may not be alone. Under the light of the mysterious Mega Blood Moon, he'll find out that his last day is going to be a fight... to the death.

name: The Twister: Caught in the Storm
description: This documentary revisits the devastating 2011 tornado that tore through Joplin, Missouri, using firsthand accounts and raw footage from locals and security cameras. It focuses on what it felt like in the moment and how ordinary people endured the chaos, fear, and aftermath of a sudden natural disaster.

name: Tinsel Town
description: A faded Hollywood action star gets roped into performing in a small English town’s Christmas pantomime. Surrounded by energetic locals, a no-nonsense dance teacher, and complicated family ties, he’s pushed out of his comfort zone and starts to rediscover warmth, community, and a bit of seasonal magic.

name: The Breadwinner
description: When a major business opportunity takes a mother away for an extended trip, her partner suddenly becomes the full-time caregiver at home. As a first-time stay-at-home dad, he must juggle parenting, household duties, and the pressure of keeping the family steady during a big transition.

name: Matthew Perry: A Hollywood Tragedy
description: The story of Matthew Perry's rise to fame is interwoven with the harrowing story of his final days, as his assistant allegedly sought ketamine from sources the U.S. Attorney claims "should have known better." We hear from some of Perry's collaborators, Hollywood insiders, and law enforcement in telling this tragic Hollywood story.

name: Muzzle: City of Wolves
description: An LAPD officer tries to keep life calm with family and a retired police dog, but a violent gang attack shatters that peace. With a new K-9 partner at his side, he throws himself into a hard-charging hunt for justice, fighting to keep those he loves safe.

name: My Secret Santa
description: A struggling single parent loses a job right before the holidays and takes an unusual gig at a snowy ski resort to make ends meet and support a child’s big dream. A convincing disguise leads to mix-ups, close calls, and unexpected sparks with someone tied to the resort’s future.

name: Ouija: A New Beginning
description: Molly Price is a woman on the run, but when her oldest daughter finds a Ouija board and attempts to communicate with her deceased father, she invites the spirit of an ancient witch into her soul and puts the entire family at risk.

name: Con Mum
description: A chef’s world is thrown into chaos when a glamorous, globe-trotting woman suddenly claims to be his long-lost mother. This true-crime documentary follows the shocking claims, the mounting requests, and the emotional fallout as he and those around him try to figure out what’s real.

name: Rob1n
description: When a robotics expert channels the grief of losing his 11 year-old son into building 'Robin', a fully functioning robotic doll, a series of horrific events makes it clear Robin will do whatever it takes to have his creator all to himself.

name: Catalyst
description: Seven men are abducted and held by mysterious masked captors. As the mystery behind their captivity unfolds, they must decide their path: choose one of them to die, or take the leap of faith there may be another way out to save them all.

name: The Accused
description: When a brilliant plant geneticist is framed for her fiance's murder, she must go on the run, relying on her intelligence and physical prowess to expose the truth and clear her name before time runs out

name: Say Less
description: A weekend home alone turns messy when teen siblings make clashing romantic plans under the same roof. Hurt feelings, rivalry, and last-minute invitations push a simple night into awkward chaos, forcing them to face family tension and their own insecurities.

name: Moses the Black
description: A feared Chicago gang leader returns home after prison, pulled between revenge, street power, and the weight of his choices. As pressure mounts from rivals and the law, a faith-rooted message of repentance challenges him to face consequences and consider whether real change is possible.

name: Suky
description: In this grim and unforgiving environment, Suky discovers a glimmer of hope, a brutal underground fight club that promises freedom to the strongest. With nothing to lose and revenge fueling his every move, Suky must fight not only for his life but for a chance to reclaim his freedom.

name: The Highest Stakes
description: Five strangers gather at a luxurious hotel for an exclusive, high-stakes poker game. As the night wears on, rising tension and buried secrets turn the competition into a dangerous test where trust is fragile and every decision could mean the difference between safety and disaster.

name: Dark Frequency
description: A traumatic home environment leads to 16-year-old Mary being placed in a residential treatment center for troubled teens, only to find herself haunted by dark forces that reveal chilling secrets about her past and the sinister truth behind the facility.

name: Wildcat
description: A former black-ops crew reunites for a high-risk heist when their leader’s young child is in danger. As the plan unfolds, old loyalties and hard choices collide with a gritty criminal underworld, pushing the team to rely on skills they hoped to leave behind.

name: National Theatre Live: Inter Alia
description: A high-achieving Crown Court judge balances a demanding career with a lively home life, including a love of karaoke and a close-knit family. When a sudden event threatens to upend everything, they must fight to keep their personal and professional worlds from falling apart.

name: Pets
description: This documentary travels around the world to explore the bond between people and the animals they care for, from household pets to rescued and rehabilitated creatures. Through interviews, archival moments, and viral clips, it captures the joy, challenges, and everyday quirks that come with sharing life with animals.

name: Don’t Peek
description: A professional YouTubing couple - whose career is starting to fray their marriage - grapples with how to leverage the discovery that the previous owner of their new home was not only a serial killer who taped his crimes but also believed his victims were haunting him.

name: The Knight of the Sorrowful Figure
description: Don Quixote and Sancho Panza set forth on their quest in search of honor, chivalry, and legacy.

name: You, Me & Tuscany
description: During a destination wedding on Italy’s coast, a free-spirited American chef and a reserved British lawyer are thrown together. As their whirlwind romance grows, they must navigate clashing personalities, wedding chaos, and what they truly want once the trip ends.

name: Two Sleepy People
description: Two coworkers try a new line of melatonin gummies and soon find themselves returning to the same shared dream night after night. As the strange routine repeats, the dream space becomes a place for humor, awkward honesty, and heartfelt conversations that push them to reflect on what they’re carrying in waking life.

name: Air Force Elite: Thunderbirds
description: This documentary follows an elite Air Force demonstration team through a demanding training season, showing the skill, trust, and discipline needed to perform at the highest level. Alongside the flying, it highlights the pressure, teamwork, and personal sacrifices behind the public spectacle.

name: I Can Only Imagine 2
description: After a hit song turns a band’s frontman into a major success, the pressure of life on the road starts straining his family and exposing old wounds. A new touring partner brings humor, perspective, and hard truths that push everyone toward gratitude, healing, and what matters most.

name: Making Megaforce
description: A devoted fan sets out to make a documentary about a famously failed 1980s action movie, hoping to prove it deserves a second look. As he interviews cast and crew and reconnects with a childhood hero, the project spirals into a funny, heartfelt celebration of fandom, friendship, and over-the-top stunts.

name: The Confession
description: After returning to her childhood home, a woman finds a tape left by her late father confessing to a murder linked to a sinister force. When her young son begins acting in deeply unsettling ways, she races to uncover the truth and protect her family.

name: Crazy Texas
description: Amidst the festive spirit of Christmas in a small Texas town, two sisters find themselves embroiled in a dangerous struggle to safeguard their family wealth and deeply held religious convictions.

name: Behind the Curtain: Stranger Things: The First Shadow
description: This behind-the-scenes documentary follows the cast and crew of an award-winning live stage show that expands a familiar small-town supernatural universe. It offers a look at how the production comes together, from performances to creative collaboration, as the team brings the story to the stage.

name: Clika
description: An ambitious small-town musician chases a breakthrough after a performance clip goes viral. As he pushes to claim a spot in a rising Mexican-American music scene, new opportunities bring pressure, tough choices, and a risky situation that’s more dangerous than he expected.

name: Untold: The Fall of Favre
description: This eye-opening documentary delves into Brett Favre's controversial career, the dark side of sports stardom, and the scandals that marred his legacy.

name: A Deadly American Marriage
description: This true-crime documentary revisits a fatal domestic dispute that ends with a husband dead and two family members claiming self-defense. Using interviews and evidence presented from opposing perspectives, it asks viewers to weigh conflicting accounts, questions of motive, and what the available recordings and testimony do—or don’t—prove.

name: Infiltrate
description: In a crime-ridden city, a government agent is pushed into an impossible choice when a loved one is kidnapped and she’s blackmailed into targeting powerful criminals. As she goes deeper into the underworld, her drive for justice exposes widespread corruption and forces a life-changing decision.

name: Trainwreck: The Astroworld Tragedy
description: Through firsthand accounts from survivors, emergency responders, and festival staff, this documentary revisits a deadly crowd disaster at a major music festival and traces how confusion, poor planning, and delayed decisions escalated the danger. It also looks at the aftermath and the ongoing questions around responsibility and safety at large events.

name: Bone Hill
description: A psychiatrist tries to save a young female patient whose psychoses might hold the key to ending an ancient evil.

name: The Last GunFight
description: ​In a ruthless underground tournament, the world's top assassins fight to the death. But hidden among them is a rogue crew with its own deadly agenda: infiltrate the competition, survive the bloodbath, and take down the mastermind pulling the strings.

name: Marcie's
description: Marcie has a dream: to own Ed's Tavern, where she's bartender and den mother to a devoted small-town community. But when a developer sets his sights on Ed's wooded land, Marcie's future is upended. As she rallies her people, she finds that an endangered bird may hold the key to preventing the loss of the tavern and saving her community.

name: Trainwreck: The Real Project X
description: This documentary looks at how a teen birthday invitation accidentally spreads online and turns a quiet Dutch town into a night of confusion, partying, and damage. It follows the fallout while exploring crowd behavior, online sharing, and questions about who should have stepped in sooner.

name: The Mortuary Assistant
description: A new mortuary assistant takes a night shift expecting routine embalming and paperwork, but the quiet halls soon feel wrong. As strange signs mount and fear creeps in, the job turns into a tense fight to keep control and make it through the night.

name: A Loud House Christmas Movie: Naughty or Nice
description: Trying to get off Santa’s naughty list before Christmas, a determined kid hacks the North Pole’s system and accidentally throws the whole holiday into chaos. With the naughty and nice lists reversed worldwide, the family heads north to undo the damage and save Christmas.

name: A Gunfighter's Deal
description: A troubled man is approached by a mysterious stranger who offers to shape him into the fast-draw legend he’s always dreamed of becoming. As the promise of power and recognition grows, so do the moral questions, manipulation, and consequences that come with chasing a name in the Old West.

name: Affinity
description: A troubled former special-operations soldier is trying to live quietly while battling trauma when a mysterious woman enters his life with no memory of her past. After she suddenly vanishes, he is pulled back into brutal danger and a wider conspiracy to bring her back.

name: Bigfoot: Blood on the Farm
description: " Bigfoot Blood on the Farm " is a tense, heart-pounding thriller about family, survival, and the terrifying unknown that lurks in the shadows of the woods. Two sisters find themselves alone on their rural farm, facing an unimaginable terror. " Bigfoot ". With the farm isolated and no one else around to help, the sisters must quickly shift from surviving farm life to surviving the fight of their lives.

name: Snoopy Presents: A Summer Musical
description: A group of kids heads to summer camp, where songs and camp spirit are everywhere. A skeptical newcomer starts to see what it means when the camp faces possible closure, and the group bands together to protect a place where new memories can be made.

name: Peppa Meets the Baby Cinema Experience
description: Join Peppa Pig and her family at the cinema as they get ready for their biggest adventure yet: welcoming a new baby.

name: Jingle Bell Heist
description: Two struggling hourly workers in London hatch a risky plan to rob a glamorous department store on Christmas Eve. As the pressure builds and their partnership deepens, the line between a desperate score and an unexpected connection starts to blur amid plenty of festive chaos.

name: American Psychopath
description: In the shadows of suburban of America, a mysterious tale unfolds as a girl from out of town becomes the prey of an unidentified serial killer. Making headline news, she must unravel the truth to regain her memory before he kills again.

name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Chrome Alone 2 - Lost in New Jersey
description: When a mysterious toy company seeks to profit off the turtles' new hero status, the brothers follow the clues to New Jersey and make a shocking discovery in this all new original short.

name: Girl in the Attic
description: Kelsey honors her late mother by training for a marathon and sharing her journey online. Her posts attract Billy (Keenan Tracey), a grocery worker caring for his disabled mother, Debbie. Obsessed, Billy kidnaps Kelsey and hides her in their attic, controlling her for years. When Debbie discovers the truth, she and Kelsey must fight for survival.

name: Tyler Perry's Finding Joy
description: A successful designer heads to the mountains at Christmas hoping for a long-awaited proposal, only to find her plans unraveling. Stranded in a snowy setting, she is pushed to rethink love, expectations, and what real connection might look like.

name: Black Zone
description: After a mysterious object crashes, a wide area is plunged into an electronic blackout and unsettling waves of extreme mania ripple through the community. As authorities scramble for answers, one person at the center seems changed by the otherworldly presence, drawing an intense government pursuit.

name: Sketch
description: After a child’s sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, the drawings become real and start causing havoc around town. With tensions already high at home, the family must pull together to face the unleashed creatures and work through heavy feelings before things spiral further.

name: Holiday Touchdown: A Bills Love Story
description: Two neighboring families in Buffalo keep their decades-long friendship alive through holiday traditions centered on cheering for their beloved football team. As the last home game before Christmas approaches, a longtime bond turns into something more while a small mystery draws everyone closer and tests what they’re willing to say out loud.

name: Sebastian Maniscalco: It Ain't Right
description: This live stand-up special leans into everyday frustrations, family chaos, and the weird realities of getting older. Performed in a packed Chicago arena, it delivers observational comedy with an animated, irritable edge aimed at familiar annoyances many viewers will recognize.

name: Prep & Landing: The Snowball Protocol
description: Christmas elves Lanny and Wayne panic when their holiday missions go awry, leaving Wayne thinking he's in BIG trouble with Santa and accidentally revealing other merry mishaps.

name: Girl Taken
description: After a painful breakup, a teen runs away and accepts help from someone she thinks she can trust, only to be taken against her will. As she struggles to stay alive and find a way out, her mother races to track her down before it’s too late.

name: Trainwreck: Poop Cruise
description: After an engine fire, a packed cruise ship is left stranded at sea with no power and failing plumbing. This documentary follows the mounting discomfort, improvised solutions, and public fallout as passengers and crew try to cope with a vacation gone very wrong.

name: Bono: Stories of Surrender
description: A famous rock singer delivers an intimate one-person stage show that blends storytelling, humor, and stripped-down music. Reflecting on family, faith, love, and activism, he revisits the moments that shaped his life and career while reimagining songs in a simpler, more personal setting.

name: My Weird School
description: A middle school kid teams up with friends and some very unusual school staff when an alien invasion threatens their town. As strange new rules and unsettling behavior spread through the halls, the group races to protect their school and stop the threat before it grows.

name: The Killer Is Calling
description: When a mysterious killer targets her remote island town over the course of one long night, veteran 911 operator Faye must uncover his motives and try to save her community, one emergency call at a time.

name: My Sister's Double Life
description: After a woman disappears following a late-night diner shift, her sister struggles to get police to take the abduction seriously. With time running out, she digs into what happened and realizes the danger is escalating, putting both women in the crosshairs of someone determined to silence them.

name: True Justice: Eye For An Eye
description: Amateur sleuths tackle a fresh challenge at a local school, diving into the fierce world of parent politics. Their investigation uncovers hidden agendas and unexpected alliances as they navigate the complex web within the community.

name: Dr. Seuss's The Sneetches
description: On a beach-ringed island, two young creatures from different sides of a social divide strike up an unexpected friendship. This sweet musical special follows their bond as they navigate differences in a colorful world inspired by Seuss.

name: Skyscraper Live
description: A world-famous free solo climber attempts a live, no-ropes ascent of one of the tallest skyscrapers in Taipei. As the climb unfolds in real time, the special leans into the nerve-racking height, the pressure of performing live, and the thin line between awe and fear.

name: Kevin Costner Presents: The First Christmas
description: Kevin Costner hosts this special exploring the extraordinary journey of Mary and Joseph as they navigate the hardships, trials and triumphs surrounding Jesus Christ's birth, offering an inspiring way to experience the true meaning of Christmas.

name: Gold & Greed: The Hunt for Fenn's Treasure
description: An eccentric man named Forrest Fenn sets off a real-life treasure hunt when he hides a chest of gold in the Rockies — and leaves clues in a cryptic poem.

name: The Audacity
description: In Silicon Valley’s insular world, a data-mining CEO pushes to convert insight and influence into profit and power. This dark comedy skewers warped ambitions, outsized egos, and the ethical lapses of people who see themselves as inventors of the future.

name: We Were Liars
description: A teen returns to a private island summer retreat a year after a mysterious accident left her with memory loss. With her wealthy family and closest friends refusing to discuss what happened, she starts digging for answers and finds that the picture of a perfect vacation hides painful secrets.

name: The Dark Wizard
description: This series follows a world-famous, controversial extreme athlete pushing the limits through climbing, base jumping, and highline walking. As the feats grow more daring, it also explores the personal struggles and inner demons that shadow life at the edge.

name: Seeking Persephone
description: To protect her family’s future, a young woman enters a marriage of necessity with a powerful, emotionally distant nobleman. As they navigate duty, expectations, and growing closeness, their guarded partnership begins to shift into something neither anticipated.

name: RoboGobo
description: Five adorable adopted pets are given super-powered Robo-Suits by kid inventor Dax, then going on a mission to save other pets in trouble and learning how to become a family in the process.

name: Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man
description: A teenage student begins balancing school, friendships, and new abilities as he grows into a neighborhood hero. This animated series puts a fresh spin on familiar Spider-Man beats, mixing personal drama with action and a distinct comic-inspired look as he learns what it takes to do the right thing.

name: Daredevil: Born Again
description: A driven New York lawyer with extraordinary senses tries to keep his life on the right side of the law while a powerful former crime figure seeks legitimacy through politics. As old choices and hidden sides resurface, their paths tighten into a tense clash that tests justice, identity, and how far each will go.

name: Marvel Zombies
description: When a zombie plague overwhelms Earth’s mightiest heroes, a small band of survivors scrambles to stay alive and find a way to stop the super-powered undead. Racing across a ruined landscape, they face brutal battles, uneasy alliances, and hard choices as hope grows thinner by the day.

name: Ironheart
description: Back home in Chicago, a young inventor pushes her cutting-edge suit tech to prove herself, only to get pulled into a risky partnership with a charming, mysterious figure. As ambition grows, so do the stakes, with technology clashing against forces that don’t play by scientific rules.

name: IT: Welcome to Derry
description: In 1962, a string of child disappearances unsettles a small town, pushing a group of outsider kids to investigate a sinister presence that seems to feed on fear. As anxiety spreads, some adults band together to restore order, while a separate military effort quietly pursues its own agenda in the area.

name: Chief of War
description: As conflict tears through Hawaiʻi’s four kingdoms, a fierce warrior sets out on a high-stakes journey to bring rival factions together. With an outside danger drawing closer to the islands, unity becomes the only hope to protect their way of life and future.

name: E.B. White's Charlotte's Web
description: When farm pig Wilbur learns he is being raised for slaughter, barn spider Charlotte writes messages in her web to convince the farmer to let him live.

name: Iyanu
description: Set in the magical kingdom of Yorubaland, follow teenage orphan girl, Iyanu, a heroine who must uncover the mystery behind her newfound powers to save her people from an ancient curse threatening to destroy humanity.

name: Outlander: Blood of My Blood
description: Across World War I and the rugged Scottish Highlands of the 18th century, two couples fight to stay together as outside forces threaten to pull them apart. As their stories unfold across time, romance, danger, and family ties collide in unexpected ways.

name: Alien: Earth
description: After a deep-space research vessel crashes on Earth, a young woman and a mismatched squad of tactical soldiers investigate the wreckage and uncover something far more dangerous than they expected. As strange new lifeforms emerge, the group must navigate fear, survival, and hard choices while the threat grows closer.

name: Dope Thief
description: Two lifelong friends in Philadelphia run a risky hustle, posing as federal agents to rob small-time drug dealers. The scheme seems foolproof until they pick the wrong target, drawing the attention of a far bigger narcotics operation and forcing them to scramble to stay alive.

name: Win or Lose
description: With a championship game approaching, a group of eight people juggle pressure, expectations, and unexpected personal challenges away from the field. As the big day nears, their everyday lives take surprising turns that test focus, relationships, and resilience.

name: Deli Boys
description: After their powerful father dies, two spoiled brothers suddenly lose their cushy lives and uncover the criminal side of the family business. Thrown into a world they barely understand, they try to survive, stick together, and prove they can run what he left behind.

name: A Thousand Blows
description: Two friends newly arrived from Jamaica are pulled into the dangerous underworld of 1880s East London, where bare-knuckle fighting and street crime collide. As they chase survival and opportunity, they’re drawn into a ruthless power struggle involving a feared boxing boss and an ambitious all-women gang.

name: The Mighty Nein
description: When a powerful arcane relic falls into dangerous hands, a ragtag group of fugitives and outcasts is forced into an uneasy alliance. With secrets, scars, and clashing goals, they must learn to trust each other while racing to stop the realm from unraveling.

name: Splinter Cell: Deathwatch
description: In a world of covert operations and shifting loyalties, a legendary operative is pulled back into the field to guide a new recruit. Together they navigate high-stakes missions, cutting-edge tech, and uneasy alliances while trying to expose a far-reaching conspiracy before it spirals out of control.

name: #1 Happy Family USA
description: A Muslim-American family navigates the early 2000s by constantly adjusting how they speak and act to fit in. Through sharp, often outrageous comedy, the series explores fear, war, identity, and everyday family life during a time shaped by prejudice and pop-culture chaos.

name: Mermicorno: Starfall
description: In a fantastical and magical undersea world, where a team of Mermicorno (enchanting half-Unicorno/half-fish creatures) join together to save the ocean from the threat of the evil Ika Inkblot.

name: Duster
description: In 1972, a trailblazing FBI agent heads to the Southwest and teams up with a daring getaway driver to infiltrate a rising crime syndicate. As the investigation heats up, the pair navigates danger, shifting loyalties, and the pressures of working inside a hostile system while chasing a big takedown.

name: The Last Frontier
description: After a prison transport plane crashes in Alaska’s remote wilderness, dangerous inmates scatter into the cold and chaos. With help that may come with its own agenda, a lone lawman races to protect a small town while a wider web of secrets and pursuit closes in.

name: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
description: A new class of cadets arrives at a famous spacefaring academy to chase a shared dream of hope and service. As demanding instructors push them to grow, they juggle friendships, rivalries, and first love—until a looming threat puts both the school and the wider Federation at risk.

name: Task
description: In the working-class suburbs of Philadelphia, an FBI-led task force races to stop a string of violent, late-night robberies. As the investigation tightens, the case collides with complicated family lives on both sides, blurring lines between duty, loyalty, and survival.

name: Pluribus
description: When a strange force spreads across humanity and turns everyday life into a cheerful collective, one stubbornly unhappy holdout becomes the unlikely obstacle to a world of enforced bliss. As the pressure to “just be happy” grows, they’re pushed to resist, investigate, and find a way to stop it before everything familiar is rewritten.

name: Kevin Costner's The West
description: This fresh look at the epic history of the American West delves into the desperate struggle for the land itself – and how it still shapes the America we know today.

name: Common Side Effects
description: Two former lab partners stumble onto a rare mushroom with extraordinary healing potential, only to find powerful forces determined to keep it hidden. As they dig deeper, they’re pulled into a tense, often darkly funny chase that pits personal loyalty against corporate and government pressure.

name: The Bondsman
description: A backwoods bounty hunter gets a second chance at life after returning from the dead, hoping to rebuild love and chase a long-neglected music dream. But the job that once felt familiar takes a darker turn, pulling them into violent, supernatural hunts with unexpected personal fallout.

name: Suspect: The Shooting of Jean Charles De Menezes
description: In the tense aftermath of terrorist attacks in London, a police operation goes disastrously wrong when an ordinary commuter is mistaken for a threat. This fact-based drama follows the pressure, confusion, and search for accountability that unfold after a terrible public tragedy.

name: Butterfly
description: A former intelligence operative living quietly in South Korea is forced out of hiding when a past choice catches up with him. As a ruthless assassin and a shadowy spy organization close in, he must stay ahead of the hunt while navigating tangled loyalties and a deeply personal connection at the center of the conflict.

name: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
description: A Librarian from the past lands in the present and discovers his old castle is now a museum. A mistake unleashes magic across the continent, and he’s assigned a new team to track down dangerous artifacts and contain the fallout, one strange case at a time.

name: Lazarus
description: In a near-future world, a widely used miracle drug is revealed to carry a deadly delayed consequence. With time running out, an elite team is formed to track down the elusive creator and uncover the truth behind the crisis, racing across the globe to stop a looming catastrophe.

name: Wolf King
description: A young commoner comes of age and discovers a hidden legacy tied to werewolves and royal power. As the truth about their lineage emerges, they must navigate new responsibilities and a dangerous path toward a throne.

name: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse+
description: Mickey and pals welcome everyone back to the clubhouse for all-new adventures filled with songs, laughs, handy helping, and fun new surprises.

name: Toxic Town
description: In a small English town, a cluster of babies are born with serious disabilities, and their mothers begin to suspect something in the local environment is to blame. Refusing to be ignored, they band together and take on a long, exhausting fight to hold powerful institutions accountable and demand justice.

name: How to Get to Heaven from Belfast
description: Three lifelong friends reunite after a death and get pulled into a messy, darkly funny mystery that keeps widening as they search for answers. As old loyalties and buried mistakes resurface, they scramble to stay one step ahead while trying to protect a secret that could unravel their lives.

name: Scarpetta
description: A chief medical examiner returns to Virginia to reclaim a former role, only to find the job tangled up with old grudges and complicated ties at home and at work. As new cases arrive, long-buried secrets and strained family dynamics push every relationship to the breaking point.

name: On Call
description: A veteran training officer and a rookie ride-along patrol Long Beach while coping with the loss of a fellow officer and the pressures of modern policing. As they respond to everyday calls, they face tense street situations, department politics, and the challenge of building trust on the job.

name: BAT-FAM
description: A famous crime-fighter, his loyal butler, and an eager young sidekick try to make life work under one roof as new faces move into their mansion. Between everyday family chaos and superhero responsibilities, they juggle laughs, mishaps, and heartfelt moments while learning how to function as a team.

name: Ballard
description: A determined detective digs into a string of murders and a wider pattern of corruption while tracking a dangerous serial offender. As pressure mounts from both criminals and people inside the system, she has to push through personal struggles to fight for justice for victims and their families.

name: Devil May Cry
description: A mysterious threat could open the gates of Hell, and a skilled demon hunter becomes humanity’s best chance to stop it. Expect a fast, brutal ride packed with supernatural battles, dark atmosphere, and a story that aims to pull in both longtime fans and newcomers.

name: Ransom Canyon
description: In a small Texas town, three ranching families clash over land, legacy, and love as old grudges and new romances collide. With outside pressure threatening their way of life, the community is pulled into a swirl of rivalries, hard choices, and simmering emotions.

name: Miss Austen
description: A woman looks back on her life and her bond with her famous sister, as a long-remembered decision to destroy private letters raises questions about love, duty, and legacy. Moving between past and later years, this witty yet tender period drama reimagines a real-life literary mystery through family ties and personal sacrifice.

name: Too Much
description: After a life-changing breakup, a New Yorker relocates to London chasing a fresh start and a romantic reset. She’s drawn into a messy, offbeat connection with an indie musician, where culture clash, awkward honesty, and emotional turbulence test what a real love story might look like.

name: Government Cheese
description: When Hampton is released from prison, his long-awaited family reunion doesn't quite go as he hoped. In his absence, Hampton's wife and sons formed an unconventional family unit, and his return spins their world into chaos.

name: Eyes of Wakanda
description: Follow the adventures of brave Wakandan warriors throughout history in this globe-trotting adventure, where they must carry out dangerous missions to retrieve Vibranium artifacts from the enemies of Wakanda. They are the Hatut Zaraze and this is their story.

name: 56 Days
description: After a body is discovered in an upscale apartment, investigators piece together the previous 56 days of an intense relationship to find out what happened. The story moves between the present-day case and the couple’s fast-moving romance, building suspicion around both love and deception.

name: Dying for Sex
description: After receiving a terminal cancer diagnosis, a woman leaves her marriage and begins exploring her sexuality in ways she never allowed herself before. What starts as bold experimentation becomes an emotional journey through intimacy, friendship, grief, and the desire to feel fully alive while time is running short.

name: The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins
description: A disgraced former football player is on a mission to rehabilitate his image.

name: Apple Cider Vinegar
description: Two young women rise as wellness influencers, promoting alternative remedies as answers to serious illness. As their online fame grows, their claims and choices begin to unravel their personal lives and ripple outward, exposing how quickly misinformation can spread and who it can harm.

name: Murderbot
description: In a high-tech future, a security robot secretly gains free will and tries to keep that fact hidden. Assigned to protect a team of scientists on a dangerous planet, it balances tense survival moments with an awkward desire for privacy and a quiet obsession with binge-watching soap operas.

name: Your Friends & Neighbors
description: After a sudden divorce and job loss, a once-powerful financier turns to robbing the wealthy neighbors he used to call friends just to keep his life from collapsing. The thrill of stealing from his own circle pulls him deeper, until the risks spiral into a dangerous, deadly mess.

name: House of David
description: A young outcast is unexpectedly chosen to lead, setting off a sweeping tale of faith, power, and rivalry in ancient Israel. As a once-strong ruler is undone by pride, a prophet’s guidance and growing tensions push the kingdom toward a defining change in leadership.

name: Super Team Canada
description: Six little-known Canadian superheroes try to save the world from evil giant robots, an unemployed octopus and needy hardware store clerks. The stakes are high for the stereotypically underdog Canadian super-unknowns, who are called in as Earth’s last resort when all other superheroes have been destroyed.

name: Lockerbie: A Search for Truth
description: After a devastating air disaster shatters a family, a grieving parent sets out to uncover what really happened. Crossing borders and political divides, the search grows into a consuming fight that strains relationships, threatens personal stability, and challenges faith in the justice system as the truth keeps shifting.

name: The Hunting Wives
description: A woman relocates from New England to East Texas and gets swept into the glamorous orbit of a wealthy socialite and her exclusive circle. As cocktails, gossip, and risky thrills escalate, the group’s polished image starts to crack, pulling her into a web of scandal, suspicion, and dangerous secrets.

name: Watson
description: A year after losing a close friend and partner, a doctor returns to medicine by leading a clinic focused on rare conditions. As unusual cases pile up, the work pulls him back toward the mysteries and dangers he hoped to leave behind.

name: Run Away
description: When a father’s daughter runs away, his frantic search pulls him into a murder investigation that keeps widening. As clues surface, he’s forced to confront a web of lies and buried family secrets that threaten to tear everything apart.

name: Happy Face
description: A woman tries to keep her life steady while living with the legacy of a notorious serial killer in her family. When the past resurfaces, she’s pulled into a tense search for the truth that could affect someone else’s fate, forcing her to confront trauma, public scrutiny, and who she wants to be.

name: Side Quest
description: Go deeper into the Mythic Quest universe in these four standalone stories. Follow the lives of players, comic book shop owners, touring orchestra musicians, and members of the art department as they search for community, success, and love.

name: Margo's Got Money Troubles
description: A young college dropout and aspiring writer is suddenly juggling a newborn, rising bills, and shrinking options to stay afloat. With pressure mounting at home, she has to get creative and find a path forward before everything slips out of reach.

name: Death by Lightning
description: A little-known politician rises from obscurity to the presidency as the era’s power struggles and ambitions swirl around him. At the same time, an increasingly unstable outsider fixates on recognition and purpose, setting two very different paths on a collision course in late-1800s America.

name: All Her Fault
description: A parent arrives to pick up a child from a first playdate, only to find a stranger at the door who insists the child was never there. As panic sets in, a frantic search begins across the city, pulling family, neighbors, and authorities into a tense mystery where nothing feels certain.

name: Paradise
description: Life in a secluded, ultra-wealthy community is upended when a prominent leader is found murdered. As investigators dig in, suspicion spreads, past and present collide, and unsettling secrets about the place itself begin to surface, turning a straightforward case into something far bigger and more dangerous.

name: The Copenhagen Test
description: An intelligence analyst realizes his senses are being monitored and manipulated, turning everyday life into a trap. As he searches for who’s behind the intrusion, he’s pulled into an agency-run experiment that blurs reality, loyalty, and control while trying to flush out a hidden threat.

name: Sherlock & Daughter
description: A famous detective is pulled into a dangerous case that could put people close to him at risk. A determined young American arrives in London after her mother’s murder, hoping to uncover the truth about her family, and the unlikely pair team up to chase clues through a wider conspiracy.

name: Prime Target
description: A brilliant math student nears a breakthrough tied to prime numbers and encryption, only to become the target of a shadowy force determined to shut the work down. With a government agent as an uneasy ally, the search for answers turns into a tense race through academia, history, and a far-reaching conspiracy.

name: The Terminal List: Dark Wolf
description: A Navy SEAL is pulled into the CIA’s world of covert missions, where every assignment blurs the line between duty and wrongdoing. As the operations grow darker, the pressure builds to choose between staying grounded or giving in to increasingly dangerous impulses.

name: Dept. Q
description: A brash but brilliant detective is put in charge of a new unit and an unlikely team of outsiders tasked with reopening Edinburgh’s cold cases. As they dig into long-buried leads, clashing personalities and dark discoveries test their resolve while the department fights to prove it belongs.

name: The Americas
description: This nature miniseries journeys across North, Central, and South America, exploring the region’s beauty, hidden wildlife, and vulnerable ecosystems. It highlights breathtaking landscapes and animal behavior while balancing wonder, education, and a gentle reminder of how fragile these environments can be.

name: A Cruel Love: The Ruth Ellis Story
description: In 1950s Britain, a young nightclub manager becomes the focus of a notorious murder case that grips the public and exposes the pressures of an unforgiving justice system. As the investigation and courtroom battle unfold, the story digs into a turbulent relationship, contested responsibility, and the wider debate around punishment and fairness.

name: Sirens
description: Worried that her sister is getting pulled too deeply into a billionaire boss’s orbit, a scrappy outsider heads to a lavish seaside estate to figure out what’s really going on. Over a tense holiday weekend, glamour, power games, and family baggage collide as she digs for answers in a world built on privilege and control.

name: The Hunting Party
description: After a breach at a top-secret prison that isn’t supposed to exist, a small investigative task force is formed to track down and capture the country’s most dangerous escaped killers. Each case pushes the team into high-stakes hunts while a larger mystery about the facility and the breakout simmers in the background.

name: Overcompensating
description: A closeted former high school football star arrives at college and quickly bonds with an outsider determined to fit in. With help from a savvy older sibling and a campus-famous boyfriend, they stumble through parties, awkward hookups, and risky choices while trying to figure out who they are and where they belong.

name: FOREVER
description: Two childhood friends reconnect in their teen years and tumble into a first love that feels thrilling, confusing, and deeply real. As they navigate family expectations, friendships, and the pressures of growing up, their relationship brings both joy and heartbreak that will shape who they become.

name: NCIS: Tony & Ziva
description: After an attack on a private security business, two former partners are forced to flee across Europe with their child in the middle of the chaos. As they try to uncover who is targeting them, old wounds and lingering feelings complicate every decision, pushing them to rebuild trust while staying one step ahead.

name: The Studio
description: A newly promoted studio boss and the executive team scramble to keep movies profitable and culturally relevant while chasing celebrity approval. As corporate pressure collides with creative ambition, each new crisis forces them to choose between protecting the brand and honoring the art.

name: Nine Bodies in a Mexican Morgue
description: After a small plane crashes in a remote Mexican jungle, a group of strangers must work together to survive with limited supplies and no clear way out. When people start turning up dead, fear and suspicion spread, and the remaining survivors race to uncover who’s behind it before they’re next.

name: Chad Powers
description: Years after a career-ending scandal, a former college football quarterback tries to get a second chance by hiding behind a new persona and walking on to a struggling Southern team. As he juggles the disguise, new relationships, and the pressure to prove himself, the comeback gets messy, funny, and unexpectedly heartfelt.

name: MobLand
description: Two powerful crime families collide as tensions rise and loyalties are tested, putting their businesses and loved ones at risk. As the conflict escalates, a trusted fixer tries to keep the peace while navigating shifting alliances, pressure from all sides, and the brutal cost of holding an empire together.

name: PULSE
description: ER residents at a Miami teaching hospital juggle relentless medical emergencies and messy personal lives as a divisive workplace allegation fractures the staff. With tensions rising and loyalties shifting, the team must keep patients alive while navigating power dynamics, politics, and relationships under intense pressure.

name: The Twisted Tale of Amanda Knox
description: A young American student arrives in Italy for a study-abroad experience, only to be swept into a shocking murder case and jailed within weeks. The series follows the fight to clear their name and regain freedom, while exploring how media attention, cultural misunderstandings, and investigative bias can shape public judgment.

name: UNTAMED
description: After a woman is found dead in a remote national park, a federal investigator is pulled into a harsh, isolated world where the wilderness is as dangerous as the people living on its edges. As the case deepens, buried grief and long-held secrets complicate the search for answers in a place that refuses to play by human rules.

name: The Miniature Wife
description: A married couple’s everyday power struggles turn into something far stranger when a technological accident triggers an extreme relationship crisis. As they each try to regain control, their home becomes a battleground of pride, vulnerability, and shifting rules.

name: Hostage
description: A national crisis erupts when a British leader’s spouse is kidnapped and a French leader begins receiving chilling threats. With pressure mounting at home and abroad, the two governments are forced into high-stakes decisions where every move could trigger political fallout and personal consequences.

name: Black Rabbit
description: A successful New York restaurateur tries to keep his life on track, but everything shifts when his unpredictable brother returns with dangerous debts. Pulled into the city’s criminal underworld, he’s forced to make hard choices to protect his business, his family, and himself as pressure mounts.

name: The Beast in Me
description: A successful author finds her quiet life upended when a wealthy new neighbor draws her into a tense psychological game. As she digs for the truth behind his unsettling reputation, the line between curiosity and obsession blurs, and suspicion starts to infect everything around her.

name: Stick
description: A former golf pro whose career collapsed after a public meltdown is barely getting by when he decides to mentor a talented, volatile teenage golfer. As they chase a second chance, the unlikely partnership tests their patience, trust, and commitment—on and off the course.

name: The Pitt
description: In an overcrowded, underfunded emergency department, a team of doctors and nurses works nonstop to treat a steady stream of critical cases. The series follows the intensity of their shifts, balancing high-stakes decisions with the everyday humanity, mistakes, and resilience that come with saving lives under pressure.

name: Good Cop/Bad Cop
description: In a small Pacific Northwest town, a sister-and-brother detective duo works cases while juggling quirky locals, limited resources, and constant friction. Their job gets even messier because the police chief is also their father, turning every investigation into a test of family loyalty and teamwork.

name: The Runarounds
description: A tight-knit group of recent high school graduates in Wilmington, North Carolina, comes together to form a rock band during one unforgettable summer. As friendships deepen and drama flares, they must decide whether to follow the expected path into adulthood or gamble on chasing a once-in-a-lifetime dream.

name: Agatha Christie's Seven Dials
description: In 1920s England, a glamorous country house party takes a dark turn when a prank seems to end in tragedy. An unexpected amateur sleuth digs into secrets, shifting alibis, and a wider scheme, determined to untangle what really happened before the danger spreads.

name: House of Guinness
description: In 1868 Dublin, a powerful brewing dynasty is thrown into turmoil after the family patriarch dies. With the business’s future suddenly uncertain, four siblings with private troubles and competing ambitions must navigate loyalty, rivalry, and outside pressures to keep their legacy from slipping away.

name: Bookish
description: In post-war London, an antiquarian bookseller uses his deep knowledge and vast library to help untangle baffling mysteries. As each case unfolds, he also offers shelter and guidance to a small circle of troubled people, blending cozy charm with clever sleuthing.

name: The Better Sister
description: A polished New York life is shaken when a wealthy family man is murdered, pulling two estranged sisters back into each other’s orbit. As detectives dig in, old resentments flare, loyalties are tested, and buried family secrets begin to surface under mounting pressure.

name: The Paper
description: A familiar documentary crew sets out to find a new workplace to follow and lands on a historic local newspaper in Toledo. As an eager publisher tries to bring the paper back to life, the cameras capture the messy, funny, and sometimes awkward push to keep the newsroom afloat.

name: Hollywood Squares
description: Two contestants play tic-tac-toe to win money and prizes. The "board" for the game is a vertical stack of open-faced cubes, each occupied by a celebrity seated at a desk and facing the contestants. The celebrities are asked questions and the contestants judge the legitimacy of their answers to win the game.

name: Down Cemetery Road
description: After a house explosion rocks a quiet suburb, a child vanishes and a worried neighbor joins forces with a private investigator to search for answers. What begins as a local missing-person case spirals into buried secrets and a far-reaching conspiracy that turns the community upside down.

name: Leanne
description: After her husband leaves, a resilient Southern mom is forced to rebuild her life from scratch. With the help of a loving but blunt family, she navigates heartbreak, fresh starts, and everyday chaos while leaning into humor and small wins along the way.

name: The Girlfriend
description: A successful mother’s seemingly perfect life starts to crack when her adult son brings home a new girlfriend. As tensions rise, suspicion and jealousy blur the line between genuine concern and obsession, and shifting viewpoints make it hard to know who’s manipulating whom.

name: The Abandons
description: In 1850s Washington, two rival families led by formidable matriarchs—one wealthy, one struggling but fiercely loyal—clash for control on a lawless frontier. As tensions rise, power plays, shifting alliances, and hard choices test what each side is willing to sacrifice to survive and come out on top.

name: Star City
