description: Step into a thrilling chapter inspired by For All Mankind. Same alt-history universe. Different perspective: the Soviet Union's. Go behind the Iron Curtain with the cosmonauts, engineers, and intelligence officers who risked it all in the race for the Moon.

name: Sheriff Country
description: A small-town sheriff patrols Edgewater while investigating local crimes and trying to keep order in a community with limited resources. At home, family tensions run high as she deals with an ex-con parent and a troubling, unresolved incident tied to her rebellious child.

name: The Institute
description: A brilliant 14-year-old is abducted and wakes up in a secret facility where other kids with unusual abilities are being held for unknown purposes. Nearby, a troubled former police officer tries to start over in a quiet town, only to find his path pulling him toward the same unsettling mystery.

name: Bad Thoughts
description: This sketch-comedy series turns intrusive, socially unacceptable thoughts into a run of short, darkly funny stories. The episodes jump through warped takes on family life, romance, communication, health, and everyday discomfort, aiming for laughs through shock, absurdity, and taboo-breaking humor.

name: Revival
description: In a rural Wisconsin town, the recently deceased suddenly return from their graves—looking and acting like they always did. As fear and confusion spread, a local officer and single parent is pulled into a brutal murder investigation where anyone in town, living or revived, could be hiding the truth.

name: Doc
description: After a brain injury wipes out the last eight years of her memory, a doctor returns to a life she barely recognizes. With her family relationships changed and her skills out of date, she leans on a distant teenage child and a few close allies while trying to keep working and rebuild who she is.

name: Haunted Hotel
description: A single parent inherits a hotel and moves in, only to find it comes with a friendly ghost roommate and a steady stream of demanding supernatural guests. As the new owner tries to keep life on track, the hotel’s spooky chaos turns everyday problems into strange, funny, and sometimes heartfelt situations.

name: The Waterfront
description: A powerful North Carolina fishing family fights to keep their struggling business empire alive as money troubles pull them into risky deals and dangerous alliances. As pressure mounts, loyalty is tested and the line between survival and corruption starts to blur in their coastal community.

name: Going Dutch
description: After an epically unfiltered rant, an arrogant, loudmouth U.S. Army Colonel is reassigned to the Netherlands, where he is punished with a command position at the least important army base in the world.

name: Spider-Noir
description: Ben Reilly, an aging and down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York, is forced to grapple with his past life as the city's one and only superhero.

name: Sean Combs: The Reckoning
description: This docuseries traces a powerful music figure’s rise from building a hit-making empire to facing serious allegations and public scrutiny. Through archival footage and insider accounts, it explores both the cultural impact of a major label’s success and the darker claims and patterns of behavior that followed behind the scenes.

name: Rooster
description: On a college campus, a writer tries to balance work, family, and the everyday chaos around him. As he navigates a complicated bond with his daughter, awkward encounters and quirky people push him to rethink what he wants from relationships and life.

name: Bet
description: At an elite private school where gambling decides who holds power, a bold new student arrives and quickly disrupts the pecking order. With a mysterious past and a taste for high-stakes games, they push rivals into risky bets while quietly pursuing a personal vendetta.

name: Young Sherlock
description: A disgraced, impulsive young man is pulled into his first murder investigation when the case threatens his freedom. As he digs deeper, the clues lead from local danger to a globe-spanning conspiracy, forcing him to sharpen his instincts and confront unsettling truths about the world around him.

name: Countdown
description: After a Homeland Security officer is killed in public, an LAPD detective is pulled into a covert multi-agency team to track down the murderer. What starts as a targeted investigation quickly widens into a much bigger threat, forcing the group to act fast to protect a city full of people.

name: Talamasca: The Secret Order
description: A young man is recruited into a secret international organization that monitors the supernatural. As he learns the group’s methods and rules, he follows a trail tied to his own family’s hidden connection to an immortal world of strange powers and unsettling threats.

name: The Rainmaker
description: A newly graduated lawyer takes on a powerful courtroom veteran while navigating pressure from a demanding boss and complications with a romantic rival on the other side. As the case unfolds, the underdog team digs into a hospital-related death and begins to suspect a wider cover-up tied to their client’s fight for justice.

name: Haha, You Clowns
description: A tender animated comedy follows three big-hearted teenage brothers and their gentle dad as they navigate everyday adventures while coping with the loss of their mom. With goofy moments, oddball energy, and surprising warmth, the family learns how to keep moving forward while feeling her presence in small, meaningful ways.

name: Half Man
description: An unexpected arrival at a wedding sparks a violent turning point, sending the story back through the tangled history of two estranged men. The series explores family conflict, buried resentment, and the events that shaped their bond over time.

name: Devil in Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
description: After a teenager vanishes, a troubling pattern emerges: multiple young men and boys have gone missing, and suspicion centers on a local man. As families search for answers, investigators and the justice system work to uncover what happened and confront the damage left behind.

name: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: In a familiar fantasy realm long before later wars, a young knight and his sharp, smaller companion travel from place to place, chasing work and trying to live by a code of honor. Their journey pulls them into local conflicts, uneasy alliances, and risky tests of courage in a world where old dynasties still rule and legends feel close.

name: The American Revolution
description: This miniseries explores the American Revolution as more than a fight for independence, tracing how it unfolded as a local civil conflict and a global struggle at the same time. Spanning battlefields and communities from the Atlantic coast to far beyond, it follows the era’s people through victory, defeat, and a crisis that reshaped a new nation and the wider world.

name: Suits LA
description: A former federal prosecutor rebuilds his career in Los Angeles by representing powerful clients. When his law firm hits a breaking point, he’s forced to take on a kind of work he once looked down on, testing his principles and pushing him into morally gray choices.

name: Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen
description: As a wedding day approaches, a bride becomes convinced that something horrifying is waiting for her at the altar. Each step toward the ceremony deepens the dread, turning what should be a celebration into a spiraling nightmare.

name: All's Fair
description: A group of female divorce attorneys breaks away from a male-dominated firm to launch their own high-powered practice. As they take on messy, expensive breakups, they juggle ambition, loyalty, and personal baggage while navigating scandal, status, and shifting alliances at work and among themselves.

name: HIS & HERS
description: An estranged couple—one in law enforcement, the other in journalism—compete to solve a murder while each suspects the other may be involved. As the investigation tightens, secrets, grudges, and shifting loyalties turn a familiar case into a tense, fast-moving puzzle where nearly everyone looks guilty.

name: Take That
description: This docuseries traces the rise and long-running legacy of a hugely successful UK boy band, from early fame to decades of hit songs and cultural impact. Through candid interviews and reflections, it explores the pressures of stardom, shifting relationships, and how the music kept bringing them back together over more than 30 years.

name: Mid-Century Modern
description: After an unexpected loss, three longtime friends decide to spend their later years under one roof in Palm Springs, sharing daily life with one friend’s sharp-tongued mother. As their chosen family grows closer, they navigate friendship, aging, and plenty of playful, sometimes risqué, humor along the way.

name: Shifting Gears
description: A stubborn widower runs a classic car restoration shop and prefers life on his own terms. When his estranged adult child moves back in with two teens, the household becomes a daily test of patience, boundaries, and rebuilding trust—turning family life into a different kind of restoration.

name: Dexter: Resurrection
description: After waking from a coma, a troubled man heads to New York City to track down his missing son and try to repair the damage between them. As old connections resurface and questions close in, father and son confront their shared darkness while searching for a way forward together.

name: Rooster Fighter
description: A fearless rooster becomes an unlikely defender of humanity, taking on towering monsters with bold confidence, a big heart, and a signature battle cry. Packed with comedy and action, the story follows this underdog hero as each new threat tests his courage and determination.

name: Adults
description: A group of twenty-somethings in New York tries to figure out adulthood while aiming to be better people, even as they stumble through messy choices and awkward relationships. It’s a comedy about growing up slowly, learning boundaries, and getting by with friends who are just as unfinished.

name: PONIES
description: In 1977 Moscow, two overlooked women at the American Embassy are recruited as unlikely CIA operatives after a personal tragedy. As they take on increasingly risky assignments, they’re pulled into a wider Cold War conspiracy, balancing danger, distrust, and uneasy alliances while trying to uncover the truth.

name: Long Story Short
description: This animated comedy follows a family across different points in time, tracking siblings as they move from childhood into adulthood and revisit earlier moments. With sharp humor and heartfelt honesty, it explores how family bonds, old wounds, and everyday choices echo across the years.

name: Long Way Home
description: Two longtime friends set off on a motorcycle journey from Scotland to England, taking the scenic route through much of Europe on aging bikes. Along the way, the series mixes road-trip banter with striking stops, local encounters, and a relaxed travel vibe.

name: Unchosen
description: Inside a tightly controlled British cult, a woman feels increasingly trapped between a stifling marriage and the arrival of a compelling outsider with a dangerous past. As pressure builds behind closed doors, personal loyalty and the hope of escape become harder to untangle.

name: The 'Burbs
description: A young couple moves back into a familiar suburban street, hoping for a fresh start. When new neighbors arrive, long-buried secrets begin to surface, and the block’s friendly facade gives way to suspicion, dark humor, and escalating danger that threatens everyone’s sense of safety.

name: Lord of the Flies
description: After a plane crash, a group of schoolboys are left alone on a tropical island with no adults to guide them. What begins as an effort to build rules, share responsibilities, and stay hopeful slowly turns into fear, rivalry, and a breakdown of order.

name: Ripple
description: In New York City, four strangers face personal struggles and everyday crossroads as their separate lives begin to intersect in unexpected ways. As new connections form, small choices create a ripple effect that reshapes relationships, challenges beliefs, and offers moments of comfort amid heavy emotions.

name: Robin Hood
description: In a modern reimagining of a classic legend, a young Saxon and a Norman noblewoman fall in love after the Norman invasion of England. Together, they’re drawn into a fight for justice, pushing back against corruption and trying to bring peace to a divided land.

name: Playing Gracie Darling
description: Decades after a teen vanishes during a séance, a small town’s kids revive a dare-like game inspired by the case. When another girl disappears, a returning child psychologist teams up with a local police sergeant to dig into old secrets, while one family faces a terrifying echo of the past.

name: Murdaugh: Death in the Family
description: A wealthy, well-connected family’s comfortable life begins to unravel after their son is tied to a deadly boat crash. As pressure mounts and more information surfaces, their influence, relationships, and public image are tested while links to other suspicious deaths raise unsettling questions.

name: I Love LA
description: A tightly knit, codependent group of friends tries to juggle love, ambition, and status in Los Angeles. When a longtime friend returns with influencer energy, old dynamics get shaken up, forcing everyone to confront messy relationships, career frustrations, and the pressure to keep up appearances.

name: Iron Man and His Awesome Friends
description: Follow the adventures (and misadventures) of best friends and super geniuses, Tony Stark, Riri Williams and Amadeus Cho as they work together to solve problems both big and small and protect their city.

name: The Chair Company
description: After a humiliating moment at a work event, a suburban family man becomes convinced something bigger is going on. What starts as a small attempt to set things right spirals into a strange, darkly funny mystery, pulling him into rabbit holes that blur everyday office life with unsettling intrigue.

name: The Beauty
description: In the glamorous world of international fashion, a string of gruesome deaths draws investigators to Paris. Their search uncovers a sexually transmitted virus that promises flawless beauty, pulling them into a dangerous web of desire, obsession, and escalating consequences.

name: Boots
description: A bullied teenager impulsively joins Marine boot camp hoping to reinvent himself, only to find the experience far harsher and more revealing than expected. As training pushes everyone to their limits, unexpected bonds, humor, and hard truths turn survival into a search for belonging.

name: Running Point
description: A reformed party girl is unexpectedly put in charge of her family’s pro basketball team and has to prove she can handle the business side. As she navigates a male-dominated workplace, family drama, and leadership pressure, she tries to earn respect while keeping the team and her life from spinning out.

name: Malice
description: A charming tutor enters a wealthy household and quickly becomes entwined in their routines, relationships, and secrets. As suspicions grow, the family must decide who to trust while an unsettling agenda threatens to upend their privileged world.

name: Stranger Things: Tales from '85
description: Set in a harsh winter in 1985, this series returns to a small town where familiar friends face frightening new creatures and a growing paranormal mystery. As fear spreads, they must work together to protect their home from another strange threat.

name: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
description: Follow a tween vampire girl who leaves the safety of Transylvania to attend a performing arts boarding school. Living amongst humans for the first time, she pursues her passion for music while keeping her vampire identity a secret, something that’s made more challenging when her overprotective father charges an overzealous ghost to live with her at the school.

name: Long Bright River
description: A patrol officer works a Philadelphia neighborhood hit hard by addiction and homelessness, trying to protect people she grew up around. When a string of suspicious deaths and murders shakes the area, she pushes beyond her usual role to connect the dots—while her own past and family ties begin to feel uncomfortably close to the case.

name: The Madison
description: A family leaves their comfortable New York City life for Montana’s Madison River Valley, hoping to reconnect and find peace. Surrounded by wide-open landscapes and a slower rhythm, they face grief, strained relationships, and the challenge of starting over in an unfamiliar place.

name: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
description: A 100-day expedition pushes a team through some of Earth’s most extreme environments, traveling from one pole to the other alongside scientists, explorers, and local experts. Along the way, the journey mixes awe-inspiring landscapes with accessible science and personal reflection on what these places can teach us about resilience and change.

name: Electric Bloom
description: Follow the three members of a mega-famous pop group, Electric Bloom, as they look back and tell the story of their band and friendship, starting with the day they all met in middle school. The girls go on a journey to becoming the biggest band in the world and the best friends in the universe.

name: Love Story
description: An anthology of sweeping true love stories that captured the world’s attention.

name: Pee-wee as Himself
description: This two-part miniseries traces the life of an imaginative performer who built a larger-than-life public persona while guarding a private self. Through extensive interviews and archival clips, it explores the drive behind the art, the costs of fame, and how public scrutiny shaped a complicated legacy.

name: DTF St. Louis
description: Three adults stuck in midlife ruts find their lives colliding in a messy love triangle that quickly spirals into jealousy, secrecy, and mounting consequences. As tensions rise and questions pile up, what starts as a search for excitement turns into a darkly funny mystery with a deadly outcome.

name: David Blaine Do Not Attempt
description: A globe-spanning docuseries follows a performer as he meets remarkable people whose real-world abilities can look like magic. Along the way, he immerses himself in extraordinary cultures, learns demanding skills firsthand, and captures the awe, fear, and inspiration that come with pushing human limits.

name: Étoile
description: Two celebrated ballet companies in New York City and Paris make a bold move to stay afloat: they trade their brightest stars for a season. As the swap reshapes rehearsals, leadership, and public expectations, the artists and staff navigate culture clashes, ambition, and the pressure to keep their institutions alive.

name: Malcolm in the Middle: Life's Still Unfair
description: After more than a decade keeping his distance, a man has built a quieter life with his daughter away from his chaotic relatives. When his parents insist he attend their 40th anniversary party, he’s pulled back into the family orbit and old tensions resurface.

name: Celebrity Bear Hunt
description: Holly Willoughby hosts this competition show set in the Costa Rican jungle, where 12 celebrities become prey for legendary survival expert, Bear Grylls.

name: Gabriel and the Guardians
description: It follows Gabriel, a Celestial Guardian in the mythical world of Ara who is tasked with protecting the Tree Eternal — even as his companions falter, Gabriel stays true to his mission and never loses hope through this story of identity, rebellion, faith and redemption.

name: The Lowdown
description: A gritty, offbeat series follows a citizen journalist whose self-styled mission to uncover the truth keeps pulling him into messy situations around Tulsa. As he chases leads and pushes past threats and setbacks, his work collides with family life and a shifting cast of characters.

name: Extracted
description: A group of everyday competitors is dropped into the harsh Canadian wilderness to endure brutal weather, dangerous terrain, and the fear of predators. Far away, their loved ones are confined to a secluded headquarters, watching a nonstop live feed and making high-pressure choices that can help—or pull—them from the game.

name: Imperfect Women
description: After a murder upends the lives of three lifelong friends, their bond is pushed to the limit. As investigators dig deeper, long-buried resentments surface and trust fractures, forcing each woman to question what she truly knows about the others.

name: Smoke
description: An arson investigator reluctantly teams up with a police detective to track down two serial fire-setters. As the case heats up, the investigation turns into a tense cat-and-mouse chase where personal baggage, hidden motives, and growing distrust threaten to derail the search for the truth.

name: Man vs Baby
description: As Christmas approaches, a blundering-all-the-way dad juggles housesitting a posh London penthouse with an unexpected pickle: caring for a lost baby.

name: Goldie
description: Follow Goldie as she shakes up her beloved town of Boysenberg with her best friends. Together, they learn that being different is something to celebrate—and it's a whole lot of fun.

name: With Love, Meghan
description: A lifestyle series set at a sunny California estate where a host welcomes friends and well-known guests for relaxed get-togethers. Each episode mixes simple cooking, gardening, and hosting ideas, aiming for an easy, feel-good escape with plenty of pretty presentation and homey inspiration.

name: Goosebumps: The Vanishing
description: When twins Devin and Cece are sent to spend a summer in Gravesend, Brooklyn with their divorced dad, scientist Anthony Brewer, they must band together with new friends to save the neighborhood from a long-dormant threat.

name: No Taste Like Home with Antoni Porowski
description: A host takes celebrity guests across multiple countries to trace family heritage through local dishes and traditions. Along the way, they meet communities, learn surprising pieces of ancestry, and share meals that connect personal history with the flavors that shaped it.

name: Beyond the Gates
description: In a posh gated community, a powerful, prestigious family sits at the center of a web of secrets, rivalries, and scandals. As tensions rise among neighbors and loved ones, hidden truths and messy relationships threaten the polished image everyone works to protect.

name: American Manhunt: Osama bin Laden
description: Using rare footage and first-hand interviews, this documentary miniseries follows the long, high-stakes effort to track down a notorious terrorist after the 9/11 attacks. It retraces years of intelligence work, setbacks, and shifting priorities, building toward a tense final operation while reflecting on the human and political weight of the pursuit.

name: WWE LFG
description: Take an inside look at what it truly takes to make it in the WWE. Iconic WWE Legends such as Paul "Triple H" Levesque and Shawn Michaels and weekly regular coaches Undertaker, Booker T, Mickie James and Bubba Ray Dudley mentor a new generation in weekly matches on their quest to become the next WWE Superstars.

name: Finding Her Edge
description: A former ice dancer returns to the rink and pairs up with a promising new partner, hoping to rebuild her confidence and chase big goals. But old feelings for her first love complicate training, relationships, and the choices she has to make on and off the ice.

name: Miss Governor
description: As she tries to shine in politics, Mississippi's first Black lieutenant governor must manage her zany family and overcome a boss who's stuck in the past.

name: Boston Blue
description: A seasoned New York detective starts over in Boston, joining a new department and partnering with a fellow detective from a prominent law-enforcement family. As the team tackles tough cases, he also tries to rebuild a strained connection with his son in the same city.

name: Vladimir
description: An English professor becomes fixated on a charming new colleague, and the attraction starts to unravel her already strained marriage and shaky sense of purpose. Set in a tense academic world, the series mixes dark humor and intimate narration as she navigates desire, power dynamics, and the fallout of choices she can’t quite control.

name: Number One on the Call Sheet
description: A documentary miniseries where major Hollywood stars share candid interviews about how they landed career-defining leading roles. It explores the highs and lows of the craft, breakthrough moments, lessons learned from an evolving industry, and hopes for the next generation to push things further.

name: Everybody's Live with John Mulaney
description: A comedian hosts a weekly live talk show that mixes celebrity guests, themed conversations, and unpredictable call-ins. The vibe is loose and experimental, with planned bits and musical performances woven into an anything-can-happen hour that can swing from clever to chaotic.

name: Million Dollar Secret
description: A group of contestants moves into a lavish estate to compete for a hidden cash prize, while one player secretly holds the money and must stay undetected. Through challenges, clues, and tense elimination votes, alliances shift and suspicion spreads as everyone tries to survive and end up with the fortune.

name: Nemesis
description: Follow the story of two men on either side of the law, the tale of what happens when an unstoppable force (an expert criminal) meets an immovable object (a brilliant police detective). What starts as a series that aims to subvert the heist genre at every turn, amped with thrilling life-or-death stakes, family dynamics and explosive action, actually gives birth to an exploration of what drives us, sustains us, and ultimately destroys us.

name: Hollywood Demons
description: This docuseries explores some of Hollywood’s darkest scandals through interviews with insiders, collaborators, and survivors. Across six documentaries, it focuses on abuse, exploitation, and the personal struggles behind public image.

name: 9-1-1: Nashville
description: Set in Nashville, this series follows first responders handling emergencies while also dealing with family power struggles, glamour, and messy personal ties. It mixes rescue action with relationship drama in a setting that aims for both heart and high-stakes chaos.

name: Wylde Pak
description: Two half-siblings spend a summer under one roof and have to figure out how to get along while adjusting to a new family routine. Between everyday mishaps and helping out at a chaotic pet grooming business, they learn to balance their very different interests and grow closer.

name: Star Wars: Tales of the Underworld
description: Two outlaws navigate the galaxy’s criminal underworld, facing dangerous jobs and shifting loyalties as they try to shape their own futures. Told in short, character-focused chapters, the story leans into moral gray areas and the hard choices that come with life outside the law.

name: The Testaments
description: A new generation of young women comes of age in a harsh, tightly controlled society where the future feels predetermined. As they begin to question what they’ve been taught, they quietly seek allies—both familiar and unexpected—to help them push back and pursue freedom.

name: Adolescence
description: A 13-year-old is accused of killing a classmate, throwing his family into crisis and drawing in a therapist and a detective searching for clarity. As questions mount, the story focuses on the emotional fallout and the pressures surrounding youth, parenting, and the world kids grow up in today.

name: Monster: The Ed Gein Story
description: The shocking true-life tale of Ed Gein, the infamous murderer and grave robber who inspired many of Hollywood's most iconic on-screen killers.

name: Fight for Glory: 2024 World Series
description: Experience the battle of juggernauts like never before as the Yankees and Dodgers revive MLB's most iconic playoff rivalry. With intimate access to superstar players, managers, and their families, witness the sacrifices it takes to claim baseball's throne.

name: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
description: In the aftermath of a galaxy-spanning war, a ruthless survivor retreats to a remote world beyond the Empire’s reach. From the shadows, he begins laying plans to rebuild a powerful criminal network while new threats and uneasy alliances close in.

name: LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy - Pieces of the Past
description: A new threat rises in the galaxy, and Sig Greebling and Darth Dev must combine their powers of Force Building and Sith Breaking to stop it. Alongside Jedi Bob, Yesi Scala and Servo, they will journey into the deepest corners of Lego Star Wars lore, uncovering pieces of all the galaxies that have come before.

name: CIA
description: A rule-following federal agent is pulled into a secret joint task force and paired with a more unpredictable intelligence operative. Working covert cases in New York, the duo tackles terrorist threats, international schemes, and dangerous secrets while learning to navigate their very different styles.

name: WWE: Unreal
description: This docuseries goes behind the curtain of WWE’s biggest events, following performers and staff as they plan, rehearse, and deliver massive live spectacles. It highlights the pressure, teamwork, and personal stakes involved in turning scripted entertainment into a high-risk show that still feels real to the crowd.

name: Saturday Night Live UK
description: A live, weekly sketch-comedy show brings the classic anything-can-happen format to the UK, with a different guest host and musical performer each episode. Built and performed in the same week, it features an opening monologue, topical sketches, live music, and a British spin on the signature news-satire segment.

name: DMV
description: In a DMV office where everyone arrives annoyed, a group of underpaid employees tries to survive the daily grind with humor and camaraderie. Between awkward customer encounters and workplace chaos, they lean on each other to get through a thankless job and find small moments of connection.

name: Mating Season
description: Set in the animal world, the series follows a cast of bears, raccoons, deer, foxes and a host of other horny, lovable forest critters, as they navigate love, sexual relationships and the universal need to hook up and find a partner.

name: Hell Motel
description: A group of 10 true crime obsessives are invited to the opening weekend of the newly renovated Cold River Motel, the site of a 30-year-old unsolved satanic mass murder. History repeats itself when the guests get stranded and start getting knocked off one by one during a murder spree that grows exponentially more gruesome than the original with each kill.

name: Marshals
description: After leaving ranch life behind, a former soldier joins an elite team of federal marshals in Montana. As they take on violent threats across the region, the job tests the balance between duty, family, and the emotional strain of being the last line of defense.

name: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
description: Along Rhode Island’s shoreline, a close-knit group of women with deep local roots juggle thriving businesses, big ambitions, and complicated family ties. Long friendships are tested as old history resurfaces, proving that in a small state, it’s hard to escape your past—or each other.

name: The Black Dagger Brotherhood
description: A tight-knit group of vampire warriors fights to protect their kind from ruthless demonic enemies while trying to rebuild a fragile world. As danger closes in, loyalties are tested and intense romances spark, pulling newcomers into a secret, gritty supernatural society.

name: The Faithful
description: This event miniseries follows a group of courageous, passionate, and flawed women as they navigate belief, family, and power in their world. Told through their perspectives, it traces the roots and legacy that would influence Judaism, Christianity, and Islam.

name: Big Mistakes
description: Two hopelessly unprepared siblings are forced into doing dirty work after someone gains leverage over them. As they stumble through the pressures of organized crime, they try to stay afloat, protect each other, and avoid making an already bad situation even worse.

name: Memory of a Killer
description: A man balances a quiet family routine with a dangerous secret job in New York, keeping the truth hidden from those closest to him. When he’s diagnosed with Alzheimer’s, his slipping memory threatens both worlds at once, raising the stakes with every decision and close call.

name: Velvet, El Nuevo Imperio
description: Talented designer Ana Velázquez arrives at Velvet and falls in love with Alberto Márquez, heir to the company, but their love must overcome many intrigues, including a marriage of convenience.

name: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball
description: Back in Elmore, everyday family life keeps colliding with the impossible, as reality bends into nonstop chaos. The town’s oddball problems spiral into wild showdowns, strange tech troubles, and ridiculous debates, pulling everyone into fast, surreal adventures that keep getting weirder.

name: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler
description: Hosted by the iconic Henry Winkler, each 60-minute episode of this nostalgia-drenched series tells the stories of the things we did—for fun, for money, or out of plain boredom—that you can’t do anymore. Pastimes, practices, and products that were once allowed—even encouraged—which you will never see again in modern America.

name: Mr. Scorsese
description: This docuseries traces the life and creative drive of a legendary filmmaker through candid interviews, personal archives, and conversations with longtime collaborators. It connects formative experiences, relationships, and inner struggles to the work, offering plenty of behind-the-scenes stories and reflections on art, faith, and ambition.

name: Love Overboard
description: Sexy singles board a luxury yacht to mix, mingle, and chase romance, but enjoying the most extravagant perks comes with unexpected hurdles. As the voyage continues, connections deepen, alliances shift, and emotions run high while everyone fights to avoid being left behind.

name: Scrubs
description: Two longtime friends return to the hospital for the first time in years, finding that medicine and the newest interns have changed a lot. As familiar and fresh faces juggle demanding work and personal lives, the days at Sacred Heart mix big laughs, heartfelt moments, and a few unexpected turns.

name: Stumble
description: A driven cheer coach pushes a newly formed junior college squad to chase a record-setting championship, using tough love, big personalities, and plenty of humor. As the team learns the ropes, the pressure to win collides with the hope of building confidence, community, and better futures.

name: Girl Taken
description: After a young woman is taken from a quiet rural town and later escapes years later, she returns to a family and community changed by the trauma. The series focuses less on the abduction itself and more on the emotional fallout, strained relationships, and difficult path toward rebuilding a life.

name: aka Charlie Sheen
description: A famous actor looks back on a whirlwind career in a candid two-part documentary. It follows the highs of Hollywood success, the pressures of public scrutiny, and the personal work of rebuilding life and health after a very public downfall.

name: KPOPPED
description: Global music icons team up with world-renowned K-pop idols for spectacular song battles. Performing their biggest hits with a K-pop twist, these artists show up, show out, and shut it down in a friendly competition for the ultimate bragging rights.

name: Strip Law
description: An uptight lawyer joins forces with a flashy Las Vegas magician to tackle the city’s most ridiculous legal problems. Together with a ragtag law office, they chase quick wins, big personalities, and nonstop chaos as each case spirals into wacky, adult animated comedy.

name: The Lady
description: A young woman’s life changes fast when she lands a dream job at Buckingham Palace and forms a close bond with a royal figure. As the glamour fades, her private life grows more complicated, pulling her into a tense, real-life-inspired story that moves from high society to serious consequences.

name: Seen & Heard: The History of Black Television
description: Journey through the history of black representation on television, showcasing how black artists and creators both shaped and revolutionized the medium while confronting the systemic challenges that have often undermined their contributions.

name: Armorsaurs
description: Dinosaurs are back, and five teens are the only ones who can bond with them. It's up to these heroes to armor up and pilot their dinos to fight evil and save the world.

name: The Sisters Grimm
description: One year after their parents' mysterious disappearance, sisters Sabrina and Daphne move to a magical town where fairytales are real and secrets lurk behind every corner.

name: R.J. Decker
description: An ex-con photographer starts over as a private investigator in South Florida, taking on strange, sometimes bizarre cases. With help from his journalist ex, her cop wife, and a mysterious woman from his past, he navigates local crooks, moral gray areas, and a steady dose of offbeat Florida energy.

name: True Haunting
description: People recount unsettling paranormal experiences in their own words, paired with present-day interviews and immersive reenactments. Each story leans into eerie atmosphere and personal testimony, inviting you to decide what you believe as the strange events build and questions linger.

name: The Bad Guys: The Series
description: How did the Bad Guys break into the bad guy business in the first place? Find out in this hilarious prequel series set before the hit films.

name: Funny AF with Kevin Hart
description: A comedy competition series follows a nationwide search for the next breakout stand-up act, guided by well-known comedy mentors. The journey builds toward a live finale where the winner is decided in real time by audience voting.

name: The End of an Era
description: This behind-the-scenes docuseries follows the making and worldwide impact of a record-breaking stadium tour, from early planning to the massive live spectacle. Along the way, it offers an intimate look at the pressure, teamwork, and personal moments behind the headlines, with appearances from collaborators, friends, and family members.

name: Fire and Water: Making the Avatar Films
description: This two-part documentary provides a fascinating glimpse into the making of the Oscar-winning box office phenomenon "Avatar: The Way of Water" and features exclusive behind-the-scenes footage, concept art, and interviews with cast and filmmakers.

name: Heated Rivalry
description: Two elite pro hockey players begin a secret fling as rookies, only to find it turning into something deeper over the years. As their careers rise and their rivalry stays fierce, they wrestle with desire, denial, and what it means to live honestly in a world that expects them to stay guarded.

name: Free Bert
description: A loud, messy dad and his unfiltered family shake up their lives when they land at an elite school filled with judgmental parents and strict expectations. As they try to fit in, their chaotic honesty sparks clashes, awkward moments, and surprising heart at home and on campus.

name: A Knight in the Making
description: Follow "A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms" from the page to the screen in this fascinating and comprehensive look at how HBO's newest series in the Game of Thrones universe was brought to life.

name: 4x20: Quick Hits
description: This anthology series brings together four short films, each about a widely loved plant and the people connected to it. Across quick, self-contained stories, it explores enthusiasm, culture, and personal perspectives in a compact format.

name: Jury Duty Presents: Company Retreat
description: A temp joins a hot sauce company’s annual retreat as the longtime leader prepares to step down. As an eager heir tries to prove himself, an outside buyout offer adds pressure and awkward workplace tension.

name: Hulk Hogan: Real American
description: This documentary series looks past the larger-than-life public image to explore the person behind a wrestling legend. Built around a candid final interview, it promises a personal, unfiltered look at fame, identity, and legacy.

name: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
description: This docuseries looks back at a once-glamorous modeling competition that grew into a pop-culture phenomenon, then became known for intense drama and lasting controversy. Through interviews and reflection, it revisits how the show’s biggest moments were made—and why they still spark debate and viral reactions today.

name: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Strange Tails
description: Hawkeye and The Avengers have made saving the world look easy. But now they face their wildest threat yet: SOCIAL MEDIA. To save the world, a new team must be recruited to help our heroes contend with an influencer bent on cataclysmic destruction.

name: This Is a Gardening Show
description: A light, playful series follows a curious host exploring gardening with self-deprecating humor and a genuine love of the natural world. Along the way, it offers approachable advice, simple tools, and easy tips for viewers who want to grow their own connection to plants.

name: Washington Black
description: An 11-year-old boy escapes a brutal life on a Barbados sugar plantation by taking to the skies in an experimental flying machine. As he travels across the world with an unlikely companion, he searches for freedom, belonging, and a sense of identity while trying to stay one step ahead of the past.

name: American Primeval
description: A mother and son on the run head west and are forced to rely on strangers as they cross a brutal, lawless frontier. In a landscape where survival comes first, they face violence, shifting loyalties, and the weight of the past while trying to build a fragile sense of family.

name: Wonder Man
description: Two actors at very different points in their careers chase roles that could change everything, navigating Hollywood pressure, friendship, and self-doubt. As ambition collides with a world shaped by superheroes, the line between performance and real life starts to blur in surprising, heartfelt ways.

name: Good American Family
description: A Midwestern couple adopts a child they believe is a young girl with dwarfism, hoping to build a loving home. As unsettling incidents and doubts pile up, trust inside the household fractures and the family is pulled into a tense, high-stakes struggle over identity, truth, and who to believe.

name: Wayward
description: A small-town police officer starts digging into a local school for troubled teens after sensing something off about its methods and influence. As questions pile up, the academy’s charismatic founder and the town’s uneasy dynamics make the investigation feel increasingly risky and unsettling.

name: Secrets of the Penguins
description: Over two extraordinary years, National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory discovered never-before-filmed secret traditions, surprising intelligence and close-knit societies of penguins. This astonishing series reveals they are more like us than we ever dreamed, from their powerful friendships to the courageous risk-takers using ingenuity and innovation in some of the world's most extreme places.

name: SNL50: Beyond Saturday Night
description: This documentary series goes behind the scenes of a long-running live comedy institution, covering auditions, the writing process, famous sketches, and a turbulent season that helped define its future. It focuses on how the show is built each week and why it became such a cultural force.

name: Spartacus: House of Ashur
description: In an alternate take on the Spartacus world, a former gladiator survives and claws his way into power, taking control of the training house that once owned him. With a fierce new ally at his side, he turns the arena into a bold spectacle that shocks Rome’s elite and fuels fresh intrigue.

name: The Residence
description: A sharp, unconventional detective is called to the White House after a killing during a high-stakes state dinner. With the residence locked down and everyone from staff to guests under suspicion, the investigation turns into a tense, witty puzzle full of secrets, alibis, and shifting motives.

name: Zero Day
description: After a devastating cyberattack throws the country into chaos, a retired national leader is pulled back into public life to head an emergency investigation. As pressure mounts from politics, media, and public fear, the search for answers uncovers a tangled network of deception and competing agendas.

name: The Survivors
description: A quiet seaside town is still haunted by a tragedy that claimed three young lives years ago. When a young woman dies under mysterious circumstances, old wounds reopen and long-buried questions resurface, forcing the community to confront what it tried to leave behind.

name: Court of Gold
description: This behind-the-scenes docuseries follows several top men’s basketball medal contenders at the 2024 Paris Olympics as they chase gold. It mixes locker-room access, interviews, and game-day pressure while highlighting multiple nations and the personalities, history, and rivalries that shape the tournament.

name: The Dinosaurs
description: This four-part documentary-style miniseries traces the long arc of dinosaur evolution, from early origins through major changes in Earth’s environments and ecosystems. It highlights how different species diversified over time and explores the forces that shaped their world, leading up to a mass extinction event.

name: Twisted Yoga
description: Ex-members of a tantric yoga school speak out about how they went from searching for wellness and community to fearing they'd joined a cult, and seeking justice for alleged abuse and manipulation at the hands of a self-styled guru.
